name: Conservatives Give
subject: A free video series about the Inklings
body:
C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century’s most beloved works of literature

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=17eca8d57c384228b7b533846ee520a3&_e=XqDJQKbnUYJUaI-4SAOILiKbnNYjc-cUZ9yVh5lEWznXtUFq0uxnk8e-VsaNwAXqEPf6XvAZF-NKKjCCTSr3_s256zIxfZveinzvyZlFfs4s6Yd2FVINf88RLSRcnGGX7WqT1SnucxQDf190dtXIQdTmbQ4JrnVw56EuRJeAwc-xtIiCCuxar7Z2ACgUDVeupfa_CPl07FRrjA3y-sagBaVNt5U_S5C33aHYvYDDZZeqD3aPMRYAgc1Swfc38o9MqqKPm8Vgw5A0HfiLGy_OYTLwvpyQCyOv6xR_duduoLyatOja_gh9y53YQMpNdHoZsPE2kqA1lYJZnZggddkm6WvDzMy6Sc-l5JLoJXsR-lXIukoTrNSg8KPfzH7Dfbxp)
---
| | Dear Friend,

C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century's most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

Today, I want to share an exclusive and free video series with you that considers Lewis and Tolkien in the context of their membership in the Inklings--an informal professor-student literary group at Oxford in the 1930s and 40s.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings by using this secure link now:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=17eca8d57c384228b7b533846ee520a3&_e=XqDJQKbnUYJUaI-4SAOILiKbnNYjc-cUZ9yVh5lEWznXtUFq0uxnk8e-VsaNwAXqEPf6XvAZF-NKKjCCTSr3_s256zIxfZveinzvyZlFfs4s6Yd2FVINf88RLSRcnGGX7WqT1SnucxQDf190dtXIQdTmbQ4JrnVw56EuRJeAwc-xtIiCCuxar7Z2ACgUDVeupfa_CPl07FRrjA3y-sagBaVNt5U_S5C33aHYvYDDZZcDh0HlN0RGMF9SjT4FxJu3IoSjNOhxYyBz47mp7CrkLsTLZonLK8cA_3_xx4bsr3F_hY6zFvvKt0EDZDO59ZXnoALh35ZQl_fvxnrI-Cjxn1_k6QaKl5Geri0wTkkKyKQREfS_8w_7dDcWhiU6G1Ba)**

C.S. Lewis is best known for his Narnia books--such as _The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe_ --and his apologetics, including _Mere Christianity_. Indeed, Lewis is one of the greatest Christian apologists of all time.

J.R.R. Tolkien's most renowned works are _The Hobbit_ and _The Lord of the Rings _trilogy.

That both were men of genius is indisputable. Both men also devoted countless hours to honing their craft. This included subjecting their writing to the scrutiny of their fellow Inklings, who met regularly for conversation and to read aloud from and discuss their current work.

**The Inklings are a fascinating topic of study, which is why we 've created a free online video series for you to enjoy. **

The video series, titled "The Inklings," was filmed on the Hillsdale College campus. It examines the ideas that bound the Inklings, what they accomplished, and the continuing importance of their works today--with a special focus on Lewis and Tolkien.

**You can use the secure link below to receive instant access to "The Inklings" free video series:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=17eca8d57c384228b7b533846ee520a3&_e=XqDJQKbnUYJUaI-4SAOILiKbnNYjc-cUZ9yVh5lEWznXtUFq0uxnk8e-VsaNwAXqEPf6XvAZF-NKKjCCTSr3_s256zIxfZveinzvyZlFfs4s6Yd2FVINf88RLSRcnGGX7WqT1SnucxQDf190dtXIQdTmbQ4JrnVw56EuRJeAwc-xtIiCCuxar7Z2ACgUDVeupfa_CPl07FRrjA3y-sagBaVNt5U_S5C33aHYvYDDZZdpjRBczb51ERYVeeHdZC0_nytENYE15iZCN3MU5BobMUgY556vPhbJ_PYwsYAwZY-Wi5eg-O1RIK7vaGSeGdeEEre9lcDrKcn8tb2oJ5M9yDCJpWfOe64JMnbuSkpRQJFrKyi9bKww9Jlc0cb90J7K)**

Lewis and Tolkien thought the Inklings' meetings contributed significantly to their literary success. As models of civil discussion and intelligent debate, they stand in stark contrast to today's "cancel culture."

The Inklings, are therefore, worth studying not only for their great literary achievements but also because they exemplify the free speech that is essential to the pursuit of truth.

That's why Hillsdale College created a free online video series on the Inklings. I hope you'll use the secure link above and start watching it today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien met regularly with an informal literary group named the Inklings.

Now, you can examine the philosophical, theological, and literary ideas that bound the Inklings together with a free video series from Hillsdale College.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=17eca8d57c384228b7b533846ee520a3&_e=XqDJQKbnUYJUaI-4SAOILiKbnNYjc-cUZ9yVh5lEWznXtUFq0uxnk8e-VsaNwAXqEPf6XvAZF-NKKjCCTSr3_s256zIxfZveinzvyZlFfs4s6Yd2FVINf88RLSRcnGGX7WqT1SnucxQDf190dtXIQdTmbQ4JrnVw56EuRJeAwc-xtIiCCuxar7Z2ACgUDVeupfa_CPl07FRrjA3y-sagBaVNt5U_S5C33aHYvYDDZZeXtosV-98YL13VkOB0u_92q6LbFoFtSMjYSqEFxy0r58O2Sgmw4JZr5Dcp_-PlIfUTEP-cnLFB_Fv6rKuSeNHhdsQfC-lkIv_mCn8paJpM9NqJxReXPBLGn_CzbcRIdGfS3Eztfr8MYruZ8tiop51W)**

---
| |

body:
Small businesses are the backbone of our economy, and Valerie is working to ensure they are adequately supported.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58195739/390329627/-340664628?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230202-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTgyYmU4MS01OGEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IQQx36IDVGTYA6QX3CdAv_8JMzgPfIYlAKF4SyoNaBY=)

Peter,

This week, Congresswoman Foushee met with Vice President Harris and other local and state leaders to discuss how to maximize opportunities for small businesses to thrive in North Carolina.

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: Thanks for helping us start the year strong!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58195984/390335127/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_230202TY_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGZkMzA3NC01YWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SNPofPDxgjEfT2fpIYZuIY-YLcE9CUp4OFT_e1gWiuo=)
---
Friend,

The new year brought with it an official changing of control in the House — and with it, the GOP's extremism was quickly on full display. **So I wanted to thank you for all of your support throughout this month, because you helped us start the new election cycle from a position of strength that allows us to set a stark contrast and put in the early work to secure VA-10.**

Because of what we raised in January, we can get started on growing our campaign in the weeks and months ahead. Our focus on protecting abortion rights, fighting for economic opportunity, and standing up for federal workers here in VA-10 will never waiver.

I'm looking forward to a lot of conversations with folks across the district soon — conversations that will build the narrative to power us through another competitive race.

None of this work would be possible without grassroots supporters like you. So again, thank you so much for continuing to stand with me.

— Jennifer

P.S. I'm always interested in getting feedback from my supporters so that we can run the best possible campaign and always stay true to our values. [**If you haven't already, can you take a minute to fill out our recent issues survey?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58195985/390335128/776812473?ms=EM_C_230202TY_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_C_230202TY_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGZkMzA3NC01YWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SNPofPDxgjEfT2fpIYZuIY-YLcE9CUp4OFT_e1gWiuo=&emci=5eb9ae7b-4ca3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=40fd3074-5aa3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) Thanks in advance! | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58195986/390335129/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_230202TY_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGZkMzA3NC01YWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SNPofPDxgjEfT2fpIYZuIY-YLcE9CUp4OFT_e1gWiuo=)****

body:
Can you take just a few minutes to fill out my priorities survey? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58196036/390339461/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmVhNzAwOS01Y2EzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZoWjciK24Y5_hh9DfAIj0Lo38G3xnxY7iuUUGjXLeA=&emci=ba04d7a2-57a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=32ea7009-5ca3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

To say I’ve been busy lately is an understatement, folks. I’ve committed my time at home in New Mexico and in the Senate to lifting up New Mexicans and folks across the country — from advocating for widespread electrification of homes and vehicles, to working to lower everyday costs. It’s just as important to learn about the issues that are personal to you and your family. That’s why I reach out each month to hear from you directly about what issues I should tackle next. [**Can you take just five minutes (or less!) to fill out my team’s priorities survey? Your responses will help chart the course for the month ahead.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58196038/390339464/-351082015?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmVhNzAwOS01Y2EzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZoWjciK24Y5_hh9DfAIj0Lo38G3xnxY7iuUUGjXLeA=&emci=ba04d7a2-57a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=32ea7009-5ca3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=252045) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58196042/390339465/-351082015?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmVhNzAwOS01Y2EzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZoWjciK24Y5_hh9DfAIj0Lo38G3xnxY7iuUUGjXLeA=&emci=ba04d7a2-57a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=32ea7009-5ca3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I’m officially running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| I wanted to share this with you personally, Peter:

**I’m running for reelection to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support today is so important.**

The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades — enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too.

But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign.

**So that’s what I’m asking of you today, Peter. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority.**

[**Please, will you split $10 between my campaign and UniteDemocrats to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign to defeat the GOP in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58196137/390345193/908117046?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230202_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmNTcyMzFhLTVlYTMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l245kvXhKXEN3NzqNYNxnbb6RcnW6utqQWxUbnI7-e0=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kirsten Gillibrand and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58196144/390345228/908117046?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230202_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmNTcyMzFhLTVlYTMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l245kvXhKXEN3NzqNYNxnbb6RcnW6utqQWxUbnI7-e0=)

I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic.

But there are so many critical fights ahead — for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a permanent paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that.

| Thank you, Peter. Because grassroots supporters like you stepped up when I needed you most, we were able to surpass our first monthly fundraising goal of the new year.

I’m so glad to see that this team understands the urgency of this moment – and our need to build a strong campaign foundation right away. Now we have to keep up this momentum so that we can invest in key campaign and voter mobilization efforts in the coming months.

I look forward to continuing to make change together.

Thank you,
Susan

name: American Defense News
subject: A free video series about the Inklings
body:
C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century’s most beloved works of literature, including robust defense

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zopb06r9gpj4scsnp954mf6t0ggr812r4hv1h958_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5h64o32c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century's most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

Today, I want to share an exclusive and free video series with you that considers Lewis and Tolkien in the context of their membership in the Inklings--an informal professor-student literary group at Oxford in the 1930s and 40s.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings by using this secure link now:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztc19opl6oblbjq84g2n5q1emhso11dot036b8bg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5h64o32c9h2bs)**

C.S. Lewis is best known for his Narnia books--such as _The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe_ --and his apologetics, including _Mere Christianity_. Indeed, Lewis is one of the greatest Christian apologists of all time.

J.R.R. Tolkien's most renowned works are _The Hobbit_ and _The Lord of the Rings _trilogy.

That both were men of genius is indisputable. Both men also devoted countless hours to honing their craft. This included subjecting their writing to the scrutiny of their fellow Inklings, who met regularly for conversation and to read aloud from and discuss their current work.

**The Inklings are a fascinating topic of study, which is why we 've created a free online video series for you to enjoy. **

The video series, titled "The Inklings," was filmed on the Hillsdale College campus. It examines the ideas that bound the Inklings, what they accomplished, and the continuing importance of their works today--with a special focus on Lewis and Tolkien.

**You can use the secure link below to receive instant access to "The Inklings" free video series:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zftq5fc9a1djp7b1jhu9p4qmerflpnlej1do0um8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5h64o32c9h2bs)**

Lewis and Tolkien thought the Inklings' meetings contributed significantly to their literary success. As models of civil discussion and intelligent debate, they stand in stark contrast to today's "cancel culture."

The Inklings, are therefore, worth studying not only for their great literary achievements but also because they exemplify the free speech that is essential to the pursuit of truth.

That's why Hillsdale College created a free online video series on the Inklings. I hope you'll use the secure link above and start watching it today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: American Federation for Children
subject: Families deserve the power to choose
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by American Federation for Children |
body:
The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice! [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7961%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=mJYO2UbFhV5HcqN3tDBwpA&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94150%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o8jjGOVeD1C9Nz86TKLrXg&sysid=1)
---
| | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling. **That’s why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021 ...** _to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country._ The result? Thousands of everyday Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide. This winter, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, **we’re RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE!** _Will you take a stand for school choice today, friend?_ **Here is the pledge ...**
---
| | _“I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school.”_
---
| | [**SIGN THE PLEDGE TODAY >>**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94151%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qcWsIPoNnHcXEtgA%2fWexFQ&sysid=1)
---
| | **Friend, if you agree that parents deserve CHOICE - _and kids deserve better_ - [_join our movement and sign the Education Freedom Pledge today! >>_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94152%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4aE7HruD0f%2bFU4cqJQEMhw&sysid=1)**
---
| | [ ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94153%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1sO4g%2fgzDbVc0oN2luiQ%2bA&sysid=1)
---
| | When you sign the Education Freedom Pledge, you join a diverse coalition of some of the MOST influential legislators and school choice activists in America. **Some of the Education Freedom Pledge’s top signers include ...**
---
| |
* Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds
* AFC Senior Fellow Corey DeAngelis
* Wisconsin Speaker of the House Robin Vos
* Florida Education Commissioner Manny Diaz Jr.
* **[_Add YOUR NAME here >>_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94154%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ipUBdGIyPAEI8npIT%2bd5Gg&sysid=1)**

---
| | Friend, 72% of Americans now support school choice after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn’t best for ANY individual child. Unfortunately, the opponents of our movement - the teachers’ unions - wield irrational levels of influence on education policy, **and we need your voice.** **If enough grassroots Americans sign the Education Freedom Pledge, we can overcome the teacher's unions and give families the choices they deserve.[_We hope you’ll take a stand today! >>_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94165%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ze3TG8LQk9BFknaI4TI%2b6g&sysid=1)**
---
| | [**SIGN TODAY >> STAND FOR SCHOOL CHOICE!**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94166%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CKA2%2bAvWsDU1xYqDet6Ehw&sysid=1)

name: Mr. Snerdley
subject: Biden is Wrong about Black Parents
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
Brandon continues to make parents the enemy for seeking to protect their children.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62282944:6PEWphGN8:m:1:3334294963:034DDEB7887EBF3DBAC67D3EAACBD001:r "Headline") Peter: The Biden Administration continues to make parents the enemy for seeking to protect their children. For decades, Joe Biden has claimed that Black parents may not participate in their children's schooling due to "embarrassment about their own lack of education." Quite frankly, Biden thinks that black parents don't want to educate their children! **He 's dead wrong.** Black Parents, like all Americans, value a good education and want their children to benefit from the American Dream. That's why we want to use Biden's wayward education policies to show Black Voters why they should embrace the GOP's platform of freedom and opportunity. **[We need your help to expose Black parents to the TRUTH about the Democrats' Education plan on our children. Chip in today to help us fight Brandon's Woke education policies.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62282944:6PEWphGN8:m:1:3334294963:034DDEB7887EBF3DBAC67D3EAACBD001:r "We need your help to expose Black parents to
the TRUTH about the Democrats’ Education plan on our children. Chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help us fight Brandon’s Woke education
policies.")** It was only a year ago when we found out that Biden was asking the FBI to treat parents as domestic terrorists for passionately voicing concerns at their local school boards. Brandon and the American Federation of Teachers were behind it all! **It proves how the left 's playbook on education has nothing to do with ensuring our children have a better future.** Brandon and his leftist allies want to indoctrinate our children about gender reassignment procedures and revisionist history. The GOP wants children to learn reading, writing, and arithmetic. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62282944:6PEWphGN8:m:1:3334294963:034DDEB7887EBF3DBAC67D3EAACBD001:r "Headline")The GOP wants girls to play sports on girls' teams and boys to play on boys' teams. They don't want boys in girls' bathrooms and vice versa, but that's what the fight for the future of our children is coming down to under Biden. Brandon and the D.C. elites have teamed up with progressives seeking to indoctrinate our children from kindergarten through their college years. **[Chip in TODAY and help us ensure America's Children receive a proper education that will put them on the path to greatness!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62282944:6PEWphGN8:m:1:3334294963:034DDEB7887EBF3DBAC67D3EAACBD001:r "Chip in $25, $50, or $100
TODAY and help us ensure America’s Children receive a proper education that will put them on the path to greatness!")** Fortunately, there are leaders like Florida's Governor Ron DeSantis who are seeking to expand school choice that will aid minority children who live in areas with substandard schools while combatting the Florida schools from kindergarten through college who were teaching DEI and CRT. Around the country, more and more parents are voicing their concerns which is why some in Ohio are suing public schools that refuse to report their conversations with students over sexuality and transgender identity. **We must make this a national clarion call!** Now is the time to strike back and put an end to the leftist stranglehold on America's Education system by using this issue to show Black America that there is a choice when it comes to public policy issues and their children's future. **[Will you help us stop this Leftist, Woke indoctrination in our schools and help America's Children get a proper education with your donation today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62282944:6PEWphGN8:m:1:3334294963:034DDEB7887EBF3DBAC67D3EAACBD001:r "Will you help us stop this Leftist, Woke indoctrination in our
schools and help America’s Children get a proper education with your $50, $100, or $250 donation today?")** This is a perfect opportunity to organize Black voters and get them on our side, but we can only succeed if you join with us. **[Donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62282944:6PEWphGN8:m:1:3334294963:034DDEB7887EBF3DBAC67D3EAACBD001:r "Donate today.")** For a New Journey, [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62282944:6PEWphGN8:m:1:3334294963:034DDEB7887EBF3DBAC67D3EAACBD001:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, aka Bo Snerdley

subject: Lewis, Tolkien, and the Inklings
body:

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zch9ks59cnesu0kcevokr5qe729p8vko17moc5ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5h6aor2chh2bs)

| | Dear Friend,

C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century's most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

C.S. Lewis is best known for his Narnia books--such as _The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe_ --and his apologetics, including _Mere Christianity_. Indeed, Lewis is one of the greatest Christian apologists of all time.

J.R.R. Tolkien's most renowned works are _The Hobbit_ and _The Lord of the Rings _trilogy.

That both were men of genius is indisputable. Both men also devoted countless hours to honing their craft. This included subjecting their writing to the scrutiny of their fellow Inklings, who met regularly for conversation and to read aloud from and discuss their current work.

**The Inklings are a fascinating topic of study, which is why we 've created a free online video series for you to enjoy. **

The Inklings, are therefore, worth studying not only for their great literary achievements but also because they exemplify the free speech that is essential to the pursuit of truth.

That's why Hillsdale College created a free online video series on the Inklings. I hope you'll use the secure link above and start watching it today.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings using this secure link:**

Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century’s most beloved works of literature, including robust defense | | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century's most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith. Today, I want to share an exclusive and free video series with you that considers Lewis and Tolkien in the context of their membership in the Inklings--an informal professor-student literary group at Oxford in the 1930s and 40s. You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings by using this secure link now: C.S. Lewis is best known for his Narnia books--such as The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe --and his apologetics, including Mere Christianity. Indeed, Lewis is one of the greatest Christian apologists of all time. J.R.R. Tolkien's most renowned works are The Hobbit and The Lord of the Rings trilogy. That both were men of genius is indisputable. Both men also devoted countless hours to honing their craft. This included subjecting their writing to the scrutiny of their fellow Inklings, who met regularly for conversation and to read aloud from and discuss their current work. The Inklings are a fascinating topic of study, which is why we 've created a free online video series for you to enjoy. The video series, titled "The Inklings," was filmed on the Hillsdale College campus. It examines the ideas that bound the Inklings, what they accomplished, and the continuing importance of their works today--with a special focus on Lewis and Tolkien. You can use the secure link below to receive instant access to "The Inklings" free video series: Lewis and Tolkien thought the Inklings' meetings contributed significantly to their literary success. As models of civil discussion and intelligent debate, they stand in stark contrast to today's "cancel culture." The Inklings, are therefore, worth studying not only for their great literary achievements but also because they exemplify the free speech that is essential to the pursuit of truth. That's why Hillsdale College created a free online video series on the Inklings. I hope you'll use the secure link above and start watching it today. Warm regards, Larry P. **_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: The Montana GOP is hoping their surge in the midterms will carry over to unseating Jon Tester, a practical, reliable, loyal Democrat who faithfully represents his constituents. We need to have Tester’s back.
body:
GOP pickup opportunity?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T902a739a-9647-43a1-9597-fc0b96a43082/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _The Montana Senate seat held by Jon Tester is a race we can't afford to lose in 2024, or we lose the Senate._ _[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a89c439-b125-42c4-9b6f-18c1fcece23a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ _Senator Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana. _**_Tester has been everything you'd hope for as a Senator from a bright red state running as a Democrat._** He breaks with us on some issues where he has to represent his constituents. [**_Will you join us in showing Jon Tester how much we appreciate his political courage and in ensuring we hold onto the Senate majority, by giving Senator Tester $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d60e676-a13a-4f01-bddc-2e44b349fd80/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_But whether it's key national issues like codifying choice or passing universal background checks on guns, or joining us on defining legislation such as the COVID stimulus & Inflation Reduction Acts, there is just never any question Jon Tester will be there, behind us 100%._**
---
|
---

subject: Just got an update from my team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:

Friend, I had to personally reach out to ask for your urgent support ahead of tonight’s midnight fundraising deadline. Here’s why:
* Republicans only need to win two more seats to retake Senate control, and Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is reporting that they have a clear path to do just that.
* Here in New York, Republicans just had their best election cycle in _two decades_ — winning enough seats to deliver the House majority to the GOP. Now, they’re targeting my seat as a key pickup opportunity to flip the Senate next.
* **My team just let me know that we’re on track to fall short of tonight’s $25,000 fundraising goal, and missing a critical goal like this would signal to Mitch McConnell and the GOP that this seat is vulnerable.**

I know we can turn this around, but only if grassroots supporters like you step up right away. name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: Peter, I need to brief you on Ilhan Omar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | Peter, Ilhan Omar said that my decision to remove her from the House Foreign Affairs committee, and Adam Schiff and Eric Swalwell from the Intelligence Committee, is a "threat to national security".

**Let me be blunt:** national security is precisely __why__ I removed these three from their respective committees. I've said it many times before, and I'll say it again:
* Adam Schiff's abuse of his position on the Intel Committee to LIE in pursuit of President Trump proves his inability to put national security and integrity over partisan games.
* Eric Swalwell's relationship with a Chinese spy is quite literally the definition of jeopardizing national security, which is why the FBI briefed me on the matter.
* And Ilhan Omar's openly anti-semitic statements and stance directly imperil our alliance with our #1 ally in the Middle East: Israel.

I am returning the Intelligence Committee to one of genuine honesty and credibility that regains the trust of the American people.

I promised I'd restore accountability to your government. Now I am delivering, and the Democrats are FURIOUS.

**If you stand with my decision to drain the swamp of these bad actors, I need you to stand with me now:**

* * *
# **The Feds's Digital Dollar Is Here!**
**It is official.** The digital dollar, once talked about, is here. Reuters reported that on Tuesday November 15th, 2022, a statement from the Fed's of New York, announcing that Global Banking Giants and the New York Fed are testing the digital dollar in a 12-week pilots.
Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo are among the financial companies participating in the experiment. According to New York Fed, the project, which is called the regulated liability network, will use simulated data.
How will that affect you and your finances? Well, go figure. You will no longer have any privacy whatsoever. Your hard-earned savings will be "worth-less". Surely the dollar will continue to devalue resulting in heavily diminishing your purchasing power. [Learn more](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.).
**Our government will know what you have, where you have it, and how you are spending it.** This is the ultimate control that they are after. It limits and blocks the way [you spend your money](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._ArR1IGimxktg) unless obtaining their approval at first.

| Peter, think about how insulting it is when you're trying to persuade a member of Congress and they literally refer you straight to their lobbyist (yep - I've had that happen).
I'm trying to do things a different way. But it means I must rely on the dedication of patriots like you - [chipping in grassroots support of even just $2 or more at a time](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WD_4OdT2MlaHKIb-4_ykDuGhJXwS7MuFz2BhDJfzhmvsTXm5vyQuE3SKNUr2ra3paQizIaTE0v9-5dWipBanr-DpjiN83uFkVxAqmLw87Bbqwy_UIOYSKLWukkgkK1llO17NwCMz9gnCTjtNYf4OW99lH1ufPyYLH_fr_IZSGJr9s1M3ww85SSwigoXPddb1p96IZMvjgX4v_3XtWTRvxg5gFElK6KDhhK_Lj-ieVKCgPJzwHA8iELNekoKhgWR2sg3jPgb-4BGcs0c5RVzzMA==&c=pqU312yuQbqAunvm4ulfX4XIrsZ30ImYIJVtMhASWZvVJfs40qEU6Q==&ch=O5yKlPyQbgsdwZe0xsdsnmSjYbDGRwJST8iUXF1TzrVCJ7CLFK9g5Q==) - in order to fuel my fight and break up this corrupt system in Washington.
We've already shown we can change this place FOR GOOD when we all stand together as one movement... And I'm ready to continue Draining the Swamp - no matter how much they hate me for it!
WILL YOU STAND WITH ME AND HELP ME SEND EVEN MORE SHOCKWAVES TO THE CORRUPT D.C. CARTEL?

clean_body: | | | | == | Peter, | SHOCKER: Taking a stand during the Speaker Vote AGAINST the lobbyists and FOR the American People has not earned me many friends in the Swamp! | | | == | | | It turns out, speaking out against the D.C. Cartel doesn't make you very popular with the Establishment politicians hoping to line up their future lobbyist gig... But I don't work for them, Peter - I WORK FOR AMERICANS LIKE YOU! My constituents are my real bosses... So if standing up for them makes me The Most Hated in D.C., I will wear that as a BADGE OF HONOR! Just as long as these members of Congress have to wear something else in return... 🏎️ The patches of their PAC and lobbyist donors like NASCAR drivers do with their sponsors! 🏎️ | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Peter, think about how insulting it is when you're trying to persuade a member of Congress and they literally refer you straight to their lobbyist (yep - I've had that happen). I'm trying to do things a different way. But it means I must rely on the dedication of patriots like you - == - in order to fuel my fight and break up this corrupt system in Washington. We've already shown we can change this place FOR GOOD when we all stand together as one movement... And I'm ready to continue Draining the Swamp - no matter how much they hate me for it! WILL YOU STAND WITH ME AND HELP ME SEND EVEN MORE SHOCKWAVES TO THE CORRUPT D.C. CARTEL? | | == | Thanks for your trust and support. Your humble servant, | == | Matt Gaetz Republican, Florida's 1st District | | | | | | == | == == | Copyright (C) 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: ConservativeFWD on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Your 2023 Second Amendment Survey
body:
We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zk7llberpklkhnv49g5u0nlhbiv40qu41ljqjl6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5j64o76c1h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uphjaptkm9pb0sriedhj9plmchqeecrn6lgb9obgeqpr2ohjmhoe3cbicti7ao77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphheiqr4o3im9j3coljc1jr1db5e8iv0)
*Sponsored Message*
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zu2l2t73f5ftdubd5vajrceigfl37npk8irbs24o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5j64o76c1h2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zue6tdnhrk810v5f5ikc5pqi8nl0423n1saim3kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5j64o76c1h2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8ij7v9437onb5aiij0a4eok5ogua98lpjnujd5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5j64o76c1h2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcnsj1dp8pb3vmejceuch05sji03ovuda250pajg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5j64o76c1h2bs)**
---

Erler observed in Imprimis , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of first principles." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it. That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today at this secure link: We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we reach and teach millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations. After completing your Second Amendment Survey , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our Second Amendment Survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! and Control Over Their Financial Transactions."**

We find some DEEPLY disturbing language hidden in section 4 of this order. ---

---
What does that mean for the dollar twenty years from now, thirty? What does that mean for all the time you've invested in building your retirement account? This is entirely different from online banking and nothing like crypto. It’s like having spyware installed in your bank account. Malware that tracks your every move and reports it back to the powers that be. China and Russia have launched their digital currencies, and they are backed by gold. _Ours, "Fedcoin," will be backed by our debt._ **We don’t know it, but we’re already enslaved!** In addition, 90% of central banks are testing or exploring this concept. It’s not a question of “oh, this might happen someday.” **It’s happening NOW.** And the reality is that it’s only a matter of time until Americans are FORCED to use digital currencies. Time is of the essence. You can legally secure your money and believe it or not, even GROW it. Yes, it’s possible to do all this while hiding it safely away from Democrat surveillance and control. **And When These Digital Currencies**
**Are Implemented its Game Over** **Everything you need to get you on the path of protection is in this Complimentary Guide.** You'll Learn the following:

* About the particular account, rich people use to shield their assets
* About the world’s most powerful anti-inflation fighter

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: I can’t thank you enough
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Your continued support sends a loud message

Derek, I can’t thank you enough. We just closed the books on our first big fundraising deadline since I was sworn in as Pennsylvania’s Governor, and thanks to you, we crushed our goal.

Your continued support sends a message as loud as the one we sent on Election Day: Here in Pennsylvania, we value our rights. We value our freedoms. We value our democracy. And we value opportunity – for every single person in our great Commonwealth.

Our work is just getting started, and I want you to be part of it every step of the way. name: Don Huffines
subject: Announcing the Liberty Budget 💰
body:
The Liberty Budget explains how fiscal discipline can put billions into the pockets of Texas taxpayers
No images? [Click here](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-e-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-s/) [](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-r/)
# The Liberty Budget
[](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-y/) To bring back liberty and prosperity, conservatives must take the next step towards stopping the growth of government: the**[Liberty Budget](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-j/)**. Developed by the Huffines Liberty Foundation, it explains how fiscal discipline can put billions into the pockets of Texas taxpayers.The path for reducing the size and scope of the Texas government under the Liberty Budget is straightforward:
1. The Texas legislature must stop state spending growth.
2. The state will then produce significant budget surpluses.
3. The increased revenue from economic growth will immediately be sent back to Texas taxpayers.

The question is, **are Texas politicians willing to listen to their constituents and exercise fiscal discipline by adopting the[Liberty Budget](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-t/) _?_** [View Full Paper](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-h/) **ICYMI: **Don Huffines' latest op-ed in the Dallas Express, [Texas Can Fix the Border Crisis](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-k/). [](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-u/) [Read Here](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-o/) Are you a reporter? Signup for the [HLF Press List](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-b/) to receive an exclusive bi-weekly roundup of what we are up to. You can view past press releases on our [press page](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-n/).For Liberty,

Noah Betz
Executive Director, Huffines Liberty Foundation [](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-p/)[](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-x/)[](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-f/) [Donate](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-z/) | [](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-v/) | [ Share ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-fb-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-g/) | [ Tweet ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-tw-ftdurik-yuddtktydi-w/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-ftdurik-l-yd)
---|---|---

As we look to the future of our country, we need strong and proven leaders who are ready to defend our values and protect our co

| |

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk402gi1mf1tk0it1uggoalo8ouuq1b7dbncgm10_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gm4pb6c9h2bs)
---

Friend,

As we look to the future of our country, we need strong and proven leaders who are ready to defend our values and protect our country.

That's why I'm making a special announcement on February 15. Before I make my announcement, I am asking for you to join me in this fight for our nation's future. **[Please chip in $25, $50, or even $100 if you can.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjqk29hia6kdnocb81975q4airi1md198vur93t0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gm4pb6c9h2bs "Please chip in $25, $50, or even $100 if you can.")**

| | [Chip in Here](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0kl2e4acmpuloqso5dvda0macgh15jo33duu628_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gm4pb6c9h2bs)
---

I am proud to stand for the ideals that make our nation the greatest force for good in human history. I will never waver in this commitment--not now, not ever. I will always stand for America.

**[Together, we can make sure that America remains the shining city on a hill, a beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3ohq848ehgl8i57gjiaekf6s2de1risknqv3njg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gm4pb6c9h2bs "Together, we can make sure that America remains the shining city on a hill, a beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.")**

Thank you for your continued support.

---
My very best,

name: AFPI Center for Election Integrity
subject: The playbook to secure our elections
body:
| | | After recent elections, voter confidence in outcomes has dropped to an all-time low. But when did our electoral system lose its way? In 2020, many states changed election practices in a hasty manner, and in doing so, made their elections less secure. **That 's why the America First Policy Institute (AFPI) has prepared a package of model policies that would SECURE American elections from foreign interference and prevent last-second, extra-legal procedural changes from taking place behind the backs of American citizens.** **[Would you consider chipping in to help us ensure that our elections are secure in 2024?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62285048:6cqPYhG4N:m:1:3331421248:D91D43DBE2B54C6C727741612E628294:r)** Peter, let's review the facts. Just a few months before the 2020 presidential election, key battleground states like Arizona, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin fundamentally amended their voting rules and procedures without the approval of their legislatures. Most, if not all, of these changes heavily favored left-wing candidates, and the vast majority of them made our elections EVEN MORE insecure. **In real time, the American people watched as state election boards changed election laws at the last second and created new procedures such as universally delivering mail-in ballots.** If you care about the integrity of our elections and the future of America, we NEED you to stand up NOW and support our efforts to secure our elections before 2024.
---
[DONATE $24 FOR '24](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62285048:6cqPYhG4N:m:1:3331421248:D91D43DBE2B54C6C727741612E628294:r)
---
Peter, AFPI is the first and ONLY organization in the country to create a comprehensive policy playbook--_The America First Agenda: Guide to the Issues --_that Congress and the states can use to ensure our elections are safe and secure and solve other issues. But without YOUR support, there's no way to ensure that we are able to educate all Americans about the America First Agenda. **[Will you chip in a tax-deductible donation TODAY to ensure secure elections and advance the America First Agenda?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62285048:6cqPYhG4N:m:1:3331421248:D91D43DBE2B54C6C727741612E628294:r)** Sincerely, **_Center for Election Integrity_** America First Policy Institute
---
[DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62285048:6cqPYhG4N:m:1:3331421248:D91D43DBE2B54C6C727741612E628294:r)
---

Friend,

As we look to the future of our country, we need strong and proven leaders who are ready to defend our values and protect our country.

name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: I need to brief you on Ilhan Omar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Let me be blunt: national security is precisely why I removed these three from their respective committees.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdi6sj80hkt73us230qohkdd187f42hj1oqf1f2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gmcor6c3h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u5jbapb6esqn4ctgmion4phjcpp34ptledq39chle2qjad1lmcpj6tdme9gm2s77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0sjlcoqmeddm6up76phmc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)

| |
---
| | | Friend, Ilhan Omar said that my decision to remove her from the House Foreign Affairs committee, and Adam Schiff and Eric Swalwell from the Intelligence Committee, is a "threat to national security".

**Let me be blunt:** national security is precisely __why__ I removed these three from their respective committees. I've said it many times before, and I'll say it again:
* Adam Schiff's abuse of his position on the Intel Committee to LIE in pursuit of President Trump proves his inability to put national security and integrity over partisan games.
* Eric Swalwell's relationship with a Chinese spy is quite literally the definition of jeopardizing national security, which is why the FBI briefed me on the matter.
* And Ilhan Omar's openly anti-semitic statements and stance directly imperil our alliance with our #1 ally in the Middle East: Israel.

I am returning the Intelligence Committee to one of genuine honesty and credibility that regains the trust of the American people.

I promised I'd restore accountability to your government. Now I am delivering, and the Democrats are FURIOUS.

**If you stand with my decision to drain the swamp of these bad actors, I need you to stand with me now:**
---
| | [STAND WITH KEVIN](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbebeu3js5bhdlb64rib41tolus9rtnurd5jlbm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gmcor6c3h2bs)
---
| | [DRAIN THE SWAMP](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpr1kdueg20108rofciqsqr61quie9a0q4ljkp78_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gmcor6c3h2bs)
---
| |
* * *
---

Bakersfield, CA 93389

**_Not My First Rodeo_ by Kristi Noem**

name: News Alert
subject: Did you see Nikki Haley’s announcement?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of by Stand for America PAC and SFA Inc
body:
Did you see? Nikki Haley is making a big announcement on February 15!

| |
---
| | |
Friend,

Did you see? Nikki Haley is making a big announcement on February 15!

Before her announcement, we're compiling a list of her top supporters. Will you chip in and add your name?

---
| | [Chip in now!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zns9nc9p9da5kmp9ufs926apgpre3u3uaej5vvfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gmao30c1h2bs "Chip in now!")
---

Nikki Haley has proudly stood for America her entire life.

She did it in the state House as a state legislator and as the first female governor of South Carolina.

She fought for our country as U.S. Ambassador to the UN, taking on the world when they tried to disrespect us.

And, she's done it over the past two years, traveling the country to help elect bold conservative candidates up and down the ballot.

_**[Before she makes her announcement, will you chip in and add your name to her list of supporters?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zluc30jbetoappkrqufqh8g5n4t1tpssc808h3ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gmao30c1h2bs "Before she makes her announcement, will you chip in and add your name to her list of supporters?")**_

Thank you,

Team Stand For America
---

name: Nikki Haley
subject: looking to the future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of by Stand for America PAC and SFA Inc
body:
As we look to the future of our country, we need strong and proven leaders who are ready to defend our values and protect our co

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi3n14fu4q6tcgqro8c6dkcnm4tmivii0s4uvbc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gmaob2cph2bs)
---

Friend,

As we look to the future of our country, we need strong and proven leaders who are ready to defend our values and protect our country.

That's why I'm making a special announcement on February 15. Before I make my announcement, I am asking for you to join me in this fight for our nation's future. **[Please chip in $25, $50, or even $100 if you can.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4n1kaajp2210sufiebc2lhl51dh16nj9a8l24e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gmaob2cph2bs "Please chip in $25, $50, or even $100 if you can.")**

---
| | [Chip in Here](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9p19fnmrphgh3gm22ng0etv1r6dea3rr2to2ma8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gmaob2cph2bs)
---

I am proud to stand for the ideals that make our nation the greatest force for good in human history. I will never waver in this commitment--not now, not ever. I will always stand for America.

**[Together, we can make sure that America remains the shining city on a hill, a beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjsigmso5ejt82qnblg1ekgg8705jvm1hdmbaq78_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gmaob2cph2bs "Together, we can make sure that America remains the shining city on a hill, a beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.")**

Thank you for your continued support.

---
My very best,

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zni66s4fr0v3kjilehmg4db7b9le40hum6jco10g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gmaob2cph2bs)
---

Nikki Haley

The Chinese Foreign Ministry has claimed that the balloon was not supposed to [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | #### [ John Kerry's Secret CCP Negotiations To Be Investigated By House Oversight House Oversight and Accountability Committee Chairman James Comer is probing Special Presidential Envoy for Climate (SPEC) John Kerry’s underground negotiations with Chinese government officials. Comer sent Kerry a letter on Thursday afternoon to inform him that the committee, under his leadership, “has opened an investigation into Kerry’s role in the Biden administration and, in particular, his [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | | ** American Briefing 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | | | | ---|---|---|---|---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We have to stop this medical malpractice
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrlm0bc3pg3i9inb6e4m1n582ugaj169nqgbp91g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gmeoj4clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv60vbpbipcijf24i2t95q4raguo7903tt3at72g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gmeoj4clh2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmcaahul3ns6vqbu4jsjggqeb2g793jdhq7rg37g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gmeoj4clh2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za2lgpdc6f1h12ig3nbaj5lb1kdu275tvs1m6v4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gmeoj4clh2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc87bifeesomjk5fiq82jggl61nnd4rqf780r1v0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gmeoj4clh2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrobk86lv59313orgi54nfriepiabt3186focv00_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gmeoj4clh2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqm1sgvubsodqtf7r2ua1rdq3avl7abj65ino8qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5gmeoj4clh2bs)

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: He’s not the frontrunner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
|
---
Friend,

With Donald Trump running for president yet again, we have to make sure we’re mobilized to stop him. This isn’t like his past campaigns—now, Trump is running as the loser, disgraced ex-president who incited a mob attack on the Capitol. He tried to dismantle our democracy. We know the threat he poses. **That’s why Republican Accountability PAC recently commissioned a poll to see how vulnerable Trump might be in a 2024 primary field. And I wanted to share the findings with you.** Trump still has a dedicated base of voters–around 30 percent of the overall GOP primary electorate–that would support him even as an independent candidate against a potential general election matchup between Ron DeSantis and Joe Biden. That number is significant because, as we learned in 2016, you can win the GOP nomination with a plurality, not a majority. Even so, Trump isn’t the clear favorite. In a head-to-head against DeSantis, Trump only garnered 28 percent support compared to DeSantis’ 44 percent. In a crowded primary field, Trump is again bested by DeSantis 28-39. You can see the polling [toplines here](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VW-m-b6YLH0TW3-y4cs98CN0LW5j5c_V4WBr5wMGxfVV3q90_V1-WJV7CgL3cW52Wkx28DxZjJVfd1dj31HqCnVytwPj2FP37sW5Gb17_4NCkTYW1K8CZ04kcS9XW49gcF87yxM2YW5yNP1G9gfQ3YW55HRC31bTTjhW3c6Wqy11Q9MKW1RGWhS22jD9BN3Z1JHbf-CH-N319wxTRyKb9VZ7YsM1sGFBpW3g2qy96YMxppW748Lr38JJP-cN5tB183ZrDtRW410Z7C5sZBPyN4WN0S8Z5Qb-W8SZ2Hm5Jhl42W4_d4cg65Gb0fW8NcZ6N5w_kM1W73zSFN6xJPN9W7YC73P4x1NcPW4nR6wt4Rh8_6W5Sk7527Ww618W57cdz_3Qp1mYW16bRcP75KZ2sW4-VxvW46myY1W2b_s3856LrcQN2xXDkl6ptt337DB1) and [highlights here](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VW-m-b6YLH0TW3-y4cs98CN0LW5j5c_V4WBr5wMGxfSQ5nKv5V3Zsc37CgKNsW7NvMyB20d9KRW8kNWrL7GHl6GW5XsgL827D4PfW4WrZlg3Gbq-LW3XZGK33FxnQCW3BtjMp390-tvW56M5gQ2k9-HlW20R9ts2480PKW74GN7C6kcjyMW83jRj84GWMsRV6Hf0c2HD_m2W7dhb2d2vn06-W1yhBHQ3pW1vFV2sjCl5m6yvcW78bsQh192YwwW517y-X8Y4lBMW5Fxql5439Lm2W16QlWh5PHGjNW2ZLqDn3CrJctN4GJGFslT8w6W2p3MG-8xgW7yW1jNS-j6Bzf1lN14hZxq-R2zDW6K4Dj82Pr1CBW1DbVsT81YTfFF7rZdLWxVrSW46qwy7542qn3W4VFlF813t5N3N8wHbdlgMgBYW40k6Zt9kbRKJN1rhcbVSV4PyVFZjgH30snfd3ldd1).
---
---
Republican Accountability PAC is ready to do everything we can to stop Trump from winning the GOP nomination. I’m excited to share more data and info on our strategy in the weeks and months to come.
##
And I’m counting on you to be in the fight with us.
##
Sarah Longwell President and Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC

clean_body: | Friend, With Donald Trump running for president yet again, we have to make sure we’re mobilized to stop him. This isn’t like his past campaigns—now, Trump is running as the loser, disgraced ex-president who incited a mob attack on the Capitol. He tried to dismantle our democracy. We know the threat he poses. That’s why Republican Accountability PAC recently commissioned a poll to see how vulnerable Trump might be in a 2024 primary field. And I wanted to share the findings with you. Trump still has a dedicated base of voters–around 30 percent of the overall GOP primary electorate–that would support him even as an independent candidate against a potential general election matchup between Ron DeSantis and Joe Biden. That number is significant because, as we learned in 2016, you can win the GOP nomination with a plurality, not a majority. Even so, Trump isn’t the clear favorite. In a head-to-head against DeSantis, Trump only garnered 28 percent support compared to DeSantis’ 44 percent. In a crowded primary field, Trump is again bested by DeSantis 28-39. You can see the polling and . Republican Accountability PAC is ready to do everything we can to stop Trump from winning the GOP nomination. I’m excited to share more data and info on our strategy in the weeks and months to come. And I’m counting on you to be in the fight with us. Sarah Longwell President and Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC | | Republican Accountability Project, 925 15th Street NW, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ra-pac.org

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlgfnl2gblvmgooqhmeim9qvmtskmd0k5nod3kqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5im0pb3cph2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3qpebri3j7l36tglo094aqqvubgadcvr3f51pcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5im0pb3cph2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfpqcun4ra16uossbop4p7en0ce17urooiu6bm1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5im0pb3cph2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z73nk9024fmkb48b2u47o9jah8p4623t7p90edo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5im0pb3cph2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58222884/390440398/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODcwNWIzZS1mNWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TC0KtrF3tmS494MRIMoaAKQ5_YxqWdm_YSJfqUiTkvU=&emci=950d80e7-e0a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=08705b3e-f5a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7878003)
Team, I wanted to take a moment to thank you for being such an important part of our team. January was a difficult month for many of us, especially in California. Your support this month has made me energized to continue to fight against the plague of gun violence we see in our state and in our country. In January alone, six mass shootings rocked our California community, claiming 46 lives.**Friend, one life lost to gun violence is too many.** My heart goes out to those suffering from the aftermath of these attacks in Goshen, Monterey Park, Half Moon Bay, Oakland, and Beverly Crest. **Congress’s inability to pass meaningful legislation to end the gun violence epidemic is a moral failure, plain and clear. I have made it my personal mission to hold my colleagues accountable to our communities.** I’m going into February feeling energized by your support, team, and I am recommitting to my promise that I will always make addressing gun violence a top priority. Thank you again for your support. – Eric
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58222885/390440399/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODcwNWIzZS1mNWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TC0KtrF3tmS494MRIMoaAKQ5_YxqWdm_YSJfqUiTkvU=&emci=950d80e7-e0a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=08705b3e-f5a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7878003)

name: Jim Renacci
subject: Join SOS Ohio, OFAN and OSBCC for a Special Zoom Meeting
body:
We are uniting to Save our Schools
| |
---
Did you know according to at least one study, Ohio schools rank 34th in the nation? Are you tired of hearing about tax-payer funded public schools too often ignoring actual academics like english, math, science and history, and instead focusing on teaching Critical Race Theory, The 1619 Project, gender identity ideology, social emotional learning (SEL) and more? Do you support keeping boys and girls bathrooms for biological boys and girls respectively, as well as maintaining boys and girls sports, as just that, for boys and girls who were born that way?
If your answer is 'Yes' to these questions, then I invite you to learn more about an initiative which will help put sanity back into our schools.

name: 4Patriotis
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl4mf11prgj42reds7p7jotfkhqgelo566d7suso_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5im2p34s9h2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfplj10tvltv0ad3r5lv9uhomhnia8411i3pvt58_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5im2p34s9h2bs)**
