name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: Add your voice alongside mine
body:
Their endorsement was important to me, and I want to take this opportunity to tell you about their mission and current work.
| | |
---
Derek,
The Council for a Livable World endorsed my campaign in this past election cycle. Their endorsement was important to me, and I want to take this opportunity to tell you about their mission and current work.
The Council’s chief goal is to reduce and eventually eliminate the threat posed by nuclear weapons. In pursuit of that goal, the Council helps elect candidates who support their mission and then supports those members once in Congress. This includes pushing for diplomacy-first foreign policy, nuclear arms control, and commonsense defense spending in order to create a more livable world.
They are circulating a petition to President Biden calling for continued negotiations for arms control agreements in the future. The war in Ukraine has once again made the threat caused by nuclear weapons all too clear. In this context, continuing negotiations with other nuclear-armed states is essential even when it seems difficult.
**[Would you add your name to the petition to show your support for continued efforts to increase arms control agreements and prevent a new nuclear arms race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58208642/390390707/-136693048?code=jtk787-ot-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGVkY2E3Mi1kM2EzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTkg75iYXJ6zuIGAnu-cko09baNg1FUPKfg-o9Je5HI=&emci=18c5ecf7-ee98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a4edca72-d3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485)**
The Council raised almost $1 million for 38 endorsed candidates this cycle. They will support newly elected candidates in the 118th Congress to advance these policy goals.
Organizations that combine strategic election interventions with a thoughtful approach and important insight are key to making an impact in the Washington policy conversation.
**[In addition to the petition, please consider joining their supporter list or making a financial contribution to their important work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58208643/390390709/-1990905992?code=jtk787-ot-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGVkY2E3Mi1kM2EzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTkg75iYXJ6zuIGAnu-cko09baNg1FUPKfg-o9Je5HI=&emci=18c5ecf7-ee98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a4edca72-d3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485)**
Sincerely,

Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333
United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58208645/390390711/-1727112621?code=jtk787-ot-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGVkY2E3Mi1kM2EzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTkg75iYXJ6zuIGAnu-cko09baNg1FUPKfg-o9Je5HI=&emci=18c5ecf7-ee98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a4edca72-d3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485). name: Ilhan Omar
subject: I was just removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee
body:
#
Kevin McCarthy kept his word, Peter.
**After 4 proud years of service, I was just removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee.**
I want to be perfectly clear: This political stunt is a personal one — the result of years of xenophobic, Islamophobic, and racist attacks that started the moment I was elected.
The far-right have spent millions of dollars in campaign ads against our movement stoking fear and division, and a constant stream of hateful and violent rhetoric has led to hundreds of death threats against me and my family.
Now, in their latest move, they've attempted to silence my voice and begin undoing the incredible progress our movement has helped make both at home and abroad.
I'm here to tell you that's not going to happen.
**My commitment to justice for all people across the globe — no matter their race, religion, nationality, or anything else — does not begin or end with a committee assignment.**
The simple truth is that McCarthy's actions to remove me from the Foreign Affairs Committee do absolutely nothing to address the issues our constituents deal with at home, or to promote the well-being of people around the world.
What it does is further enable his party's hatred and corruption, and promote fear and violence against Somali-Americans, Muslims, immigrants, and anyone else who shares my identity all across the country.
We already know that these attacks are just beginning, which is why it's so important that our progressive movement stays united, and is ready and able to fight back. So please:
[**Will you split a contribution — of $3 or any amount you can — between our campaign and Justice Democrats so we have the resources required to stand up to Kevin McCarthy and his far-right Republican allies? I would not ask if your support were not so important to our success.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126103?refcode=em20230203-27365&t=1&akid=27365%2E1203867%2E3X30fD)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126103?refcode=em20230203-27365&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=27365%2E1203867%2E3X30fD)**
Nobody — not Kevin McCarthy, not the Republican Party, not the billionaires who fund them — will ever stop me in my fight for a more equitable, just, and peaceful world.
From tirelessly advocating for policies like a Green New Deal and Medicare for All at home, to standing up against violence and injustice worldwide, I promise that nothing will stand in the way of me doing what the people of Minnesota's 5th district elected me to do.
Thank you, as always, for being a part of our fight.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=21&akid=27365%2E1203867%2E3X30fD) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=22&akid=27365%2E1203867%2E3X30fD) and your state public health department.
---

clean_body: Kevin McCarthy kept his word, Peter. After 4 proud years of service, I was just removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee. I want to be perfectly clear: This political stunt is a personal one — the result of years of xenophobic, Islamophobic, and racist attacks that started the moment I was elected. The far-right have spent millions of dollars in campaign ads against our movement stoking fear and division, and a constant stream of hateful and violent rhetoric has led to hundreds of death threats against me and my family. Now, in their latest move, they've attempted to silence my voice and begin undoing the incredible progress our movement has helped make both at home and abroad. I'm here to tell you that's not going to happen. My commitment to justice for all people across the globe — no matter their race, religion, nationality, or anything else — does not begin or end with a committee assignment. The simple truth is that McCarthy's actions to remove me from the Foreign Affairs Committee do absolutely nothing to address the issues our constituents deal with at home, or to promote the well-being of people around the world. What it does is further enable his party's hatred and corruption, and promote fear and violence against Somali-Americans, Muslims, immigrants, and anyone else who shares my identity all across the country. We already know that these attacks are just beginning, which is why it's so important that our progressive movement stays united, and is ready and able to fight back. So please: Nobody — not Kevin McCarthy, not the Republican Party, not the billionaires who fund them — will ever stop me in my fight for a more equitable, just, and peaceful world. From tirelessly advocating for policies like a Green New Deal and Medicare for All at home, to standing up against violence and injustice worldwide, I promise that nothing will stand in the way of me doing what the people of Minnesota's 5th district elected me to do. Thank you, as always, for being a part of our fight. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the and your state public health department. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources. JusticeDemocrats.com 10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932 Email us: mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Vernon Robinson
subject: Sad News
body:
Tara was diagnosed with Stage 4 Metastatic Breast Cancer... | | Dear Peter, As one of the _National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee 's_ original supporters, I thought you might remember Tara Nolan. |
---
Tara was the Arizona State Director for the Committee. As a volunteer for the Draft Committee not only did she give mounds of time and energy in Arizona on behalf of her passion for the future of this country and Dr. Carson, she helped the Committee in its efforts nationwide by recruiting the Texas and Alabama Directors. Frankly, without Tara, we would not have been so successful in recruiting thousands of volunteers across America to work on behalf of drafting Ben Carson for president.
Sadly, in December of 2020, **Tara was diagnosed with Stage 4 Metastatic Breast Cancer** and has undergone multiple surgeries including a mastectomy, lymph nodes removal, etc., and 25 rounds of radiation. She is currently undergoing chemotherapy and a host of naturopathic/homeopathic treatments at a new intensive treatment center. Since 2021, **Tara has spent over $160,000.00 in medical bills** , however, the expenses are now too costly for her bear alone. Now she's faced with having to pay $35,000 a month in medical expenses (not covered by insurance) over the months to come.
Her family has set up a website called "The Tara J. Nolan Cancer Warrior Fund" on her behalf **and gifts are tax-deductible**.
| [Click here to give Tara a tax-deductible gift of support.](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=140553949&msgid=1194007&act=24CB&c=632087&pid=30973206&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fgivetaxfree.org%2Fcampaigns%2Ftara-nolan-fund%2F%3Fupdated%3Dtrue&cf=48787&v=f59ce719499a44a4af289fb9032d79b28f578859ab98021b3b2915cf0a4705f6)
---
In my work, I came to respect Tara's passion and commitment to the cause as well as her generosity and faith. I hope that you'll join with me in showing Tara the support and love she deserves by doing two things today:
* Please pray for Tara's recovery
* Donate to help Tara continue her fight and ease her financial burden and to let her know you care about her and are sending her some morale lifting and spiritual support. It's well known that boosting someone's spirits helps them heal! You can make your tax-deductible gift by clicking this link: **[https://givetaxfree.org/campaigns/tara-nolan-fund/?updated=true](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=140553949&msgid=1194007&act=24CB&c=632087&pid=30973206&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fgivetaxfree.org%2Fcampaigns%2Ftara-nolan-fund%2F%3Fupdated%3Dtrue&cf=48787&v=f59ce719499a44a4af289fb9032d79b28f578859ab98021b3b2915cf0a4705f6)**

Thank you for considering my request.
Urgently yours,
Vernon Robinson
Former Executive Director of _the_
National Draft Ben Carson For President Committee
| [DONATE TO TARA](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=140553949&msgid=1194007&act=24CB&c=632087&pid=30973206&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fgivetaxfree.org%2Fcampaigns%2Ftara-nolan-fund%2F%3Fupdated%3Dtrue&cf=48787&v=f59ce719499a44a4af289fb9032d79b28f578859ab98021b3b2915cf0a4705f6)
---

Vernon Robinson

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58209352/390393049/-705510546?sourceid=1048572&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDRjNTVkZS1kM2EzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nRY6kzeFTNKg0DZ_VQSzK6sNEc65NZysOD-GE6wpFjk=&emci=ab158f6a-72a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=e04c55de-d3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Peter, here at EMILY's List, there's no such thing as an "off year."

With the future of reproductive freedom at stake in a post-_Roe v. Wade_ America, we're hard at work each and every day to recruit, train, and support Democratic pro-choice candidates across the country who will fight their hearts out for our fundamental rights. This month, that means:
* Making sure Jennifer McClellan wins her special election on Feb. 21 and becomes the first Black woman to represent Virginia in Congress
* Reelecting pro-choice mayors in 2️⃣ key races
* Rolling out our first slate of endorsements for upcoming elections in 2023 and 2024
* Launching our 2023 Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award nominations, to celebrate extraordinary women serving in state or local office who courageously, tirelessly, and effectively galvanize change in their community

With so many incredible women facing the fight of their lives at the ballot box over the next year and a half, we're counting on this community to step up with the support our candidates rely on – especially at this vital early point in the cycle. Anti-choice special interests are ready to pour millions into these races at the drop of a hat, so we don't have time to waste.

That's why we're asking you directly, Peter: **Can Democratic pro-choice women count on you to make a donation today to help them build winning campaigns, defeat anti-choice Republicans, and defend our reproductive rights?**

Friend,

It's official. I'm making a special announcement in 12 days.

The survival of America matters. That's why I've never stopped standing for America, and I never will. America is the greatest force for good in human history, and we should never be ashamed to say that.

body:

body:
We only have four days until President Biden’s State of the Union address. He’ll highlight everything we’ve accomplished, and everything we plan on continuing to fight for -- together. | | |
---
Peter, can you believe it’s already February? Time flies when you’re supporting Democrats who deliver for working families! We only have four days until President Biden’s State of the Union address, and we hope you’re getting excited. He’ll highlight everything we’ve accomplished, and everything we plan on continuing to fight for -- together. **Ahead of Tuesday’s speech, take a few moments to read through your weekly look into what President Biden and Democrats have been up to:**

* * *
**THE BIPARTISAN INFRASTRUCTURE LAW IN ACTION** President Biden has been on the road this week promoting the incredible improvements that the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law is bringing to America’s communities. On Monday, President Biden announced that the 150-year-old Baltimore and Potomac Tunnel will be fully replaced and renamed the Frederick Douglass Tunnel. You may be wondering, _“What does a tunnel replacement have to do with me?”_ Well, if you ever find yourself traveling through the Frederick Douglass Tunnel, you’ll be experiencing lower commute times and increased safety and reliability. On top of all of this, 30,000 good-paying jobs will be created through this project. This is real meaningful change -- and it’s happening not just in Baltimore, but in communities nationwide. **Know anyone who might be interested in learning more about this project or just want to spread the good news of the incredible change that President Biden and Democrats are bringing to America’s infrastructure? Read our post below and share it with your networks here:**
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiK-U05OjrKJzs46jM8xRDCGLN1Vq2y-OxPYKtcyDlRzBv-VGYgrxb1xTAaJmwZqQGDL1Nt-mrCpmIVJKE8zzQLfFMq_eJYEHNdUvlM9ymaq1M_wyCwwSC1VQjyh7No59Lr5aGliSHH6WQGTmRMmW-HX0FFzlt66zjpw0dc36P9QX0uj-oE2v86gezsKTa2UIEPneX-0xLlBZqOlx9tu2dXpHoxTUgYaWEzFGcKUtWF1MvUq1I9CYABzDodM914azYZZhb9d3W-vW6dF3UTCOmoWxWj0X42vGVu85zSQglqtyYOE1bzoTkxMrcflbP2xW8E9RJpvDqFKE9JcGc4BjcCPfIxYJSw6p15eQ_lK0ufubVPz3qOw6m0YKSm4GkQSOw9w4DG2lVrYD_mxke0kHvyNwQz8Kf75Joye7BbIWxPUvRfbUbg-b_PYksaCGVRWjGI/3te/EyT-_ABkQMumqSbs4VlMCw/h0/pdXvBEx9VOxF3n1V85vakzv3fARsNZcQZqkEzFX0Lzc)

---

* * *
**THIS AIN’T YOUR FATHER’S REPUBLICAN PARTY**
Peter, the Republican Party’s MAGA agenda is too extreme, and their first few weeks in the House have shown that.
In exchange for the speaker’s gavel, Kevin McCarthy is rewarding extreme MAGA Republicans with chairmanships and plum posts on key committees that could pass extreme legislation. Already, the GOP is making moves to introduce bills to help the wealthy cheat on their taxes, hike taxes on the middle class, and block actions to lower prices.
This is what we’re up against: GOP proposals to cut taxes for the ultra-wealthy and big corporations, to put a 30% national sales tax on the goods you buy, and to jeopardize programs like Social Security and Medicare.**_Yes, really._**
Meanwhile, Democrats have actually passed legislation to rebuild the middle class, make the ultra-wealthy and corporations pay their fair share, and lower health care costs.
President Biden said it best:

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPht3Gj7XYTWIWoNpaqMpiaMkCzoqhM-LGXz118xoYpNwHLg6jV-vHjytT-12AIuDsgArrDjVoRqhneAYZHL6ampJ7SGc-VC0kdgeWeV8oawrkGThZWdRvhaFLaWBfzh8H6MFJaFzT7Ih9x3fVMgzOwr66me5S_euql7l1ReaQwiqsiN2Wwju5ov9Ckju6_wb4DRLOZR6tR0Jy16wkr0KjWuRrTbErJ98EhwW-4vsXEzEHi30zvxDnobtalTXKhHJAfGrOaVi8NLYPsm5M4Jr77uAzCUWvaAGoILO2xWrIpsWb4xztg62-1USr1LlMzqgO_qlVjyyqYXDk0OXh6HgclmQwZJglFWC1pAS31euZ1TFu0lQ7htiiMnosP7NLrE4cqFbS8SSdKOmZxZtkCgFLwn43rTgTPo0aLg7AMDcE0Z5CC3fqKggPraR56JCWe_E5vqDuAOKRgQF-X_o6utqFRbsGHYd8fl0KmDGj4ZJFhbuh/3te/EyT-_ABkQMumqSbs4VlMCw/h2/6i5bSCrnXmx-NnoL5DEPW0Ol1Xf7-FLadTeW3ucNr8k)

* * *
**IN STOCK: PUB GLASS**
Good news, Peter! Our popular pub glasses are back in stock, and we want to make sure you have a chance to snatch yours while they’re still available.
Our pub glasses are the perfect addition to your kitchen and a great way to sip in style while celebrating the successes of Democrats across the nation.

clean_body: We only have four days until President Biden’s State of the Union address. He’ll highlight everything we’ve accomplished, and everything we plan on continuing to fight for -- together. | | | Peter, can you believe it’s already February? Time flies when you’re supporting Democrats who deliver for working families! We only have four days until President Biden’s State of the Union address, and we hope you’re getting excited. He’ll highlight everything we’ve accomplished, and everything we plan on continuing to fight for -- together. Ahead of Tuesday’s speech, take a few moments to read through your weekly look into what President Biden and Democrats have been up to: THE BIPARTISAN INFRASTRUCTURE LAW IN ACTION President Biden has been on the road this week promoting the incredible improvements that the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law is bringing to America’s communities. On Monday, President Biden announced that the 150-year-old Baltimore and Potomac Tunnel will be fully replaced and renamed the Frederick Douglass Tunnel. You may be wondering, “What does a tunnel replacement have to do with me?” Well, if you ever find yourself traveling through the Frederick Douglass Tunnel, you’ll be experiencing lower commute times and increased safety and reliability. On top of all of this, 30,000 good-paying jobs will be created through this project. This is real meaningful change -- and it’s happening not just in Baltimore, but in communities nationwide. Know anyone who might be interested in learning more about this project or just want to spread the good news of the incredible change that President Biden and Democrats are bringing to America’s infrastructure? Read our post below and share it with your networks here: | | | THIS AIN’T YOUR FATHER’S REPUBLICAN PARTY Peter, the Republican Party’s MAGA agenda is too extreme, and their first few weeks in the House have shown that. In exchange for the speaker’s gavel, Kevin McCarthy is rewarding extreme MAGA Republicans with chairmanships and plum posts on key committees that could pass extreme legislation. Already, the GOP is making moves to introduce bills to help the wealthy cheat on their taxes, hike taxes on the middle class, and block actions to lower prices. This is what we’re up against: GOP proposals to cut taxes for the ultra-wealthy and big corporations, to put a 30% national sales tax on the goods you buy, and to jeopardize programs like Social Security and Medicare.Yes, really. Meanwhile, Democrats have actually passed legislation to rebuild the middle class, make the ultra-wealthy and corporations pay their fair share, and lower health care costs. President Biden said it best: | | IN STOCK: PUB GLASS Good news, Peter! Our popular pub glasses are back in stock, and we want to make sure you have a chance to snatch yours while they’re still available. Our pub glasses are the perfect addition to your kitchen and a great way to sip in style while celebrating the successes of Democrats across the nation. | | WHY DONATE AHEAD OF THE STATE OF THE UNION? With President Biden’s State of the Union address just four days away, President Biden, Vice President Harris, and Democrats across the country are relying on the strength of our team. A donation from you will help elect Democrats who will fight for the agenda that President Biden will speak about in his address to Congress. A contribution will also be a sign that you support the work that he and dedicated Democrats are doing to improve all of our lives and build a better nation. Until next week, Team Joe | |

It's official, Peter. **I’ve been assigned to serve on two key committees during the 118th Congress – the House Committee on Agriculture and the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.** Both posts offer incredible opportunities to make progress here in Illinois’ 17th District and across the country. As you probably know, House committees dictate the content of bills before they’re presented to the House for a full vote. That means I’ll have a strong voice on legislation related to agriculture and on a broad range of science and technology issues -- including our country’s renewable energy policies.
* **On the Agriculture Committee:** I’ll prioritize the needs of Illinois farmers – who are not just an engine for our local economies but a key source for the food our residents put on the table. In the coming months, this committee will be putting forward a new Farm Bill, which will have big implications in how we protect our farm families, secure SNAP funding, and advance new rural development.

* **On the Science, Space, and Technology Committee:** As the only meteorologist in Congress, I’m eager to use my expertise on global warming and severe weather to guide our policies on climate change. That means fighting for renewable energy projects in our district and reducing our carbon footprint.

Progress on these issues is what Middle America cares about and needs from their representative. It’s also key to our broader efforts of winning back the rust belt. **I’m excited to work, but to stay in a position to make a long-term difference on the issues I’ve discussed here, I’ll need to win re-election in 2024. That’s where you come in:** **[Will you chip in $5 to help me defend this seat so I can continue fighting for our shared values in Congress?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqA0WItqqJyJPc6AGRosYvZFloqVme5QITPAksAsUeKn_QsgAFmwILw2MgqajeGoz3-luEYdOUNTUXT8L9y0E6wJevv-BUawNHzJN-FzTT4ejEIRBeJ42YD80VJSIu3cWZ-2lxdQmcdkmb3atoa_OjDdis47GtAiZfEJTZZpvc6-hGHPss3tGAxhyaouXpyn4r3cqUdPCUjmdEPIDSgF04G-QTPWpyPzDMQvMvuBYc11_bh_tqb3XM6oSdLc1th_gmdhgzw4nSL8EeozvGtEMpLglPR4u8pe8esnlaTLXPYnwh_Q6gEY88lDPkxa-n3KOZ7D1Mr_NMEPSQ4XQsNkwdKspipxqvMMXMj7CYDExRd9P5NFauZsJSNae-jwbPZh282YrFJCJDp2LvIOHkYBFfWkHvfXwzfvRhgTEY0jZAcE0Y/3te/BSVTzNNqT4-lSuaqtqyYWA/h1/69d75wqSP7tlbFS6EeiBAGYZU_LvB8F4BvbsBMc1ojI)**

clean_body: | | It's official, Peter. I’ve been assigned to serve on two key committees during the 118th Congress – the House Committee on Agriculture and the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology. Both posts offer incredible opportunities to make progress here in Illinois’ 17th District and across the country. As you probably know, House committees dictate the content of bills before they’re presented to the House for a full vote. That means I’ll have a strong voice on legislation related to agriculture and on a broad range of science and technology issues -- including our country’s renewable energy policies. On the Agriculture Committee: I’ll prioritize the needs of Illinois farmers – who are not just an engine for our local economies but a key source for the food our residents put on the table. In the coming months, this committee will be putting forward a new Farm Bill, which will have big implications in how we protect our farm families, secure SNAP funding, and advance new rural development. On the Science, Space, and Technology Committee: As the only meteorologist in Congress, I’m eager to use my expertise on global warming and severe weather to guide our policies on climate change. That means fighting for renewable energy projects in our district and reducing our carbon footprint. Progress on these issues is what Middle America cares about and needs from their representative. It’s also key to our broader efforts of winning back the rust belt. I’m excited to work, but to stay in a position to make a long-term difference on the issues I’ve discussed here, I’ll need to win re-election in 2024. That’s where you come in: With gratitude, Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States | | Sent via . name: Add Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: In 2023, Missouri lawmakers are still policing what women in state government are allowed to wear
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Sign the petition: Demand Missouri’s House of Representatives get rid of its sexist new dress code >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T93afe02d-e122-4e28-ac54-95626f02414b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6f44dcb0-2643-4a08-9be9-986d01b48f4a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Legislators in the Missouri House of Representatives recently decided that the best use of their time was to add new rules to their dress code – but only adopting a stricter dress code for women. This sexist dress code requires women to cover their shoulders while in the State House by wearing a blazer, cardigan, or knit blazer. With so many real issues facing the people of Missouri, it’s ridiculous that Missouri lawmakers are choosing to prioritize policing women’s clothing choices. Missouri lawmakers must remove this regressive, sexist law from the house rules and prioritize actual issues that matter. **_[Sign now to demand this new, sexist dress code is stricken from the Missouri House of Representatives rules immediately>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1202d4d0-7fe5-4771-be5b-1feafc27d41f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_**

name: 4Patriots
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkdf72230inmop0rf2squf63sjsic6kfqih3942g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5im6oj2cjh2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6kde11c9lkv6askbigf9c8u4bggj5g07i9drpgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5im6oj2cjh2bs)**

This year is already shaping up to be a momentous year for state and local Democrats – in January, we flipped an ultra-competitive Virginia seat by _less than 700 votes_!

And this month, we can keep that momentum going. There are crucial special elections to win in New Hampshire and Pennsylvania that could slash Republican majorities dramatically. **If we win these races, we could be able to stop Republicans from passing extreme legislation, like abortion bans or voter suppression bills.**
****
Building power at the state and local level requires a dedicated, ongoing commitment even when the national spotlight is focused elsewhere. That’s what our DLCC members do. Together, this is a chance to show the strength of this movement – and make it clear that the momentum is on our side.
[What do you say? Fellow American, Are you being heard? 2023 has already been full of performative politics, lies, and division in Washington, D.C. Our voices are being drowned out by the chaos. _**An America United**_ wants to ensure that your voice is heard above the noise created by cheap political actors and their rhetoric. name: VoteVets
subject: “A woke military that can’t fight or win”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
No matter what happens in this election cycle, one thing will always be true:
#
Derek -
No matter what happens in this election cycle, one thing will always be true:
**No one — absolutely no one — will fight harder to hold Donald Trump and the Republican Party accountable for their disdain for Veterans and Military families.**
It wasn’t enough that Trump called people who sign-up to serve “suckers and losers.” This week, he doubled down, saying, “We have a woke military that can’t fight or win”
And who will ever forget his attack on Gold Star families like Khizr and Ghazala Khan, or saying of John McCain that he “preferred war heroes who weren’t captured.”
But it’s not just him.
Marjorie Taylor Greene said enlisting is like “throwing your life away.”
Kevin McCarthy, Elise Stefanik, Josh Hawley and more... attacking the military and those who serve is a mainstream position of the Republican Party.
It used to be that most people thought “Veteran” was synonymous with “conservative.”
Not anymore.
Because of the work we’ve done, we’re flipping that narrative on its head, we’re turning out Veterans and Military families for Democrats, and we’re elevating the voices of Veterans in some of the most powerful ads.
But we cannot do it alone. So please:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to VoteVets today? We will put it right to work elevating the voices of Veterans to hold Republicans accountable for their attacks on those who serve.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb23.2sWM73&refcode=em230203-1-15&t=1&akid=7326%2E3013755%2Eug8Myb)

subject: The Chinese Balloon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Border Security PAC
body:
| | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=29d3c0c1b9&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter,Joe Biden’s inability to protect our border is not just on land - but even in the air. Right now, as we speak, there is a Chinese spy balloon floating through the United States.Yes, really.And it gets worse.U.S. officials have acknowledged they were monitoring this balloon since it flew over the Aleutian Islands – where it could have easily been shot down over water. This balloon should have never been allowed to enter US airspace... but it was.The CCP has proven time and again that they are our enemy. This brazen violation of sovereign US air space mere days before Secretary Blinken was scheduled to travel to China only reiterates that point.Joe Biden is too beholden to China to do anything about this - but we MUST ensure that we have people willing to fight back!
My name is Irene Armendariz-Jackson, a lifelong resident of El Paso. We have our own issue with border sovereignty here... but it’s one of a land border rather than an air border.We’ve had over 5,000,000 illegals enter America and traverse through our nation. Many of these people have been found to be on the terror watch list.We have no borders - we have no nation.
| [CLICK HERE: SUPPORT A SECURE BORDER TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=26818863f4&e=fdefed58de)
---
I want to show the establishments of BOTH parties that if they don’t secure our borders, we will defeat them. **And that’s where you come in.** The only language these people understand is money, so we need to speak what they understand. That’s why I’m asking you for **your donatio** n today. We want to be able to say that we have an organization supported by THOUSANDS of like-minded patriots who will NOT support any campaign without a plan to stop the invasion.So, whether it was $5.00 or $500, we need your support today. There is power in numbers. There is no organization like ours. We can do this, but you’re going to have to help us. **Click below and let’s stop the invasion of America - whether by illegals or by the CCP.****Stand with me so when the 2024 elections roll around, we have a massive war chest ready to pump into campaigns that will SUPPORT OUR SOVEREIGNTY AS A NATION!**
| [DONATE $5.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4dc6579aed&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $15.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f6b18b9c2e&e=fdefed58de)
---

| [DONATE ANYTHING](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=aedba21e99&e=fdefed58de)

The very existence of America depends on our success. Let’s make sure that we handle this now before it’s too late... and honestly, it really is almost too late.Sincerely,Irene Armendariz-Jackson

This balloon should have never been allowed to enter US airspace... but it was.The CCP has proven time and again that they are our enemy. This brazen violation of sovereign US air space mere days before Secretary Blinken was scheduled to travel to China only reiterates that point.Joe Biden is too beholden to China to do anything about this - but we MUST ensure that we have people willing to fight back! My name is Irene Armendariz-Jackson, a lifelong resident of El Paso. We have our own issue with border sovereignty here... but it’s one of a land border rather than an air border.We’ve had over 5,000,000 illegals enter America and traverse through our nation. Many of these people have been found to be on the terror watch list.We have no borders - we have no nation. | I want to show the establishments of BOTH parties that if they don’t secure our borders, we will defeat them. And that’s where you come in. The only language these people understand is money, so we need to speak what they understand. That’s why I’m asking you for your donatio n today. We want to be able to say that we have an organization supported by THOUSANDS of like-minded patriots who will NOT support any campaign without a plan to stop the invasion.So, whether it was $5.00 or $500, we need your support today. There is power in numbers. There is no organization like ours. We can do this, but you’re going to have to help us. Click below and let’s stop the invasion of America - whether by illegals or by the CCP.Stand with me so when the 2024 elections roll around, we have a massive war chest ready to pump into campaigns that will SUPPORT OUR SOVEREIGNTY AS A NATION! | | | | | | The very existence of America depends on our success. Let’s make sure that we handle this now before it’s too late... and honestly, it really is almost too late.Sincerely,Irene Armendariz-Jackson | Paid for by Border Security PAC | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2023 American Conservatives United. All rights reserved.

name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: A Stark Reminder

body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
|
---
# _A Stark Reminder_
---
---
Yesterday, the U.S. House of Representatives took up [House Concurrent Resolution 9](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/98757cde8613b210/5bcba351b12f3afdc3d6b838967d376c/40313), a resolution that condemns "the horrors of socialism" while noting that the ideology "necessitates a concentration of power that has time and time again collapsed into Communist regimes, totalitarian rule, and brutal dictatorships." It should have been a unanimous vote. But with today's Democrat Party, of course, it wasn't. Eighty-six Democrats, _including Indiana's own André Carson_ , voted against it, while another 14 were too afraid to take a stand, and voted "present." That should concern all of us and should serve as a stark reminder of what our fight is all about. The deadly and destructive ideology stands in direct contrast to the founding ideals of our country — ideals such as freedom, opportunity, and capitalism. As a party, we have championed those ideals. And now, it's more clear than ever that we must continue to defend them or risk losing them forever. That's why we need you to get involved — to help us continue to elect Republicans that will stand up for ideals and fight for future generations to live in a nation that's prosperous, not one destroyed by the evils of socialism. Enjoy this week's newsletter and share it with a friend. Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| |
# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# _Building an Ecosystem of Talent_
---
| |
---
_Governor Eric Holcomb chats with YMCA Youth Governor Calleigh Neal about leadership earlier this week._
---
This week, **Governor Eric Holcomb** , joined the Brookings Institution's "Vying for Talent" [podcast](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/98757cde8613b210/e6fab81cabd9e12fc3d6b838967d376c/40313) to discuss how the United States can “get regional” about building competitive talent ecosystems and what Indiana's education and workforce initiatives have done to cultivate human capital and innovation. _"And so that that means you have to have, in my opinion, a very attractive tax and regulatory environment. The math has to work for someone to grow and to be able to prosper and to pass that on. And so that means low cost. That means the economic climate has to be one that presents certainty and predictability and stability. And in this case, in Indiana's case, continuity, I would argue. And a growing GDP, a growing population.
_ _"So, that's kind of first and foremost in the terms of how we sell our state to attract and grow a workforce and always leaning in to the future, always looking out around the corner, and through policy, trying to address those things each and every year."_ — **Gov. Holcomb** The podcast runs for 42 minutes and can be listened to **[here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/98757cde8613b210/664ceee62307c991c3d6b838967d376c/40313)**. _"I think it really was refreshing to talk to a state level leader because they are accountable for the results in their state and it clearly showed. And listening to the governor talk about all the efforts that Indiana is undertaking to attract talent, it doesn't surprise me that Forbes has ranked Indiana the top state to start a business."_ — **Ryan Hass,** Vying for Talent co-host
---
|
---

[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/98757cde8613b210/ba0429edf612825fc3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
We’re not letting up for a moment to elect Republicans up and down the ballot across Indiana. Our strong and united Indiana Republican Party got the job done to keep our great state **dark red** on November 8, 2022, and now is the time to prepare for the fights ahead. You can help us do just that by [signing up for a digital membership](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/98757cde8613b210/99b4e9f6bd76387bc3d6b838967d376c/40313) —you’ll receive a membership card in the mail and be an official part of our team of digital supporters that’s helping us keep Indiana a Republican stronghold.

# _Fox News: Biden touts electric vehicle tax credits with picture of him in luxury Hummer that doesn't even qualify_
---
**Ope.** From [Fox News](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/98757cde8613b210/764c522e84c3e211c3d6b838967d376c/40313): President Biden took to Twitter on Monday to promote his electric vehicle tax credit. However, while doing so, he attached a picture of himself in one that doesn't even qualify for it. "On my watch, the great American road trip is going to be fully electrified," Biden tweeted, with a picture of him in a GMC Hummer EV that ranges in cost from $87,000 to nearly $110,000 depending on the model. "And now, through a tax credit, you can get up to $7,500 on a new electric vehicle," he continued. The Hummer EV is not eligible for the credit since SUVs and trucks must not exceed a manufacturer's suggested retail price of $80,000, according to the Internal Revenue Service. _Story continues._ **And don't forget:** Families making up to $300,000 qualify for the tax credit that President Biden attempted to promote — made possible by the Democrats' decision to supersize the IRS and increase taxes and audits on lower earners with the so-called Inflation Reduction Act.
---
| | |
---
# _Bills Continue to Move at the Statehouse_
---
Bills continue to move out of committees and some have already passed one chamber of the general assembly at the statehouse. Two of the Indiana House Republicans' [priority bills](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/98757cde8613b210/3513615b5d7ceca2c3d6b838967d376c/40313), [HB 1006](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/98757cde8613b210/a64130b2a112a9d9c3d6b838967d376c/40313) and [HB 1007](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/98757cde8613b210/00f3d24f11f2fdf5c3d6b838967d376c/40313), recently passed the chamber and will now be considered in the Senate. HB 1006 ensures people experiencing mental health crises get treatment in local hospitals, not prisons or jails, while HB 1007 sets forth a new five-pillar energy policy for the state. One of the Indiana Senate Republicans' priority bills, [SJR 1,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/98757cde8613b210/784527d2fee072efc3d6b838967d376c/40313) recently passed the chamber and will now be considered in the House. SJR 1 would allow judges to deny bail to anyone that they believe poses a "substantial risk to the public" based on "strong" evidence. To stay up-to-date, visit [iga.in.gov](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/98757cde8613b210/e1b40c7de52a4312c3d6b838967d376c/40313) and check back here next week.
---
|
---
# _Hoosier Ag Today: Congressmen Greg Pence, Rudy Yakym Push USDA, USTR to Seek Enforcement Action Against Mexico for GMO Corn Ban_
---
From [Hoosier Ag Today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/98757cde8613b210/c5e544501e21ca81c3d6b838967d376c/40313): Now that Mexico’s ban on importing GMO corn is a year away from taking effect, two of Indiana’s congressmen have written a letter – shared exclusively with Hoosier Ag Today – pushing ag trade officials in the Biden administration to take the next step against Mexico to stop it. **Congressman Greg Pence** , who represents Indiana’s 6th Congressional District, and **Congressman Yakym** [**have written a letter**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/98757cde8613b210/79f235db21f78a90c3d6b838967d376c/40313) to the two top agriculture trade officials in the Biden administration asking them to step up their pressure on getting Mexico to overturn their planned ban on U.S. corn imports that are genetically modified or grown with glyphosate. That letter has also been co-signed by Indiana’s Republican **Representatives** **Banks, Baird, Bucshon, Houchin and Spartz**. _Story continues._
---
|
---

Do you know a college students that's interested in stepping into the world of Hoosier politics, **we've got them covered**. We're looking for young, talented Hoosiers to join us at our headquarters in Indianapolis. This opportunity allows them to get hands-on experience working for Indiana's largest and most successful political organization, providing administrative support to staff and taking on special projects (and more) while helping build their resume, gain insight into the political and legislative processes, and make valuable connections. And we'll do this all while helping them earn college credit. **Have someone in mind? Send them to[this link](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/98757cde8613b210/c15ddd1784394923c3d6b838967d376c/40313) for more information and to apply!**

One of the Indiana Senate Republicans' priority bills, recently passed the chamber and will now be considered in the House. SJR 1 would allow judges to deny bail to anyone that they believe poses a "substantial risk to the public" based on "strong" evidence. To stay up-to-date, visit and check back here next week. | Hoosier Ag Today: Congressmen Greg Pence, Rudy Yakym Push USDA, USTR to Seek Enforcement Action Against Mexico for GMO Corn Ban From : Now that Mexico’s ban on importing GMO corn is a year away from taking effect, two of Indiana’s congressmen have written a letter – shared exclusively with Hoosier Ag Today – pushing ag trade officials in the Biden administration to take the next step against Mexico to stop it. Congressman Greg Pence , who represents Indiana’s 6th Congressional District, and Congressman Yakym to the two top agriculture trade officials in the Biden administration asking them to step up their pressure on getting Mexico to overturn their planned ban on U.S. corn imports that are genetically modified or grown with glyphosate. That letter has also been co-signed by Indiana’s Republican Representatives Banks, Baird, Bucshon, Houchin and Spartz. The 2024 elections give Republicans the chance to make major gains in the U.S. Senate. But I’m humble enough to know that a victory will not just be handed to us... ...we’re going to have to _fight_ for it. But the way to win isn’t to listen to a bunch of consultants out here in the Washington swamp. Rather, the path to victory is by turning to the voters themselves to ensure that we’re fighting for YOUR interests. body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | **$31 TRILLION DOLLARS. **

It’s too much money for us to even imagine - but our national debt is even _higher_ than that.

When American families have debt, they make tough choices.

They cut back on spending, pinch pennies, and save until their debts are paid.

_But why can’t the federal government use the same common sense?_

**Instead of paying down our debt, Democrats want to borrow even MORE money - raising our debt and YOUR tax burden.**

**If you’re ready for some common-sense saving to pay down our debt,[join me today and say NO to the radical Left’s out-of-control spending. ](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=5abeadaad61c44f9bfbf352c347149dd&_e=-y2qv7faOvxJPSG47gqemaNJ6ejup9TWu1ZtmKrAZ4UuO3exwXpklEVq0Uq5R1AGRQ_elHAIVALNBNgH4JtAsRM7vUUeNeKCOS0YdKHq7T10_atgckenqmqjOj1-iZDjf49tWadR9g0V8d0Aa8bCwzMyu9vqkKI5mCi3P_Hk8dg-wuSjQ6J9c99EeK08H-9dciwLeheXrcNqkFVksa2tk39DmsLLfy9R2OVhPFKngwBbYhINM-VNlS6OLtDasIS5tr_yYX1mkK-rYborqagAsHZOChhZX67v2WO2vKvyF0V2mgcNK5bKhqanjQ7piF2n-aZlZ2rMhIFD3eh71lI2wP1P82lInAc7Ia2qZbCprzSB1Os3Sw-t5tnfMAkY8HJA)**

| | Peter, it is absolutely ridiculous that we’ve let our debt get to this point.

We’re borrowing billions from enemies like China to fund Democrats’ out-of-control, excessive, useless spending - and now, they want to borrow even **MORE**.

It’s not just dumb - _it’s downright irresponsible_.

American families make cuts every day to pay down their debt. It’s time for the federal government to take a hint from them.

[**Join me today and say NO to ridiculous debt increases!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=5abeadaad61c44f9bfbf352c347149dd&_e=-y2qv7faOvxJPSG47gqemaNJ6ejup9TWu1ZtmKrAZ4UuO3exwXpklEVq0Uq5R1AGRQ_elHAIVALNBNgH4JtAsRM7vUUeNeKCOS0YdKHq7T10_atgckenqmqjOj1-iZDjf49tWadR9g0V8d0Aa8bCwzMyu9vqkKI5mCi3P_Hk8dg-wuSjQ6J9c99EeK08H-9dciwLeheXrcNqkFVksa2tk39DmsLLfy9R2OVhPFKngwB9CAGEe6_NHL9I9BBuQsI-leF160syhZ0ZleEa-Yh1ZxLIvIoikN1wEtwZKZkQYio-aWV7MKWI-1s8cZv5MOPQPFG_uG5t9k8PCS6V9hej_NSTkYHerXBsmAJj7fJlBASxaEpfbi3RJS4a0ffqhmNu)

clean_body: | | | Peter, | | $31 TRILLION DOLLARS. It’s too much money for us to even imagine - but our national debt is even higher than that. When American families have debt, they make tough choices. They cut back on spending, pinch pennies, and save until their debts are paid. But why can’t the federal government use the same common sense? Instead of paying down our debt, Democrats want to borrow even MORE money - raising our debt and YOUR tax burden. If you’re ready for some common-sense saving to pay down our debt, | | Peter, it is absolutely ridiculous that we’ve let our debt get to this point. We’re borrowing billions from enemies like China to fund Democrats’ out-of-control, excessive, useless spending - and now, they want to borrow even MORE. It’s not just dumb - it’s downright irresponsible. American families make cuts every day to pay down their debt. It’s time for the federal government to take a hint from them. Thank you, Rick Scott | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Team, Now that I am officially in Congress representing Oregon’s 6th, it’s time to start looking forward to the challenges ahead. In 2022 we overcame previously insurmountable odds. Thanks to your support, I made history as one of the first Latinas to represent Oregon in Congress. **2022 was our year, team. Now it’s time to take on 2023 with that same energy.** A few days ago my team told you about our [**2023 Founding Donor Fund**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58244079/390463560/-1412762645?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.03_b1_shq_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmMwMmMyNC0wOGE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AeUdwYrTHD7rz2GpSl9pwCF-PW70n1-4CUbY4_CztUw=), which will help support me and the rest of our team during my first year in Congress. I’m ready to take on the toughest challenges facing Oregonians, like defending the right to choose, tackling homelessness, and creating jobs that pay a living wage. **But none of that will be possible without you.** **We’re only keeping our 2023 Founding Donor fund open for a limited time, and I hope that you can join during this pivotal moment for our team.[I need you with me in this fight, which is why I’m asking you to join us as a 2023 Founding Donor by making any contribution to our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58244080/390463561/-1412762645?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.03_b1_shq_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmMwMmMyNC0wOGE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AeUdwYrTHD7rz2GpSl9pwCF-PW70n1-4CUbY4_CztUw=)** | _[Become a Founding Donor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58244081/390463562/-1412762645?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.03_b1_shq_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmMwMmMyNC0wOGE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AeUdwYrTHD7rz2GpSl9pwCF-PW70n1-4CUbY4_CztUw=)_

Friend,

It’s official. I’m making a special announcement in 12 days.

The survival of America matters. That’s why I’ve never stopped standing for America, and I never will. America is the greatest force for good in human history, and we should never be ashamed to say that.

America is the greatest force for good in human history, and we should never be ashamed to say that. Join the State of the Union Watch Party and Response to hear about our vision for a working families agenda in 2023. | | | Peter, **It’s time for a major announcement: The Working Families Party State of the Union Response will be delivered next Tuesday, February 7 by Congresswoman Delia Ramirez!** We’re so honored to have Delia Ramirez — the new Congresswoman from Illinois’s 3rd Congressional District, and the first Latina elected to Congress from the Midwest — share what we’re fighting for this year. **Will you be watching?[Join the State of the Union Watch Party and Response on Tuesday, February 7 at 8:45 PM ET/5:45 PM PT to hear about our vision for a working families agenda in 2023, and how we can change our country for the better once we win back the House.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqEnpyi3VIfNqqfZEtRKis7qGyvfxWVPeh1fLzejH0Ig5Cl7uxuPiw9ImxxcrufkE_FFodmQeDTrhMypGSdY36hNMidiu_ZaTLP50BNTqe_GoZIUUtzYYyuuUqYlcsfXQN3KVjurB0DRvsnzFYDcWowEe18oTHhys9fptmGkepEtv9RXVOh-shX-GOBke59KOUNXjHhnBZtlk3Z_5TJRf1KYiS8MQC6_UozkmDCEqBIvgVNfe91BSAiH_B2Ld6Jc0K/3te/lhoh3Jy2SCq3IO3r7A5WNQ/h0/m7_OwlhWk-HlSYU50OElp6Pw4OuNwXN7JiPn6FaJdr4)** The response will be available for viewing in English and Spanish, and ASL interpretation will also be provided. [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqEnpyi3VIfNqqfZEtRKis7qGyvfxWVPeh1fLzejH0Ig7pp7fhCuIW6pE1M1QI0-6glmdaXtl4vI9fF3Eo5PWsaoQnvFUiIl9q60elNmMyReLkPUqMlMOeEavnxNk9698GbNj9UHyKDiW3ZcOu0R7n7IesFVH0vxRrgbDhtSQLZ07-gnw5BdbaQek-56V3Cuu3te2jxYf6y39CCJOtXwo7RcbTxvzeAOX6tmrfw6cP-D-eNmgaL1A1QAmuxjEr1Qsy/3te/lhoh3Jy2SCq3IO3r7A5WNQ/h1/11LFGJstC0Cv9SIJN5CcrysgumniV4-ElsjhTyuCeMY) **[RSVP for the WFP SOTU Response](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqEnpyi3VIfNqqfZEtRKis7qGyvfxWVPeh1fLzejH0Ig5S2YZPLnwVlhSfFJxybdlZenyt3s3rPqHnw96LxmHOehUlcUxuL6nANVY4Mjj9OA4iIirsiEZbWpad3wKPcu086ZNAu3fblpXGUkPh9vv60rZ_JT3UgAL-72lsu6Fd8lEcNGvcOqp7TGrQbNAe1MIvOi54EWi0EgBW6QVADyB4c2yALMUxvEDPmWNzVo9PRTT3soG5CS7FPZXZosy6AwEl/3te/lhoh3Jy2SCq3IO3r7A5WNQ/h2/m_MoFCi8tSwYdjXld7yHhq5N2znpMKos1cSZNmzFXDg)** **As the daughter of working-class Guatemalan immigrants, the wife of a DACA recipient, and a former director of a homeless shelter, Delia’s lived experiences have shown her how our country can — and must — do better to have working people’s backs.** We can and we must fight like hell in Congress and through executive action to protect and expand the programs that we rely on. We can and we must take a stand for the right to an abortion and other crucial human rights under attack. We can and we must invest in the future of our communities, our country, and our planet. **Last November, we held off a red wave and elected the largest class of progressive representatives yet because voters want a government that works for working people.** But Republican extremists continue to work only for themselves and their wealthy friends and donors. Right now, MAGA Republicans are poised to tank the economy to secure cuts to Social Security, Medicare, and so many other vital programs on which working families rely. To retake the House, win back a true Working Families majority, and build the country of our dreams, Democrats and the Biden administration must fight tooth and nail against Republicans' attacks on working families and deliver on people's material needs. **In the Working Families Party 2023 State of the Union Response, Congresswoman Delia Ramirez will talk about what that work looks like this We’re so honored to have Delia Ramirez — the new Congresswoman from Illinois’s 3rd Congressional District, and the first Latina elected to Congress from the Midwest — share what we’re fighting for this year. Will you be watching? The response will be available for viewing in English and Spanish, and ASL interpretation will also be provided. As the daughter of working-class Guatemalan immigrants, the wife of a DACA recipient, and a former director of a homeless shelter, Delia’s lived experiences have shown her how our country can — and must — do better to have working people’s backs. We can and we must fight like hell in Congress and through executive action to protect and expand the programs that we rely on. We can and we must take a stand for the right to an abortion and other crucial human rights under attack. We can and we must invest in the future of our communities, our country, and our planet. Last November, we held off a red wave and elected the largest class of progressive representatives yet because voters want a government that works for working people. But Republican extremists continue to work only for themselves and their wealthy friends and donors. Right now, MAGA Republicans are poised to tank the economy to secure cuts to Social Security, Medicare, and so many other vital programs on which working families rely. To retake the House, win back a true Working Families majority, and build the country of our dreams, Democrats and the Biden administration must fight tooth and nail against Republicans' attacks on working families and deliver on people's material needs. In the Working Families Party 2023 State of the Union Response, Congresswoman Delia Ramirez will talk about what that work looks like this year, and how together we can win. name: Larry Cohen
subject: It's the rules and not just the rulers that shape our lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
An inside look at our inside strategy.

Hi Peter Willis,

I’m writing to tell you about the major work we’re doing to transform
politics and the Party. The DNC is holding its first full meeting of the
year this weekend, and Our Revolution is ready: mobilizing the growing
block of progressive members to ban dark money from primaries and win
other vital reforms.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8319?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230203_1_1&t=1009&akid=3961%2E5885482%2Ef6oA5E ]Dark money groups are gearing up to fight back, and we need your help.
Join Our Revolution's Transform the Party team by clicking here to commit
$5 a month to fund this critical work!

While Republicans now control the U.S. House, we’re not slowing our
efforts to transform U.S. politics. This includes building progressive
majorities in state-level parties and changing internal rules to ban dark
money in primaries.

The most dramatic gains over the past year can be seen in the growth of
the Congressional Progressive Caucus (CPC). After the 2022 midterms,
thanks to organizing by Our Revolution and our allies, the caucus now
claims an all-time high of 103 members — nearly half of all House
Democrats.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8319?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230203_1_1&t=1010&akid=3961%2E5885482%2Ef6oA5E ]Our Revolution has made significant progress, but with corporate
Democrats having access to unlimited big money, we need to keep pushing.
Can I count on you to donate just $5 a month to become an official member
of our Transform the Party team?

Internal CPC rules reform has helped discipline and unify the caucus as a
bloc to counterbalance the power of corporate Democrats. Along with such
policy wins as including $1,400 stimulus checks and expanded unemployment
benefits in 2021's American Rescue Plan, the CPC has helped shape the
Democrats' national priorities under the leadership of Rep. Pramila
Jayapal.

Party reform is also growing at the state level. Thanks in part to Our
Revolution's organizing, 20 states now have progressive reformers serving
in top elected leadership positions, and often as party chairs. As a
result, the Democratic National Committee (DNC) now boasts its largest
progressive faction in decades.

Progressives won big in Party elections last weekend with my union sister
Yolanda Bejarano winning a contested race to become the new Chair of the
Arizona Democratic Party — and our candidates swept 10/10 executive board
seats!

State party elections will be held this month in California, Washington,
and Iowa, — and progressives are expected to do well. State parties can
adopt their own platforms and rules for nominating candidates.
Collectively, they can have a major impact on the orientation of the
national party and its rules, including party positions on key issues as
well as the presidential nominating process.

This year, DNC reformers (including myself) have again submitted a
resolution banning dark money in Democratic primaries. (We unsuccessfully
submitted a similar resolution in 2022.) The DNC and Democratic state
parties around the country also have extensive rules relating to the
nominating process, which provide many opportunities to block dark and
dirty money.

Independent expenditures targeting progressive candidates in Democratic
primaries skyrocketed in 2022, part of a broader campaign to trounce
challengers in the party. For example, millions of dollars were spent to
defeat Rep. Andy Levin (D-Mich.) in a paid media blizzard which helped
lead to his loss to corporate Democrat Haley Stevens.

Similarly, progressive challengers like Nina Turner in Ohio and Jessica
Cisneros in Texas fell short after facing massive expenditures for paid
media designed to terrify the public and increase turnout from
unaffiliated (and even Republican) voters.

One of the leading culprits behind this dark money effort was Sam
Bankman-Fried, CEO of crypto firm FTX, who is now facing a long prison
sentence for illegally using billions of dollars of customer deposits. His
expenses included nearly $40 million in contributions to national
Democratic organizations and independent expenditures to elevate corporate
candidates in their primaries.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8319?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230203_1_1&t=1011&akid=3961%2E5885482%2Ef6oA5E ]Getting this corrupt corporate cash out of primaries is critical if we
want to elect grassroots challengers running for office. Join our
Transform the Party Team with a donation of $5 a month to help us take on
big money!

What happens inside the Democratic Party and inside party caucuses of
elected Democrats is frequently ignored by progressives, who are generally
more comfortable protesting and working solely outside the party. Of
course, protest is essential, and new party-building is fine.

But for those of us who believe we must fight in every possible way to
advance progressive issues and win real power, we ignore party reform at
our peril, even as we demand broader electoral reforms, such as fusion and
ranked-choice voting, proportional representation, and more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8319?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230203_1_1&t=1012&akid=3961%2E5885482%2Ef6oA5E ]It's the rules and not just the rulers that determine much of our
political success. Our Revolution is leading this fight for fair rules,
and you can join us as an official member of our Party Transformation Team
by pitching in $5 a month!

When we organize, we win.

Larry Cohen
Board Chair
Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230203_1_1.tuunWF&t=1001&akid=3961%2E5885482%2Ef6oA5E ]Our membership card

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230203_1_1.eXQ9WN&t=1002&akid=3961%2E5885482%2Ef6oA5E ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing as a 2023 Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $10 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230203_1_1.07u8mJ&t=1003&akid=3961%2E5885482%2Ef6oA5E ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230203_1_1.1-hHEd&t=1004&akid=3961%2E5885482%2Ef6oA5E ]GIVE ONCE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1005&akid=3961%2E5885482%2Ef6oA5E ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1006&akid=3961%2E5885482%2Ef6oA5E ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1007&akid=3961%2E5885482%2Ef6oA5E ][IMG]

Don't live in Pennsylvania? [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Update_Information?t=1008&akid=3961%2E5885482%2Ef6oA5E ]Click here to update your address so
that we only send you the most relevant organizing opportunities.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=3961%2E5885482%2Ef6oA5E

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

| Peter,

The new Congress is officially underway and with it our preparations for the 2024 election cycle. Our campaign team is hard at work building as strong a foundation as possible _**so we can defend Abigail 's seat and reclaim the House majority.**_

Your support is critical to our campaign's success, [_**and we 're hoping you'll take an incredibly impactful step by making a recurring contribution of $5 today.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/k8_RrONe4xNVzDVqeT1nnYwgWuD9kEbRRWZPhpitNm0=/ttk8QTr48ZwcV8UnBExDk4Dr6JOeblP1802ZD6GfgGs=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230203-ND-EM&amount=5&recurring=1)

Abigail's impact on our community is apparent. From capping the cost of life-saving insulin to investing in job-creating sustainable energy projects, she's looking out for us and future generations.

She's the type of leader we deserve, and we have to do all we can now to ensure she can continue her important mission in Congress for years to come.

[_**To support our campaign, will you please consider a $5 recurring contribution today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/k8_RrONe4xNVzDVqeT1nnYwgWuD9kEbRRWZPhpitNm0=/ttk8QTr48ZwcV8UnBExDk4Dr6JOeblP1802ZD6GfgGs=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230203-ND-EM&amount=5&recurring=1) _**You can make a considerable impact with a recurring contribution of even $5 today.**_

Team Spanberger

Good news - Our friends at _Survival Constitution_ were just cleaning out their warehouse... And they **found an extra** **box** of their extremely popular IWB Leather Holsters. Since they owed us a few favors... they agreed to [hand out these extra leather holsters FREE to our readers today. ](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11472/6374453/032f3fad26cd669c3bf3f0c6f0d20fa93b9f6aa7/ebb92b58515d23c927269e84517c449ea793ac4c) Just confirm your info at the link above, and you’ll get **a beautiful leather holster for nothing today.** You want this holster. It’s made from premium, full grain leather... makes almost any pistol **_virtually invisible_** when carrying concealed... and is downright gorgeous to boot. Like I said... They’re handing these leather holsters out FREE today. But this overstock giveaway won’t last long – since they have a **very limited number** to hand out. Right now, they’re promising FREE Leather Holsters to the **_next 382 readers_** _._ You might be out of luck after that. [So click HERE to get your Complimentary IWB Leather Holster](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11472/6374453/032f3fad26cd669c3bf3f0c6f0d20fa93b9f6aa7/ebb92b58515d23c927269e84517c449ea793ac4c)– before they’re gone!

Peter, We’re making 2023 the year we secure and protect America from the woke, ESG agenda. We’re taking our _STOP ESG Initiative_ to the next level to make this happen. ESG is a form of a Chinese Communist social credit score that is designed to inject woke policies into our workplaces and weaponize all of corporate America into the Left’s footsoldiers. **ESG hurts everyone.** We have a growing list of states who have introduced legislation to ensure woke ESG standards are defeated in 2023, but we’re just getting started. The laws Heritage Action are fighting for will protect taxpayer dollars by withdrawing billions of dollars from pro-ESG investment firms and other work corporations. We need your help to bring the fight against ESG to every state in the country. Our **STOP ESG 2023 "Go Woke Go Broke" Sticker** will rally more supporters, amplify our message, and expand our reach with more resources. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: REALLY slow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
The first quarter in the year after a big election is always really slow for fundraising.
| | |
---
Hi there,

The first quarter in the year after a big election is always really slow for fundraising.

Ordinarily, that’s okay. This time, it’s not.

My team had to take on debt in order to win in 2022. Taking on debt was the right thing to do – with polls as close as they were and pundits doubting whether we could win, it was what we needed to do.

But now the bills are due and the books are tight. January wasn’t as strong as we hoped and February is off to a slow start as well.

**[Can I count on you to make a donation to our campaign and get us back on track? We did the math and if you could please give $3 to this email, it’d really help us out.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58217020/390420488/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2200-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWQ1NzUzNi1lNGEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PG11utlsSQug7n2zDR7eBdHQU2LDGqsO3XEAal70ElU=)**

clean_body: The first quarter in the year after a big election is always really slow for fundraising. | | | Hi there, The first quarter in the year after a big election is always really slow for fundraising. Ordinarily, that’s okay. This time, it’s not. My team had to take on debt in order to win in 2022. Taking on debt was the right thing to do – with polls as close as they were and pundits doubting whether we could win, it was what we needed to do. But now the bills are due and the books are tight. January wasn’t as strong as we hoped and February is off to a slow start as well. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I’m laser-focused on fighting for Granite Staters and all Americans in the Senate. subject: Need your thoughts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58245427/390468550/-1839819742?refcode=lee_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTU2NmVmMi0wZWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BiYzjYSZKp76plfLbwcejD8betrmdkZGJMrwt2WP8UI=)

| | Folks, the DNC will decide tomorrow which state will replace Iowa as first in the nation to vote in the presidential primary elections. I’m reaching out to you before then because I want to hear what my supporters have to say. [**Will you take a moment to fill out my ‘First In The Nation’ survey and share which state you believe should vote first in the Democratic presidential primary?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58245428/390468551/-1666370990?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTU2NmVmMi0wZWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BiYzjYSZKp76plfLbwcejD8betrmdkZGJMrwt2WP8UI=&emci=c4358cce-dda3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=89566ef2-0ea4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=10997957) | | | [Take the survey >>](https://secure.ngpvan.com/MIztaaH2Uku3LdA86F8X-g2)
---
Beginning with Woodrow Wilson, the presidential primary has turned into one of the most important functions of the Democratic Party. It gives Democrats across the country a powerful voice in who will be our nominee for president.
And the first state to vote in the presidential primary can determine what the rest of the contest will look like.
I’ve always believed that the first state to vote in the Democratic presidential primary should be representative of the country as a whole. But, I want to hear your thoughts: [**Can you fill out my survey and say which state you believe should be the first to vote in the Democratic presidential primary?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58245431/390468553/-1666370990?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTU2NmVmMi0wZWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BiYzjYSZKp76plfLbwcejD8betrmdkZGJMrwt2WP8UI=&emci=c4358cce-dda3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=89566ef2-0ea4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=10997957)
| | [Start your survey >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58245433/390468556/-1666370990?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTU2NmVmMi0wZWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BiYzjYSZKp76plfLbwcejD8betrmdkZGJMrwt2WP8UI=&emci=c4358cce-dda3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=89566ef2-0ea4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=10997957)

Thank you,
Susie Lee

And the first state to vote in the presidential primary can determine what the rest of the contest will look like. I’ve always believed that the first state to vote in the Democratic presidential primary should be representative of the country as a whole. But, I want to hear your thoughts: | | Thank you, Susie Lee | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, = | | = | | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click | Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress Susie Lee for Congress 5130 S Fort Apache Rd Ste 215-382 Las Vegas, NV 89148

| | Rural America is one of the last stands for Democrats. Without quality candidates, funding, and party support, losing ground in our rural communities could soon be catastrophic for Democratic initiatives that actually help citizens.
