| | Good afternoon. Over the past decade, Democrats have been effectively ceding campaigns in rural America, leaving a narrow path to victory even in the best circumstances. Rural life is rooted in shared values of independence, common sense, tradition, frugality, community, and hard work. Folks in districts like Michigan's First vote on what rings true and personal to them: Can this person be trusted? Are they authentic? We need a united strategy, quality candidates, partnerships among campaigns, and a strong field network if we're going to restore our reputation as champions of working people, committed to improving lives, undaunted by wealth and power. The only way for Democrats to regain traction in rural districts is by running strong campaigns in districts that usually back Republicans. [Help us continue the fight in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula with a contribution to Dr. Bob Lorinser's Rural Fund.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/8fOOO6zGC/c?w=PoOOBQDR-8UMOmluF8dpQppvOMoiOwX7-DgMpbNQlTc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6ImRhNzUyZTFkLTllYWQtNDE1My1iMGViLTBlZTA3NDE0N2YwNiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) In our conversations with rural voters, through the simple act of listening, we almost always catch a glimpse of common ground if we focus on values, not parties. It’s not too late to make amends, to rebuild our relationship with the quiet roads of rural America. We have to hit the ground running today and recommit ourselves to the kind of politics that reaches every corner of our country. We want the rural movement to start right here, in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. -Dr. Bob Bob LorinserCandidate for US CongressMichigan's 1st Congressional DistrictNorthern Michigan & the Upper PeninsulaVoteDrBob.com

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Ilhan Omar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
I had a member of the Republican Caucus threaten my life.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230203-3857-header&t=1&akid=3857%2E2526796%2EPLLSKG)
I had a member of the Republican Caucus threaten my life. And the Republican Caucus rewarded him with one of the most prestigious committee assignments in Congress.
So don’t tell me removing Ilhan Omar from the House Foreign Affairs Committee is about ‘consistency.’
Don’t tell me that this is about a condemnation of antisemitic remarks, when you have a member of the Republican Caucus who has talked about ‘Jewish space lasers’ elevated to some of the highest committee assignments in Congress.
This is about targeting women of color in the United States of America.
Our movement won’t let that stand. Today we’re showing our support for Ilhan and Alexandria as they continue to stand up to hate. [Will you chip in $6 today or whatever you can to split between our grassroots, people-powered campaigns to continue standing up to Kevin McCarthy and his far-right allies?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-ilhan-email-20230203.s9z0y0&refcode=em20230203-3857-P_FND_SPL_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3857%2E2526796%2EPLLSKG)
In solidarity,
Alexandria

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: The Republicans are seeking their revenge on Ilhan Omar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Yesterday, the Republicans held an insulting and absurd vote to kick Representative Ilhan Omar of the House Foreign Affairs Committee despite the incredible work she has done over the past four years. **I want to make sure you can read a message from Ilhan below — but I also want you to know why I am so fired up about the Republicans’ shameful behavior.**
We have held bipartisan votes in the past to remove individuals from their committee assignments because of their violent actions that endangered the safety of their colleagues. **That is not what yesterday was about. It was about revenge.**
It’s revenge that seeks to remove Ilhan Omar’s strong and necessary voice from a committee she is more than qualified for. **It is the GOP’s attempt to silence her simply because they do not agree with her views,** and cannot begin to understand her lived experience as a war survivor and refugee.
It is also about the fact that **Republicans want to distract the American people from the fact that they have absolutely no legislation to bring to the floor** that is actually about helping the American people.
This entire process is a sham and a distraction, and the Republicans are once again doubling down on obvious racism, Islamophobia, xenophobia, and sexism because they can. [**I hope you’ll take 2 minutes to read this message from Ilhan and then split a donation between our campaigns — we must stand strong together.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/33164?refcode=em20230203-2127&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2127%2E420207%2EYYnMNz)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/33164?refcode=em20230203-2127&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2127%2E420207%2EYYnMNz)**
Forever in this fight together,
Pramila
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Ilhan Omar**
Date: Thursday, February 2, 2022
Subject: I was just removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
Kevin McCarthy kept his word, Peter.
**After 4 proud years of service, I was just removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee.**
I want to be perfectly clear: This political stunt is a personal one — the result of years of xenophobic, Islamophobic, and racist attacks that started the moment I was elected.
The far-right have spent millions of dollars in campaign ads against our movement stoking fear and division, and a constant stream of hateful and violent rhetoric has led to hundreds of death threats against me and my family.
Now, in their latest move, they've attempted to silence my voice and begin undoing the incredible progress our movement has helped make both at home and abroad.
I'm here to tell you that's not going to happen.
**My commitment to justice for all people across the globe — no matter their race, religion, nationality, or anything else — does not begin or end with a committee assignment.**
The simple truth is that McCarthy's actions to remove me from the Foreign Affairs Committee do absolutely nothing to address the issues our constituents deal with at home, or to promote the well-being of people around the world.
What it does is further enable his party's hatred and corruption, and promote fear and violence against Somali-Americans, Muslims, immigrants, and anyone else who shares my identity all across the country.
We already know that these attacks are just beginning, which is why it's so important that our progressive movement stays united, and is ready and able to fight back. So please:
[**Will you split a contribution — of $27 or any amount you can — between our campaign and Pramila's so we have the resources required to stand up to Kevin McCarthy and his far-right Republican allies? I would not ask if your support were not so important to our success.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/33164?refcode=em20230203-2127&t=3&akid=2127%2E420207%2EYYnMNz)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/33164?refcode=em20230203-2127&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2127%2E420207%2EYYnMNz)**
Nobody — not Kevin McCarthy, not the Republican Party, not the billionaires who fund them — will ever stop me in my fight for a more equitable, just, and peaceful world.
From tirelessly advocating for policies like a Green New Deal and Medicare for All at home, to standing up against violence and injustice worldwide, I promise that nothing will stand in the way of me doing what the people of Minnesota's 5th district elected me to do.
Thank you, as always, for being a part of our fight.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230203-2127-footer&t=23&refcode2=2127_420207_YYnMNz&akid=2127%2E420207%2EYYnMNz)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2127%2E420207%2EYYnMNz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2127%2E420207%2EYYnMNz)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: ElissaforCongress.com
subject: Elissa’s (Pretty Unique) Story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Friend -

It’s crazy to think that a few moments can have such a big impact on your life. And today, we thought it would be fun to share Elissa’s (pretty unique) story from her childhood to now with all of you.

On the family farm in Holly, Michigan, Elissa first learned the values of hard work, decency, and integrity: those were the same values that helped her great-grandfather start the family meat business, three generations before.

This ultimately guided her into a life of service: Elissa was in New York on 9/11 when the Twin Towers were attacked, and by the time the dust cleared, she knew she wanted to go into national security. Soon after, she was recruited into the CIA and served her first of three tours in Iraq alongside the military.

But the reason she decided to run for Congress for the first time was much more personal: her mom. Elissa’s mother died of ovarian cancer in 2011. She struggled to afford healthcare for years because of a pre-existing condition. Protections for people with pre-existing conditions and bringing down the over-the-top price of healthcare got Elissa into this race and remain a huge focus for her.

And through not one, not two, but three successful campaigns for Congress in a Republican-leaning district, Elissa has held true to those values of hard work, decency, and integrity as she works to defend and expand the middle class in Congress.

Congress needs more leaders who are willing to show up and do the work. Elissa has proven she can do just that. If you want to support her brand of straightforward Midwestern leadership, please consider making a donation today.

CONTRIBUTE: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ebs-em-feb23?refcode=em230203-1-180-v2

All our best,
Team Slotkin

About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents mid-Michigan in Congress. She was re-elected in 2022 by a 5-point margin, in the state's most competitive Congressional district.

We want to say thank you!

Because of you, Fight for Progress is laying the groundwork for big wins in battleground states like _**North Carolina, Arizona, and Nevada.**_

We have to do everything we can to ensure Democrats maintain control of the Senate, we take back the House, and Donald Trump has no path to the White House.

Thank you for joining Fight For Progress in this fight. We couldn’t do it without you.

I believe in the power of government to make people’s lives better — and I’ve spent the past 18 years as a public servant helping Virginians and solving problems, from passing the Voting Rights Act of Virginia to the Reproductive Health Protection Act.
**But my work doesn’t stop here — because there are still more people to help and problems to solve.**
My team has a plan to win. We’re distributing yard signs, airing new ads, and meeting voters all over the district — but our critical voter outreach efforts are expensive.
[**We need to raise $3,726 to hit today’s fundraising target, and I’d be really grateful if you could split a $10 donation between our special election campaign and Jason Crow. We’re counting on grassroots support to get us across the finish line, and that starts with you >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58218597/390427015/771719123?refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzdjYWQ2Ny1lOGEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zo2i4bzFZsTQ-EDC9eKQKubald_G21WnclJBJ_Z8N_0=)

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Real wages way down ⬇️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Please sign my petition calling on the Biden Democrats to reign in their reckless government spending – so we can bring down inflation and get wages back up! >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/0a592601e6300557/b07044ccb6126e38c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, The Biden White House is bragging about the latest employment numbers... but the truth is that the American people are hurting.
Due to Biden’s disastrous cost-of-living crisis, real wages dropped 3.6% during this past fiscal year – one of the worst declines in decades! And last month’s BLS Real Earnings Report showed that real wages are continuing to fall.
As many hardworking families struggle to make ends meet, we simply can’t afford to let this crisis continue.
**If you agree, please sign my petition calling on the Biden Democrats to rein in their reckless government spending – so we can bring down inflation and get wages back up!**
---
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/0a592601e6300557/e2dbf45a541a244ac3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Adding your name only takes a second, and I’m trying to collect as many names as possible.
So don’t hesitate – [**go on record against Biden’s far-left agenda**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/0a592601e6300557/825c34bec8b05fe0c3d6b838967d376c/33013) right now!
\- Coach Tuberville

**I’m putting the White House on notice.**

body:

| | | | | | |

| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SoIzXt_DN-fEpB3DKoo2Ww-BrnqQmldXA59NTlYTy1iK_xK3HNzegbZHB7mGSem3Lm0A-wvMMU3tuDB3xdSk4Vjf6nz9f1TpbGF4HYUUe4T_8P1RWhieMekK80m5VwBnks33lgCJZtHUGN1EEhVkUTXxHt5tTsSY5HhCDZRhywUScEHWis3PmzTwnnihbwseAeMubYS_ze5jdZM7aa6_i8eB7_1mgFPyn2ydtSeLsZthDFVcOOCItLM027D1A7AkVe5cPWhr1MEmxfE8kfhapVtclnotIE4tQANOd7hlLWKt1HSKLqCiReod_xE7c-3dBHunLlYQoierK4NCxOSCfg==&c=sPoGTeCj_aeBaOb-MgCOkvnq0YHUdK9mY8cN0yy66WOCtMWAIpn-rA==&ch=FU5UA1tVi9xHCfYj5uWvUhdv7O-2OF5AjqqxPho3Hrx37OGuS4RZSQ==)

Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week I exposed the glaring hypocrisy of the radical environmentalists who continue to block American energy production... even for their beloved solar and wind projects. I also continued to fight back against the taxpayer funded, anti-gun activists at the ATF and outlined my plan to protect Americans from the Mexican drug cartels.
As always, thank you for your support.
Here's your brief:
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| WHAT DO THE RADICAL ENVIRONMENTALISTS WANT?
---

| Radical environmentalists say that we need to move to a future in which all of our energy is derived from solar panels and wind farms. They say that all of our cars should be electric and that we should ban any gas-powered vehicles ([the far-left governments in California, Oregon, and Washington have plans to ban any new gas-powered vehicles by 2035](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SoIzXt_DN-fEpB3DKoo2Ww-BrnqQmldXA59NTlYTy1iK_xK3HNzegUWXlAVK5IpVeBogAFXLntq5IW2lQ_-jYTowD236Kn1GF6F_7x-H7mzPwZUW2GHpH8fKjX-cGfpoCavccogvRamSERsHU4K0i_VxFSNXSi-IsbYFixN02P3wb3W_t_PbAnX2XE3fP3p0w1-SeRoiK810c20HW3m4kF-fZUhVxISr-541xiI2txL9zDtUbWf5CGxs_MeDUhru9e8SesJpuWs=&c=sPoGTeCj_aeBaOb-MgCOkvnq0YHUdK9mY8cN0yy66WOCtMWAIpn-rA==&ch=FU5UA1tVi9xHCfYj5uWvUhdv7O-2OF5AjqqxPho3Hrx37OGuS4RZSQ==)). They say they want all of this to save the planet from the "existential threat" of climate change.
But what they don't say and what they don't want you to know is that it is precisely the activism of the same radical environmentalists that is blocking ANY energy production from happening in America, including new solar and wind projects and electric vehicles. Let me explain.
It takes A LOT of raw materials to develop renewable energy. For instance, a 100 megawatt wind farm requires 30,000 tons of iron ore, 50,000 tons of concrete, and 900 tons of non-recyclable plastics. If we want to meet the left's renewable energy goals, we would need to increase production of lithium by 500%, cobalt by 460%, and graphite by more than 400%. The problem? Radical environmentalists have a militant opposition to the mining that is required to retrieve these materials.
In Oregon, we have massive lithium deposits. But activists have halted mining activities that could support the production of 1 million electric vehicles annually. Why? To protect the sage grouse - which, if we're being honest, is basically a fancy chicken. In Nevada, lithium mining is being blocked because of a random species of plant called the Tiehm's buckwheat that apparently could be endangered but serves no practical purpose (at least not to the extent that it is logical to block mining for lithium for the sake of this plant). Even when companies that wanted to mine lithium in Nevada provided proposals to relocate the Tiehm's buckwheat so their projects could move forward, the environmental activists refused. And most recently, Joe Biden canceled mining leases on land in Minnesota that would give us copper, nickel, cobalt, and more materials that are all necessary for renewable projects.
Now, to be clear, renewable energy is really only viable from an economic and energy production standpoint with MASSIVE government subsidies (aka your tax dollars). But the radical environmentalists won't even let us produce the materials here in America that would allow us to use these renewable energy sources where they make sense. They'd rather us import solar panels from China, which are made using slave labor. They don't want oil and gas. They don't want the materials necessary to build out renewable energy. All they want to do is virtue signal about climate change and offer ZERO legitimate solutions that would help us continue to reduce our emissions while also providing reliable, affordable, American-made energy. And Joe Biden is happy to appease their radicalism.

| The sole purpose of the ATF under President Joe Biden seems to be attacking law-abiding gun owners. The ATF does this constantly, and did it again most recently with their unilateral ban on pistol braces. Tens of millions of Americans use pistol braces and they would immediately become felons if this ban is implemented.
Let's just answer some basic questions about pistol braces to prove why this ban is so absurd:
Do pistol braces make a gun more deadly? NO.
Do pistol braces make a gun shoot faster? NO.
Do pistol braces modify a gun to turn it into an "assault weapon?" NO.
Pistol braces are used by people with disabilities, including a lot of veterans. They provide stability when firing a gun for people who may have trouble stabilizing a gun on their own. In fact, you could argue that pistol braces make guns SAFER because you're less likely to shoot something you're not aiming at when the gun is more stable. It is basic commonsense.
Unfortunately, the bureaucrats at the ATF under Joe Biden don't operate as commonsense regulators trying to keep people safe. Instead, they operate as mindless anti-gun activists who simply look for any excuse to attack the Second Amendment rights of Americans. The good news is that, with a Republican majority in the House, Congress has the opportunity to intervene and pass legislation like my ATF Accountability Act. This bipartisan bill would allow small businesses who manufacture or sell these braces to appeal the ATF's rulings when they make nonsensical decisions (like the pistol brace ban) and get a resolution in a timely manner. This appeals process exists with virtually every other agency and allows Americans to petition their government for redress of grievances without having to take the federal government to court, which for average Americans is simply unrealistic. It's time to apply that appeals process to the ATF, which is exactly what my bill does.
You can help make sure my bill gets to the floor by demanding House Republican leaders schedule it for a vote so we can finally stand up to this overzealous agency that continues to attack law-abiding gun owners.

The Mexican drug cartels are smuggling fentanyl into this country, which is killing tens of thousands of Americans every single year. This represents a purposeful poisoning and killing of Americans at the hands of a well-equipped, militarized enemy that has full operational control of our southern border.
That's why I re-introduced two pieces of legislation that would give us the tools we need to neutralize this threat:
The Declaring War on the Cartels Act
An Authorization for the Use of Military Force Against the Cartels
The Declaring War on the Cartels Act would greatly expand our government's ability to go after the cartels. clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week I exposed the glaring hypocrisy of the radical environmentalists who continue to block American energy production... even for their beloved solar and wind projects. I also continued to fight back against the taxpayer funded, anti-gun activists at the ATF and outlined my plan to protect Americans from the Mexican drug cartels. As always, thank you for your support. Here's your brief: | | | | | | | | WHAT DO THE RADICAL ENVIRONMENTALISTS WANT? | | | == | == | | | Radical environmentalists say that we need to move to a future in which all of our energy is derived from solar panels and wind farms. They say that all of our cars should be electric and that we should ban any gas-powered vehicles (==). They say they want all of this to save the planet from the "existential threat" of climate change. But what they don't say and what they don't want you to know is that it is precisely the activism of the same radical environmentalists that is blocking ANY energy production from happening in America, including new solar and wind projects and electric vehicles. Let me explain. It takes A LOT of raw materials to develop renewable energy. For instance, a 100 megawatt wind farm requires 30,000 tons of iron ore, 50,000 tons of concrete, and 900 tons of non-recyclable plastics. If we want to meet the left's renewable energy goals, we would need to increase production of lithium by 500%, cobalt by 460%, and graphite by more than 400%. The problem? Radical environmentalists have a militant opposition to the mining that is required to retrieve these materials. In Oregon, we have massive lithium deposits. But activists have halted mining activities that could support the production of 1 million electric vehicles annually. Why? To protect the sage grouse - which, if we're being honest, is basically a fancy chicken. In Nevada, lithium mining is being blocked because of a random species of plant called the Tiehm's buckwheat that apparently could be endangered but serves no practical purpose (at least not to the extent that it is logical to block mining for lithium for the sake of this plant). Even when companies that wanted to mine lithium in Nevada provided proposals to relocate the Tiehm's buckwheat so their projects could move forward, the environmental activists refused. And most recently, Joe Biden canceled mining leases on land in Minnesota that would give us copper, nickel, cobalt, and more materials that are all necessary for renewable projects. Now, to be clear, renewable energy is really only viable from an economic and energy production standpoint with MASSIVE government subsidies (aka your tax dollars). But the radical environmentalists won't even let us produce the materials here in America that would allow us to use these renewable energy sources where they make sense. They'd rather us import solar panels from China, which are made using slave labor. They don't want oil and gas. They don't want the materials necessary to build out renewable energy. All they want to do is virtue signal about climate change and offer ZERO legitimate solutions that would help us continue to reduce our emissions while also providing reliable, affordable, American-made energy. And Joe Biden is happy to appease their radicalism. == | | | | | | | | THIS IS WHY THE ATF PISTOL BRACE BAN IS SO ABSURD | | | | | == | == | | | The sole purpose of the ATF under President Joe Biden seems to be attacking law-abiding gun owners. The ATF does this constantly, and did it again most recently with their unilateral ban on pistol braces. Tens of millions of Americans use pistol braces and they would immediately become felons if this ban is implemented. Let's just answer some basic questions about pistol braces to prove why this ban is so absurd: Do pistol braces make a gun more deadly? NO. Do pistol braces make a gun shoot faster? NO. Do pistol braces modify a gun to turn it into an "assault weapon?" NO. Pistol braces are used by people with disabilities, including a lot of veterans. They provide stability when firing a gun for people who may have trouble stabilizing a gun on their own. In fact, you could argue that pistol braces make guns SAFER because you're less likely to shoot something you're not aiming at when the gun is more stable. It is basic commonsense. Unfortunately, the bureaucrats at the ATF under Joe Biden don't operate as commonsense regulators trying to keep people safe. Instead, they operate as mindless anti-gun activists who simply look for any excuse to attack the Second Amendment rights of Americans. The good news is that, with a Republican majority in the House, Congress has the opportunity to intervene and pass legislation like my ATF Accountability Act. This bipartisan bill would allow small businesses who manufacture or sell these braces to appeal the ATF's rulings when they make nonsensical decisions (like the pistol brace ban) and get a resolution in a timely manner. This appeals process exists with virtually every other agency and allows Americans to petition their government for redress of grievances without having to take the federal government to court, which for average Americans is simply unrealistic. It's time to apply that appeals process to the ATF, which is exactly what my bill does. You can help make sure my bill gets to the floor by demanding House Republican leaders schedule it for a vote so we can finally stand up to this overzealous agency that continues to attack law-abiding gun owners. == | | | | | | | | HOW DO WE STOP THE DRUG CARTELS FROM KILLING AMERICANS? | == | == | We are at war with the Mexican drug cartels, whether we want to admit it or not. The Mexican drug cartels are smuggling fentanyl into this country, which is killing tens of thousands of Americans every single year. This represents a purposeful poisoning and killing of Americans at the hands of a well-equipped, militarized enemy that has full operational control of our southern border. That's why I re-introduced two pieces of legislation that would give us the tools we need to neutralize this threat: The Declaring War on the Cartels Act An Authorization for the Use of Military Force Against the Cartels The Declaring War on the Cartels Act would greatly expand our government's ability to go after the cartels. Under my legislation, foreign governments that coordinate with cartels or do not take the necessary action to stop cartel activity in their own countries may be sanctioned and lose any financial aid from America. It would also authorize punishment for anyone convicted of aiding cartel-related crimes with 15 years in federal prison and naturalized citizens could lose their citizenship if they are convicted. The Authorization for the Use of Military Force (or AUMF) gives President Biden the authority to take military action against the cartels if necessary. Under Democrat control of Washington, our border has been taken over by the Mexican drug cartels. Now that Republicans control the House, we should start showing the American people we take this threat seriously and pass these bills so that Democrats are forced to either help us solve this problem or admit to the American people that they have no will or plan to stop the cartels from killing Americans. Republican leadership controls the floor of the House of Representatives and they could schedule these widely-supported bills immediately. I'm going to keep demanding they do just that and you can help make sure that happens by demanding the same thing. == | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | | | | | | QUOTE OF THE WEEK | | "The more the state 'plans' the more difficult planning becomes for the individual." -Friedrich Hayek | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | | | WEEKEND READS BREITBART: == HOUSTON CHRONICLE: == DAILY WIRE: == | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thanks for reading. If you like my message and want to help me grow our conservative movement, ==. None of this is possible without your support. I won't let you down. | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | If you'd prefer to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. Any questions, comments, or concerns? body:
Help us spread Andy's message across the Commonwealth. Peter — Andy is gearing up for a long and hard-fought re-election campaign, and pollsters and pundits are making their initial predictions for the Kentucky governor's race.

The numbers show that Andy is still popular amongst the majority of Kentuckians. **In fact, Andy's approval ratings are the highest of any Democratic governor in the country!** And new polling shows him defeating every Republican challenger.

Still, a national forecaster just ranked this race as a "toss-up!" Andy won his race in 2019 by just over 5,000 votes, and we can expect this year to be another tough race.

It's early in the race, and a lot can change from now until Election Day. We have momentum, but we need to ensure we keep it up. At the end of the day, this race will come down to whether or not Andy can get his message out to Kentuckians across our Commonwealth.

**Will you help Andy connect with folks all across the Commonwealth?[Chip in to his re-election campaign and ensure we have the resources to spread Andy's message far and wide. clean_body: Help us spread Andy's message across the Commonwealth. Peter — Andy is gearing up for a long and hard-fought re-election campaign, and pollsters and pundits are making their initial predictions for the Kentucky governor's race. The numbers show that Andy is still popular amongst the majority of Kentuckians. In fact, Andy's approval ratings are the highest of any Democratic governor in the country! And new polling shows him defeating every Republican challenger. Still, a national forecaster just ranked this race as a "toss-up!" Andy won his race in 2019 by just over 5,000 votes, and we can expect this year to be another tough race. It's early in the race, and a lot can change from now until Election Day. We have momentum, but we need to ensure we keep it up. At the end of the day, this race will come down to whether or not Andy can get his message out to Kentuckians across our Commonwealth. _I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a94fd54053440139631a7642f43a340&_e=XKPXe6vVnXcEOnIB1rT9Q5GSo_vraMrNxveYYKoS0KrC9jMrSgORY0_-N0VepXcKJP2sxeJrc3stAlp1WJNGwyQTrusHX61P7z4ztCkQt5BrLWSyocpzNjporWp26WVZuH5bHXjxOH4BIKvyRb6RdHHXizngsYi2u1EpUiVDrZnJ7BLeURVbHYj-0LPOonkUsim7gxZkVprP9KrfR_e3vlNUkBuxMITO4njLBfiOLhCpuqgwpRkyS3ezcvQM2KbMyMo_FNpCSKGePInzLchIN1S25Oq5kYFPH8JakOWZrrc%3D)

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a94fd54053440139631a7642f43a340&_e=XKPXe6vVnXcEOnIB1rT9Q5GSo_vraMrNxveYYKoS0KrC9jMrSgORY0_-N0VepXcKJP2sxeJrc3stAlp1WJNGwyQTrusHX61P7z4ztCkQt5BrLWSyocpzNjporWp26WVZuH5bHXjxOH4BIKvyRb6RdHdE88_yI7q9aOgy0BG5QDrgbuWACz3qNvlgHmuZ0nte2r8Tw68cdoB_XEl5o-Zx8hW-023CaYxFrPdBo-wbYDL2iuzDV6hdflhVPrOc2E7hqo3lmXPbeCYZTpLiqdUCW5sRqdPyj1DFlUjCXlPtPaM%3D)

I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a94fd54053440139631a7642f43a340&_e=XKPXe6vVnXcEOnIB1rT9Q5GSo_vraMrNxveYYKoS0KrC9jMrSgORY0_-N0VepXcKJP2sxeJrc3stAlp1WJNGwyQTrusHX61P7z4ztCkQt5BrLWSyocpzNjporWp26WVZuH5bHXjxOH4BIKvyRb6RdI1I5cwXnYvQnNZwsP9Z22D9wLXAd0rbp6dgBWEdZN5bhhkca51bl0VaNz4-gPfvBBa87oRasZL-BOO409zG0O4PXnEN0Z2zQRLyVRVn6VmEGhfOR3wTLwCVRMIy-Hlx2dnfcpNyq5lVjuztHH7MKdM%3D) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

| | Hi Peter, this Denisha Merriweather Allen from the American Federation of Children. The last few years have been transformative in the fight for school choice. In many ways, this past election was a reflection of that.
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7a5d44e0ac024c9fb1607ac376b3d302&_e=yjazaNDTv0TxaJWP-pWwfStuYjGSxawLM9BKqjSiqz7c-s49_KdvXzKL1iTVUdvRtU5nI1-7O-i1mxxCheF-rlaGQeU5ghtPMRXdE_I_gtV1OVH1FsSrwE4MweNtP9Vb7WHpePl7Lsb0jinjLOZuHaU0-zb7paSpwIc8SIlTOkMvKeJul5Mu1s6lq_oVI-8qu52TERRh1yq-0-H6adDQ7eWFl8lVNlnQ6NCRgrLP7nhjwqAmSMPJXas3mrGhwxF3QUESTx3GeNSsNtTxBtyY4NtwACq8w9OfaKLY4jL75L6LU_MuihfWcWZ6CDx7bmRW4IT4ztzHCugjwAbutdDb3GHorP6F4llcTPJCS3cIh1669xMXgBqBNrV0XXoA8psg-xS505th0NvVHpKd0_mH8KHMBvXIZ8oJ-WfP4IekGSk3pcootsDQ3Al9IxEFPXpG77hNABwSTafYAB1Ov00ib4z6jjxKfG7QqmH4gUyzd_s%3D)
---
| | Here’s why parents were SO MOTIVATED to get out there and voice their concerns this November. The COVID-19 pandemic gave parents a unique glimpse into the daily lives of their kids at school. **The result?** A MASSIVE shift in public support for SCHOOL CHOICE in America. For so many families, one look at their child’s curriculum over Zoom was all it took to want a change. For countless others, distance learning just didn’t work. _**Why? Because a one-size-fits-all approach to education is NEVER the right fit for any individual student.**_
---
| | [**I AGREE, STUDENTS DESERVE BETTER: CHIP IN >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7a5d44e0ac024c9fb1607ac376b3d302&_e=yjazaNDTv0TxaJWP-pWwfStuYjGSxawLM9BKqjSiqz7c-s49_KdvXzKL1iTVUdvRtU5nI1-7O-i1mxxCheF-rlaGQeU5ghtPMRXdE_I_gtV1OVH1FsSrwE4MweNtP9Vb7WHpePl7Lsb0jinjLOZuHaU0-zb7paSpwIc8SIlTOkMvKeJul5Mu1s6lq_oVI-8qu52TERRh1yq-0-H6adDQ7eWFl8lVNlnQ6NCRgrLP7nhjwqAmSMPJXas3mrGhwxF3QUESTx3GeNSsNtTxBtyY4NtwACq8w9OfaKLY4jL75L6LU_MuihfWcWZ6CDx7bmRW0WX2s-Y32kmv4WNs5IhtFtNadyQxM-sDGOJOmyeojVyfyN9lQyENaicBvAWuDazUdhpLo5x9iPhkt0AGmc2E7Kb90w__hY5HhV9t2q64Npse_TjuY5GarDqbeGKGYFsDIGRa70zPBWeFEGr49duJqB6tWV_kkHdWwkVwHB_sz7E%3D)
---
| | At the American Federation for Children we’re on the front lines of the school choice movement in America. **Our organization believes in funding STUDENTS, not systems. These are the four major pillars of our mission:**
* Advocating for change at the state and national levels regarding the school choice issues most important to today’s parents.
* Empowering families with the freedom to choose the best K-12 education for their children.
* Connecting families to resources to make the best education decisions for their children.
* Identifying and developing tomorrow’s leaders in the school choice movement.

---
| | [**I AGREE, PARENTS DESERVE CHOICE: CHIP IN >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7a5d44e0ac024c9fb1607ac376b3d302&_e=yjazaNDTv0TxaJWP-pWwfStuYjGSxawLM9BKqjSiqz7c-s49_KdvXzKL1iTVUdvRtU5nI1-7O-i1mxxCheF-rlaGQeU5ghtPMRXdE_I_gtV1OVH1FsSrwE4MweNtP9Vb7WHpePl7Lsb0jinjLOZuHaU0-zb7paSpwIc8SIlTOkMvKeJul5Mu1s6lq_oVI-8qu52TERRh1yq-0-H6adDQ7eWFl8lVNlnQ6NCRgrLP7nhjwqAmSMPJXas3mrGhwxF3QUESTx3GeNSsNtTxBtyY4NtwACq8w9OfaKLY4jL75L6LU_MuihfWcWZ6CDx7bmRWMzap8buKYgYect30f7W8P9IbVAimNbasYjM3RQwzQVEYACwkfnjtN3id6wj8Jnrn5hwXiwSCpAlpGEaCxjdJE53gDIghiKd678iutLMljLsxZLcSw2-e94VEBH40Y2VBGeJisfizX4eJs8VTgDOcij2r6CXbuaTX2mbt4A_7Ry8%3D)
---
| | **We believe that when funding for education follows students to the school of their choice, families and kids win.** We’re fighting for students across the country who don’t yet have that option. Our organization believes school choice should be available to ALL, regardless of skin color, background, or zip code, so students like **Walter Blanks** can attend a school that works for **_them_**. As a public school student, Walter felt like **_an exile in his own land_** , words he drew from the great Reverend Martin Luther King Jr’s “I Have A Dream” speech. **[_> > Watch Walter discuss education freedom for ALL in “Walter’s Dream”_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7a5d44e0ac024c9fb1607ac376b3d302&_e=yjazaNDTv0TxaJWP-pWwfStuYjGSxawLM9BKqjSiqz7c-s49_KdvXzKL1iTVUdvRtU5nI1-7O-i1mxxCheF-rlaGQeU5ghtPMRXdE_I_gtV1OVH1FsSrwE4MweNtP9Vb7WHpePl7Lsb0jinjLOZuHaU0-zb7paSpwIc8SIlTOkMvKeJul5Mu1s6lq_oVI-8qu52TERRh1yq-0-H6adDQ7eWFl8lVNlnQ6NCRgrLP7nhjwqAmSMPJXas3mrGhwxF3QUESTx3GeNSsNtTxBtyY4NtwACq8w9OfaKLY4jL75L6LU_MuihfWcWZ6CDx7bmRWgv8f9jJQP9_TRQLKBQfpuTgj5o8UDZop1kFz0X5ysQjUBvdQ54F7k1nt-NZietKllSWNasd0bJoEKRVKTf0QnWGYkQcjJ_3VoKgxsuv3uWsFtzAh4--WXH6zsV9A6xQ3JJ31gm_2x0abWTfUtdTcQb-GMEH8JNHQmh2u4IfPhPs%3D)**

clean_body: Why school choice is gaining momentum across the country...| | | Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this | | | | Hi Peter, this Denisha Merriweather Allen from the American Federation of Children. The last few years have been transformative in the fight for school choice. In many ways, this past election was a reflection of that. | | | | Here’s why parents were SO MOTIVATED to get out there and voice their concerns this November. The COVID-19 pandemic gave parents a unique glimpse into the daily lives of their kids at school. The result? A MASSIVE shift in public support for SCHOOL CHOICE in America. For so many families, one look at their child’s curriculum over Zoom was all it took to want a change. For countless others, distance learning just didn’t work. Why? Because a one-size-fits-all approach to education is NEVER the right fit for any individual student. | | | | At the American Federation for Children we’re on the front lines of the school choice movement in America. Our organization believes in funding STUDENTS, not systems. These are the four major pillars of our mission: Advocating for change at the state and national levels regarding the school choice issues most important to today’s parents. Empowering families with the freedom to choose the best K-12 education for their children. Connecting families to resources to make the best education decisions for their children. Identifying and developing tomorrow’s leaders in the school choice movement. | | | | We believe that when funding for education follows students to the school of their choice, families and kids win. We’re fighting for students across the country who don’t yet have that option. Our organization believes school choice should be available to ALL, regardless of skin color, background, or zip code, so students like Walter Blanks can attend a school that works for them. As a public school student, Walter felt like an exile in his own land , words he drew from the great Reverend Martin Luther King Jr’s “I Have A Dream” speech. | | | | Peter, our organization is on the front lines of the school choice fight so students like Walter get the choice they deserve in their education. name: Charles Booker
subject: FWD: National support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

As we kick off the month of February, I’m hoping you’ll help us reach a
$10,000 goal and help take a big step towards fully retiring our campaign
debt.

I hate to have to ask -- but we left it all on the field at the end of the
campaign, and ended up with some bills left to pay. I want to make sure
those campaign expenses get paid and I want to step into our next fight
together. First, I need your help.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18878?t=1001&akid=2945%2E346206%2E2pckzw ]If you’re in a position to do so, please click here to rush a
contribution before midnight.

Thank you!

Charles

--- Forwarded message ---

Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The
campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding
the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the
democratic process.

The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky.
Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will
win.

But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of
donations we received, national support never came.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18878?t=1002&akid=2945%2E346206%2E2pckzw ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution
so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our
fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to
make a contribution.

I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of
progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to
go.

Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m
excited to move on to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230203-2945-footer&t=1003&refcode2=2945_346206_2pckzw&akid=2945%2E346206%2E2pckzw

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2945%2E346206%2E2pckzw

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Dan Goldman
subject: “Dan Goldman has an impossible job. He can’t wait to start”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
I’m ready to go up against MAGA Republicans like Jim Jordan once again |
#
---
Peter, First, I want to say **thank you**. So many dedicated supporters generously chipped in towards our first monthly fundraising goal of the year. Donations through these occasional emails make a huge difference to allow me to focus on the critical work at hand instead of fundraising. It is my hope that weekly newsletters like this one will keep you informed and up-to-date about the work we’re doing and how your support is making an impact. A few weeks ago, I wrote to you about House Republicans’ so-called “Select Subcommittee to Investigate the Weaponization of the Federal Government” — the creation of which was a key demand of ultra right-wing MAGA Republicans in order for Kevin McCarthy to gain their votes to elect him as Speaker of the House. **I prefer to call it the Subcommittee to Obstruct Justice — because no matter how they spin it, Republicans will use it for one purpose: interfering in ongoing criminal investigations.** It’s easy to see why. The Department of Justice and the FBI are investigating crimes that Republicans are deeply complicit in — from Donald Trump’s unauthorized possession of classified documents, to his and House Republicans’ involvement in the conspiracy to overturn the 2020 election. And the subcommittee is being overseen by none other than Rep. Jim Jordan, who I took on as Democrats’ lead counsel during Donald Trump’s first impeachment trial. **Peter, I’m proud to be the only freshman member of Congress to be appointed to this subcommittee this week, and I’m ready to act as a bulwark against GOP overreach and politicized investigations whose sole purpose is to undermine President Biden and obstruct justice.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58221260/390435393/-1618262897?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTFhN2ZhZi1lZWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9nVG39NooPVQFLw13xVQHw0jg6wOhfpEtm3uEU6eCNI=&emci=8183d0c8-dea3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=1a1a7faf-eea3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=13556823) While it’s clear to any outside observer how nakedly corrupt this Subcommittee is — with its broad investigatory powers that will allow MAGA Republicans to access sensitive information and interfere in ongoing criminal investigations — my decades of experience as a federal prosecutor, as a Senior Advisor to the House Intelligence Committee, and as Democrats' lead counsel in Donald Trump’s impeachment _(which, I must remind you, was also for obstructing justice)_ , will be extremely valuable in exposing to the American people how politicized and dangerous this exercise is. Our role as Democrats on this Subcommittee is to be the sober adults in the room — to stand up for the truth, the rule of law, and our democratic institutions, and fight back against the extremism on the other side.
* * *
**The Real 'Weaponization' of the Federal Government** This week, I reminded the extremist Republicans where they should direct their attention if they are truly focused on rooting out “weaponization” of the federal government. Together with Rep. Ted Lieu, I sent a letter to Department of Justice Inspector General Michael Horowitz calling for an investigation into possible misconduct by Special Counsel John Durham and former Attorney General Bill Barr related to Durham’s fruitless and unnecessary four-year long investigation into the origins of the Russia investigation — something Donald Trump had incessantly demanded. We called for Mr. Horowitz to investigate this misconduct after _The New York Times_ alleged several instances of prosecutorial abuse and corruption from AG Barr and Special Counsel Durham in order to further Donald Trump’s false political narrative that the Russia investigation was nothing but a “witch hunt.” Based on the Times’ reporting, we believe Durham and Barr May have violated DOJ rules, regulations and even possibly the law. **This, of course, is a potential example of what real “weaponization” of the federal government looks like — not whatever bogus QAnon conspiracy theories that Republicans will raise in their Subcommittee which have no basis in truth or fact.**
* * *
Last week, I also received **two more committee assignments.** I was assigned to the Committee on Homeland Security, where I will forcefully advocate for comprehensive immigration reform, a more humane and just immigration system, and work to ensure that anyone seeking safety in the United States can pursue the American Dream. And if necessary, I will thwart any impeachment investigation into Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas. In addition, I was appointed to the Committee on Oversight and Accountability, which Republicans also plan to use as a tool to promote their lies and conspiracy theories. Indeed, they’ve already begun going after President Biden and his family in an attempt to harm Democrats before the 2024 election. My new posts on these three committees will allow me to use my legal experience to fulfill my promises to defend our democratic institutions and the rule of law. I look forward to sharing my work with you in the coming weeks. But Peter, I cannot devote the necessary time and effort fighting back against Republicans on these committees if I have to spend time fundraising. And my role as a bulwark against the MAGA Republicans is going to make me a prime target for their attacks and vitriol. They will do everything they can to weaken our shared resolve. It’s why Donald Trump “endorsed” me during the campaign, why Jim Jordan resorted to digging up old tweets to disparage me during the impeachment hearing, and why I expect to be a subject of their attacks again. If I am effective at undermining their bogus narrative, they will come after me. **The fights ahead of us are only just beginning — and I’m counting on folks like you to ensure that we can stay in this together when the going gets tough. If you’re able, please chip in $10 or any amount you’re able to support my fight for our democracy and accountability for authoritarian, MAGA Republicans.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58221261/390435394/-1453822927?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTFhN2ZhZi1lZWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9nVG39NooPVQFLw13xVQHw0jg6wOhfpEtm3uEU6eCNI=)
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58221262/390435395/-1453822927?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTFhN2ZhZi1lZWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9nVG39NooPVQFLw13xVQHw0jg6wOhfpEtm3uEU6eCNI=)
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58221263/390435396/-1453822927?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTFhN2ZhZi1lZWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9nVG39NooPVQFLw13xVQHw0jg6wOhfpEtm3uEU6eCNI=)
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58221264/390435397/1288870341?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTFhN2ZhZi1lZWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9nVG39NooPVQFLw13xVQHw0jg6wOhfpEtm3uEU6eCNI=)
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58221265/390435398/-1453822927?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTFhN2ZhZi1lZWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9nVG39NooPVQFLw13xVQHw0jg6wOhfpEtm3uEU6eCNI=)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58221266/390435399/-1453822927?express_lane=true&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTFhN2ZhZi1lZWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9nVG39NooPVQFLw13xVQHw0jg6wOhfpEtm3uEU6eCNI=)
---
Thank you.
Yours in this fight,
Dan

PO BOX 3306

And if necessary, I will thwart any impeachment investigation into Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas. In addition, I was appointed to the Committee on Oversight and Accountability, which Republicans also plan to use as a tool to promote their lies and conspiracy theories. Indeed, they’ve already begun going after President Biden and his family in an attempt to harm Democrats before the 2024 election. My new posts on these three committees will allow me to use my legal experience to fulfill my promises to defend our democratic institutions and the rule of law. I look forward to sharing my work with you in the coming weeks. But Peter, I cannot devote the necessary time and effort fighting back against Republicans on these committees if I have to spend time fundraising. And my role as a bulwark against the MAGA Republicans is going to make me a prime target for their attacks and vitriol. They will do everything they can to weaken our shared resolve. It’s why Donald Trump “endorsed” me during the campaign, why Jim Jordan resorted to digging up old tweets to disparage me during the impeachment hearing, and why I expect to be a subject of their attacks again. If I am effective at undermining their bogus narrative, they will come after me. The fights ahead of us are only just beginning — and I’m counting on folks like you to ensure that we can stay in this together when the going gets tough. If you’re able, please chip in $10 or any amount you’re able to support my fight for our democracy and accountability for authoritarian, MAGA Republicans. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you. Yours in this fight, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=70cd5860079e4128902028ecc1542cdd&_e=9n5SJnyoLr5bO-8hLTk5ZNYiPcTeKgR4UsO4guybNOceUKW9NJhpiY8kCdGch6GE2UhhBguLncujwmRshFcKse_hi-3h_pgpHQpKP6fSOtu36fePkJJ3sZHToXXftToFYfJ90dE5mZyvImZUBHtOj3BGzOLlsESjOABcyPVCVt6gWB3wbvdaKt9sN1N9lgXj284CxEyEroJ4pHM7FxBcLFC1_tR_TRPkgjIhVaxkiUAXog4FT257y9mLBWP9X8qABBEavGIUxGcgv99JYxj9J0PitNaa7dz79lLbK6P010e_wVPVxjtGomedGNGp6YrF)

_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,
_with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=70cd5860079e4128902028ecc1542cdd&_e=9n5SJnyoLr5bO-8hLTk5ZNYiPcTeKgR4UsO4guybNOceUKW9NJhpiY8kCdGch6GE2UhhBguLncujwmRshFcKse_hi-3h_pgpHQpKP6fSOtu36fePkJJ3sZHToXXftToFYfJ90dE5mZyvImZUBHtOj8AXeaEHDnH9nWAj3SSuH4rF35PdNZBmsTyh5W3PRF_nhu6hIYT_4ZpNuypHFROtWtqkjpqhEYJ3aEGH1MyTcTRtv8OUtxrntkoomRFOjiqZ3ij1kwVkMGHRWK4LqZ5JSRnoX2RkDjUU-jzmp_r3vhOHSAkYnz8oKeBhRvOR9BNT)

I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? clean_body: | | | Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,The College Scam. I was proud to share my new book, The College Scam, with President Donald Trump. I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the BIGGEST and most IMPACTFUL pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states. And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives. I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,The College Scam. Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with The College Scam to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read The College Scam, you'll learn: my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War! The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War! Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Senator Mallory McMorrow
subject: Here’s what we’re doing in Michigan:
body:
Hi - it’s Michigan State Senator, Mallory McMorrow. | | |

| | Hey there! It’s Mallory. I got my start in politics after the 2016 election, when I realized I needed to get involved for the future of my community. I didn’t know the first thing about running for office – I literally had to Google it. But with some help from the community around me, I ran, I knocked doors (my favorite part about campaigning), and we won.
And despite all that, in my first term, I introduced 49 bills... none of which got a hearing from my Republican colleagues.
**It wasn’t an easy road to this trifecta, but I’m so proud that today, me and my fellow Democrats are creating a Michigan where everyone gets a chance to thrive.**
This work is only possible when voters and grassroots supporters act – and you did just that in November. I’m determined to build on this historic midterm win with my colleagues and use our Democratic power for good.
It’s far from over, though – thousands of state legislative seats in Michigan and across the country will be up for grabs over the course of the next two years.
**[I know this has been a long email – I swear I’m almost done – but I want to ask one last time: Will you join me and the DLCC in doing the critical work needed to elect Democrats? Your gift today could help create our next Democratic trifectas >>](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wBl3kZoWeoGTW37upJLsvUG6yaN_gbTU_a3nd_gJk16WcesVFKiwzRAQJ2Ato9cbeTJQAK_jeTb_i3rwfAe6vnnS62i1Mc5L3_WXoi8bAwdgkp5WXmQipxvpnTlazshTAQ0q0Kyhfve6on5f3X9EeA-adu0sfs8_0CCGE1znNneAvXfRwu10fTESAoyegC8lrEL7GMGdowOX7JlInt46Rjhpv0u9qvMI2PVx0StMQ3I1iIM1rA_rTVxQivXJSBzkYtK7x7Lq93ow9A7MHnK6v8CFFItUuLZA9T-TUKVnrboHGR01QnKl4q95V-nHF-isMlSQPnr0ZOPjEc-raOHOhtam0F3T1EewYMYx99NyWgxyWRuEnfVya4dyWV27Urd2rjmVoJY40pQnyRW8eZUZSg/3te/nLgc5d91TY2ISZY5_0t2eA/h7/KtwB8UkKMTA4SglnPkRer5pUCpHcbqmBnGaru1-wNbs)**

Kevin McCarthy kept his word, Peter.

**After 4 proud years of service, I was just removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee.**

I want to be perfectly clear: This political stunt is a personal one — the result of years of xenophobic, Islamophobic, and racist attacks that started the moment I was elected.

The far-right have spent millions of dollars in campaign ads against our movement stoking fear and division, and a constant stream of hateful and violent rhetoric has led to hundreds of death threats against me and my family.

Now, in their latest move, they've attempted to silence my voice and begin undoing the incredible progress our movement has helped make both at home and abroad.

I'm here to tell you that's not going to happen.

**My commitment to justice for all people across the globe — no matter their race, religion, nationality, or anything else — does not begin or end with a committee assignment.**

The simple truth is that McCarthy's actions to remove me from the Foreign Affairs Committee does absolutely nothing to address the issues our constituents deal with at home, or to promote the well-being of people around the world.

What it does is further enable his party's hatred and corruption, and promote fear and violence against Somali-Americans, Muslims, immigrants, and anyone else who shares my identity all across the country.

We already know that these attacks are just beginning, which is why it's so important that our progressive movement stays united, and is ready and able to fight back. So please:

[Will you split a contribution — of $10 or any amount you can — between our campaign and The Collective PAC so we have the resources required to stand up to Kevin McCarthy and his far-right Republican allies? Nobody — not Kevin McCarthy, not the Republican Party, not the billionaires who fund them — will ever stop me in my fight for a more equitable, just, and peaceful world.

From tirelessly advocating for policies like a Green New Deal and Medicare for All at home, to standing up against violence and injustice worldwide, I promise that nothing will stand in the way of me doing what the people of Minnesota's 5th district elected me to do.

Thank you, as always, for being a part of our fight.

In solidarity,

Ilhan Omar

If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Kevin McCarthy kept his word, Peter. After 4 proud years of service, I was just removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee. I want to be perfectly clear: This political stunt is a personal one — the result of years of xenophobic, Islamophobic, and racist attacks that started the moment I was elected. The far-right have spent millions of dollars in campaign ads against our movement stoking fear and division, and a constant stream of hateful and violent rhetoric has led to hundreds of death threats against me and my family. Now, in their latest move, they've attempted to silence my voice and begin undoing the incredible progress our movement has helped make both at home and abroad. I'm here to tell you that's not going to happen. My commitment to justice for all people across the globe — no matter their race, religion, nationality, or anything else — does not begin or end with a committee assignment. The simple truth is that McCarthy's actions to remove me from the Foreign Affairs Committee does absolutely nothing to address the issues our constituents deal with at home, or to promote the well-being of people around the world. What it does is further enable his party's hatred and corruption, and promote fear and violence against Somali-Americans, Muslims, immigrants, and anyone else who shares my identity all across the country. We already know that these attacks are just beginning, which is why it's so important that our progressive movement stays united, and is ready and able to fight back. ---
A Chinese spy balloon over Montana is just the latest way the Chinese Communist Party is spying on Americans and weaseling their way into your homes.

_And intelligence officials have confirmed that they saw even MORE balloons just like this one over Hawaii and Guam._

**I’m sounding the alarm: it’s time to take action on the CCP, and I need your help.**

Friend,

It's official. I'm making a special announcement in 12 days.

The survival of America matters. That's why I've never stopped standing for America, and I never will. America is the greatest force for good in human history, and we should never be ashamed to say that.

**[Before I make my special announcement on February 15, I am asking you to add your name to a special list of supporters.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zm524en4jrdub17l87pbsu6fe2j7j3f3kkr3h3d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c5hmep73cdh2bs "Before I make my special announcement on February 15, I am asking you to add your name to a special list of supporters.")**

---
| | **COVID Abuse And Fraud 😑**
---
| |
---
What do dead folks, terrorists, drug cartels, and human traffickers have in common? They all have successfully siphoned [billions](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1bd8fce47ce6434ea76913ed0e4bac5e&_e=vWS51ZEZGdSe_RKWW5KDgNsO3-b-7xtuw5Zs1RnvwKfISfYII8lP8knoIbupP2plm2C52jkY2LRT0pK2tFVJAi0o-vvyTo5vagpbX1KOAc8rDfJQcsQhx1NQ0OfjSqmhWa-wGT6ZbmP9vjxb19E41GYGjQQrLZOo4HOo8Hg9spt4g5E1l72G7BLmb17xZPid2Rb_EDz7MLPATgoz6nVC0bXWsrjoVvsf3vxhpigDjRCUg76fJ0XloSCrQBBFYMT79kcEDBlxWiUO_4EQmJdfJw%3D%3D) from the U.S. Government for COVID “relief.” This week, the abuse and fraud of [$560 billion](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1bd8fce47ce6434ea76913ed0e4bac5e&_e=vWS51ZEZGdSe_RKWW5KDgAnjhrGeApxZKiOxKhgwx1-GJLRytM7EM0JO7LuDxgFPjRuuqmVgSekGWVIKfOJw_xhjYjifKWi9K0nq6QoMirwZJyrzJFu-OkYYbLJvfhbJEbs42ykRJVHWaX4r6sCm83yKkN1X5tumJ5FWzl9Yi8-2WqP8bjeg4fWOFlTllo6s7lqLNNNz_Ro9wcBrMYPmIGKlUbdnes1yQWxbBsj3MqicD2QHqz2MnPpPNOaLoirFDUIydIr74pvlMdDmYWH6iHXSE-76WKsXb5yjWG9jeFgkR88Y2XZ9XOI-hj9bwBOg) taxpayer dollars were brought before my congressional colleagues and me in the House Oversight Committee—and I had questions.
* Did this worldwide theft fund terrorist organizations?
* Was this COVID cash used in sex trafficking and drug smuggling operations?
* How many foreign nationals received unwarranted payments in haste to get our money out the door?

The answers I received will make your blood boil. Billions and billions of this rushed COVID “relief” was indeed found to be used in all corners of the world by foreign dirtbags to fuel their evil corruption of sex and drug trafficking. All the while, Democrats have allowed these snakes in the grass to continue to rob us blind by [extending](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1bd8fce47ce6434ea76913ed0e4bac5e&_e=vWS51ZEZGdSe_RKWW5KDgCLFL3UiH7k2XuxTzyiSeJHQF6_BJUScqgrE5bucX7vXrVM7gnK1A2PuH13cNuZopD_QrVzkt3ti4kpwzdn81Z2SvfY6aCrfJukalW2J0bEoeDakf65BeNquZp_9K3O5H11CdlssykBmixd3edyQs5mOJJxn6F1UxQkqvhQKGhSfI2CnVlOrONiNIPWnhN5udvJPTBw14C5k7uwWD2nKQRxE03hnYAUMyVC2NoiRaPQg7H_BFVPEmSZQ8ZB-MOPnZw%3D%3D) the COVID emergency deadline _again_. That is lunacy!
With no security checks, no oversight, and flat-out dangerous government incompetence, this appalling spending spree must come to an end. President Biden [said it himself](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1bd8fce47ce6434ea76913ed0e4bac5e&_e=vWS51ZEZGdSe_RKWW5KDgCiSJcX-Fof5oGGTQQ5Av_Hh_tq0BHpBTU8NOWbsImlm3ZqUPrNIysieAtIJHbvi8YOhGqKQp8RPbHL7WZKRjcPz8WsDCCyTL5TtuDIGgmi1bhMkqRlHQG_9yAOgEw8ICaI9nwuAObT33On6SHp4li2cg4Wq5dFAn37s9oGbAXrNYrFLEVktOv6n8nzCJbcwswK1WxQnvurDvEQrD32BsAfkzX5-4zf8tf4WGbI3GPQ0CJDrQpbtb6GpOWJY-jNRrA%3D%3D); the pandemic is over; let’s start acting like it.
---
| | |
---
| | **Deputy Chief Cindy Gass 🤩**
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1bd8fce47ce6434ea76913ed0e4bac5e&_e=vWS51ZEZGdSe_RKWW5KDgJXNRQ_kFlczagTeSoQbhCBKPHd1f9nSmlwZ3Jd5MDvVsx26xUVzBl7p_1UnAREZuuGLrc5Hv7ouRpLOLvsmkSnmUWQRhum6WOZ74ll1M6bkI5JjCJe3dO3lD3NGxSPzOmmC7q5E0QMxKtC_KZYHbAFtNbV295LtKBgeVRuhGehghyA5t1_W5bHKC7_Sh0kghnhJI0FuSV0ElElN_CqY93XS9lLjcgwmE_NZvuKXGC-nQXj58uT1OWIdRXPpJjoZugBC9rW-Bu__7eaFXh7Pg3rbMnSk6TtnUboKlo2efO777QPdGHtz6-rBIwxCznemfQ%3D%3D)
---
I want to give a special shoutout to [Deputy Chief Cindy Gass](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1bd8fce47ce6434ea76913ed0e4bac5e&_e=vWS51ZEZGdSe_RKWW5KDgJXNRQ_kFlczagTeSoQbhCBKPHd1f9nSmlwZ3Jd5MDvVsx26xUVzBl7p_1UnAREZuuGLrc5Hv7ouRpLOLvsmkSnmUWQRhum6WOZ74ll1M6bkI5JjCJe3dO3lD3NGxSPzOmmC7q5E0QMxKtC_KZYHbAF9qg4_yFPf8zydfjZGvlUhao2f_cySCu1Rq3d1PnFLw23sKj11h5n7eaw2f4S8M2WVAMIEsDehaLP0DfJ8hqdmNq9CmavqQDrsCVTwQgkY774dtdhiqANQRdOT2YoXWvtmmCIWclUgJv3Gs8NJuDqCGvm1-IFmBc-iELf0lLhfeQ%3D%3D) for her dedication of nearly 50 years to the Knoxville Police Department, including 43 as an officer. From meeting her husband on the force to championing the department’s efforts to support the mental and emotional wellness of officers—Gass has certainly made a legacy for herself of spreading love and light across KPD and the Knoxville community as the department’s first female deputy chief. Thank you for your service, ma’am.
---

From meeting her husband on the force to championing the department’s efforts to support the mental and emotional wellness of officers—Gass has certainly made a legacy for herself of spreading love and light across KPD and the Knoxville community as the department’s first female deputy chief. Thank you for your service, ma’am. | | | | | Just For Fun 🎉 | | → The most supportive best friend 💖🥺 () → An angel here on Earth 🇺🇸😄 ()→ Skills 💪😅 () | | | | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | | | | Please chip in today to help us oust radical Democrats and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress**

**This is urgent: Experts are calling the Wisconsin Supreme Court election the most high-stakes race of 2023 – and it’s coming up in just a matter of _weeks_.**

We cannot afford to ignore this race. The outcome will have huge consequences for issues like:
* Whether Wisconsin conservatives will be allowed to enforce an abortion ban that was passed _before the Civil War_.
* Whether the court will uphold maps that are so gerrymandered, Republicans nearly won supermajorities in both chambers in the legislature – despite Democrats winning the statewide vote for governor!
* **And, crucially, whether Republican lawmakers can ignore the will of Wisconsin voters by overturning the state’s 2024 presidential election results.**

clean_body: abortion rights, voting rights, and the 2024 election are on the line | | = = This is urgent: Experts are calling the Wisconsin Supreme Court election the most high-stakes race of 2023 – and it’s coming up in just a matter of weeks. We cannot afford to ignore this race. The outcome will have huge consequences for issues like: Whether Wisconsin conservatives will be allowed to enforce an abortion ban that was passed before the Civil War. Whether the court will uphold maps that are so gerrymandered, Republicans nearly won supermajorities in both chambers in the legislature – despite Democrats winning the statewide vote for governor! And, crucially, whether Republican lawmakers can ignore the will of Wisconsin voters by overturning the state’s 2024 presidential election results. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We’re counting on you. – The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: Our right to choose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
The GOP House majority is barely a month old, and already, we’ve seen multiple efforts to harm women’s health care and take away the right to an abortion.

Friend, The GOP House majority is barely a month old, and already, we’ve seen multiple efforts to harm women’s health care and take away the right to an abortion. I want you to know that I am going to fight like hell to defeat any attempt to restrict the right to choose. And I’m going to keep working until we restore that right for every single American, no matter how long it takes. But the truth is, friend, when it comes to defending our rights, elections matter. And we need to win this next one if we’re going to retake control of Congress and elect a pro-choice majority that can begin reversing the damage of the disastrous Supreme Court decision in Dobbs. **[I can’t win this fight alone, friend, and that’s why I’m asking for your support today. Will you split a $20 contribution — or any amount that works for you — between my campaign and John Hickenlooper and stand with us in our work to defend every American’s right to choose?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58223542/390442343/-182398489?refcode=email_020322_bp-hick-choice-split&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2NlODIyYi1mNmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=di7EKCBDhopC8zEpBy-iBT4Gw5YaSI5NRmdMH_yM8pc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58223543/390442344/-182398489?refcode=email_020322_bp-hick-choice-split&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2NlODIyYi1mNmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=di7EKCBDhopC8zEpBy-iBT4Gw5YaSI5NRmdMH_yM8pc=)

We know that when it comes to abortion rights, the vast majority of the American people are on our side.
But if we’re going to fight back against right-wing efforts to take away our basic freedoms, it’s going to take all of us making our voices heard and doing our part.
**[If you could take a moment today to help power our work fighting for abortion rights, I would be very grateful, Team.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58223549/390442350/-1375591314?refcode=email_020322_bp-hick-choice-split&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2NlODIyYi1mNmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=di7EKCBDhopC8zEpBy-iBT4Gw5YaSI5NRmdMH_yM8pc=)**
It’s going to be an uphill fight, but together, we can do this.
Thank you,
Brittany Pettersen
Congresswoman, Colorado’s 7th District

Peter, this is urgent. Republicans introduced a new bill into the House and the Senate that would set up a deceitful and harmful anti-abortion website run by the federal government. Not only would it sneakily direct pregnant people looking for resources to crisis pregnancy centers — _“clinics” run by forced birth extremists designed to talk you out of having an abortion_ — it would also collect data on those very same people, including their location and contact information, and then **allow someone from the government to get in touch and further dissuade them from having an abortion. ** This is despicable, dystopian nightmare stuff. The last thing we need is the federal government keeping data on pregnant people in this country — especially when the threat of a national abortion ban looms overhead.
