name: Replace Sinema
subject: NEWS: Sinema Ethics inquiry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter, Remember that over the top, 37-page staffing memo of Kyrsten Sinema’s? The one that outlines how often she gets massages (once a week, for one hour, “in the middle of the legislative work day”), how much time is allotted to constituents (“usually no longer than three minutes”), and even the “exact right dimensions” of hotel swimming pools? Now, several concerned groups have asked the Senate Ethics Committee to investigate whether Sinema’s outrageous demands on her staff amount to a violation of the law or Senate rules. If Sinema is requiring her government staff to run personal errands (like calling Verizon to fix her apartment’s internet), that would be a clear violation and abuse of taxpayer dollars. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fc3oihH7eL0URA7EmTABm6y6vaZGLP4_LsKGvD1f55gzb2buH7wI1naHHQyBPtyTD4O8xAgHf8CT2tvAVKs6Z73lHGjRg-WNMIBFNpyb8YJ7nyOBwN_sOGHtlpKI3KP1Uf3zvWggmZqNDKODX7zGw1Nqnuve9if5Q-LGBrmAOyLnDUVinFaOUrYYG1T5PtcE6Kdo_o49Huq-zAChEitQBpx8IgUUkyGjPS9Msvxyo2JoVJoATqlXHnei3KH67jvlFF5XQryfoCjTdBhNeI2GOpFFmnApvxf9lfUKEHUfkjZuU/3te/hB-mhbDuSDmyz7GeGE08IQ/h0/XpCHkqsTlAMiHv2VcQ3A8X4WIOCakEs9Z5Y6GSJ1vlI)
**[Help us get the message out across Arizona that Sinema has got to go >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fc3oihH7eL0URA7EmTABm6y-or3u7qxFBVIuSvZfH47cx4lXurawdyBI0pT0U443yoSd7Tdjn97gNH_QaUTEQ5pOqx8zzDmoTYWz6QvnlEHUkLLppzeu1zB3W9-1ZBpGn8bzHcDY5KC7vHSXLDgdUIz_JaQPX98x-L2mqRezlPZExJWmf6Ih4pYiiFbf5T4Btto-HDqMijHpqDXwquFmaLCIwReSPT0WdvNy2cjL2D7phvGWeVjV0bkH1HhCrpy-By1ADzZOgLompiErjuVGihwczQOkrNSVLR7kxZckSWidU/3te/hB-mhbDuSDmyz7GeGE08IQ/h1/6po6rohaFqLpjt2D5ANivv9xDZ0ACVMq_wtzPHfpDIs)** The letter to the Senate Ethics Committee is signed by more than a dozen groups, including several based in Arizona: _“Given that many of the activities that the Senator has allegedly required of staff appear to be unambiguous violations of Senate Ethics Committee guidelines that interpret the rules adopted by the Senate pursuant to the Constitution, you can understand that we find the allegations concerning. In the public interest, we ask that the Committee conduct a comprehensive and fair investigation and, in the event that these concerns are substantiated, we ask the Committee to take remedial action._ _“The allegations stem from a 37-page memo [...] It indicates that staff are required, as a condition of their jobs, to carry out numerous tasks that are outside the scope of public employment, including doing personal errands for the Senator, carrying out household tasks at her private residence, and advancing their own funds for her personal purchases. [...]_ _“And, most troubling, it calls on staff members, who are employed and paid by the public and explicitly barred from campaign activity, to schedule and facilitate political fundraisers and meetings with campaign donors, presumably during the workday while they are on the clock and physically on federal property.”_ It raises the question: is Sinema abusing taxpayer resources or violating Senate rules and the law? The Ethics Committee has a duty to investigate these claims against Sinema to hold her accountable and restore trust in Arizona leadership. In the meantime, we’re going to make sure EVERY Arizonan knows that Kyrsten Sinema has put herself first – and her constituents last. **[Chip in now >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fc3oihH7eL0URA7EmTABm6y5G2dxGo7UEXPyFZBt_2SZj9UOwbP1ypWCSkDvlHHyE_lYLz3C9YM4e2gfwQXqOLcGG0gj1xZRZR0ZppWyt9pfUw6twc-9FAj0sQ07R_k7W8cnKCRPgWNm1we_EFaD0SMDF6O__ukUmCa61dBN6Ls4quiZaGQWQa491tu0B1XnWjC1gTMaO9gjVVg7obsiEahSCYj2P1D0GH3nOsz7YQzuO4V9RWSsM0thDPoKd9csfyTRe0jZj_fmmejn-NNF2XEaZL6voBCRSHNqewrWDcdYg/3te/hB-mhbDuSDmyz7GeGE08IQ/h2/CkGDzT4fLk5e4XUe4jVsq0iZyfhq2QbIa9z_w2I3uNQ)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $7 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcWiFePWfv21JYx-bTueC7nDu8fYcv-_lRisTXFrCG_j-zsjeyXi6aABHf9IOdH5sUF0ltAqdY1JejcElpOibDzOa5Swn0LyWSm9SbZVEZETWnAsKUpFFppslkfWSYp0SlCPnXPWhUT1aqdQ6myeSBM2xLFnocHcKlFD7hTwekSAe_l6mbCCq-RNAbhicJOfxaa55AnkIgby36DoCmlajj2XrYUr5CTu6hpzvK8IZfKmmdCdiEd1haAHEusUNZSZIXOuPV9_dNwlPjwJjP243KUB1-RjUukiiYIHeanm3lxet_T4W24wsc3R0ErptcZ-MrPkGmsO7q9dMm_GcwEScz9iiXJ679g39badfSrY5gzyg/3te/hB-mhbDuSDmyz7GeGE08IQ/h3/80590Lj2h6oMBjkDoLhXy6_cmNQuEI67guyecW3oEoA)

clean_body: | | Peter, Remember that over the top, 37-page staffing memo of Kyrsten Sinema’s? The one that outlines how often she gets massages (once a week, for one hour, “in the middle of the legislative work day”), how much time is allotted to constituents (“usually no longer than three minutes”), and even the “exact right dimensions” of hotel swimming pools? Now, several concerned groups have asked the Senate Ethics Committee to investigate whether Sinema’s outrageous demands on her staff amount to a violation of the law or Senate rules. If Sinema is requiring her government staff to run personal errands (like calling Verizon to fix her apartment’s internet), that would be a clear violation and abuse of taxpayer dollars. The letter to the Senate Ethics Committee is signed by more than a dozen groups, including several based in Arizona: “Given that many of the activities that the Senator has allegedly required of staff appear to be unambiguous violations of Senate Ethics Committee guidelines that interpret the rules adopted by the Senate pursuant to the Constitution, you can understand that we find the allegations concerning. In the public interest, we ask that the Committee conduct a comprehensive and fair investigation and, in the event that these concerns are substantiated, we ask the Committee to take remedial action. “The allegations stem from a 37-page memo [...] It indicates that staff are required, as a condition of their jobs, to carry out numerous tasks that are outside the scope of public employment, including doing personal errands for the Senator, carrying out household tasks at her private residence, and advancing their own funds for her personal purchases. [...] “And, most troubling, it calls on staff members, who are employed and paid by the public and explicitly barred from campaign activity, to schedule and facilitate political fundraisers and meetings with campaign donors, presumably during the workday while they are on the clock and physically on federal property.” It raises the question: is Sinema abusing taxpayer resources or violating Senate rules and the law? The Ethics Committee has a duty to investigate these claims against Sinema to hold her accountable and restore trust in Arizona leadership. In the meantime, we’re going to make sure EVERY Arizonan knows that Kyrsten Sinema has put herself first – and her constituents last. name: Adrastos, Campaign Manager for Team Cori
subject: Photos inside 🤳
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
The real life-or-death impact of the Republican’s obsessive attacks on the LGBTQIA2S+ community.
#
Peter,
Last month, Team Cori visited Los Angeles to call out the real life-or-death impact of the Republican’s obsessive attacks on the LGBTQIA2S+ community through legislation that attempts to criminalize vulnerable students, parents, health care providers, and members of the Trans community.
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230203.RDoYHb&amount=5&refcode=em20230203-2119&t=1&akid=2119%2E1082990%2EDe0UWz)
The event was a huge success.**We left energized to accelerate our efforts to ensure our policy goals of eviction relief, passing The Unhoused Bill of Rights, and ending the racist, homophobic, and transphobic discriminatory housing policies and practices in place at the city, state, and national level.** But we cannot do this without support from activists like you.
[**Your support can move these policies into practice. Help us spread the word about the issues _and_ Cori’s proposed solutions with a contribution of $5 today.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230203.RDoYHb&amount=5&refcode=em20230203-2119&t=2&akid=2119%2E1082990%2EDe0UWz)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230203.RDoYHb&amount=5&refcode=em20230203-2119&t=21&akid=2119%2E1082990%2EDe0UWz)**
**Republican attacks on our LGBTQIA2S+ community have already had a devastating impact. Here’s the harsh reality:**
* **Violence:** LGBTQIA2S+ people are 4 times more likely than non-LGBTQIA2S+ people to experience violent victimization. Over 40% of LGBTQIA2S+ adults have been physically or sexually assaulted, or have had money or possessions stolen.
* **Abuse and discrimination is prevalent:** More than half of LGBTQIA2S+ people have experienced threats of violence, and 75% have been verbally insulted or abused. Community members are much more likely to experience hate crimes than non-LGBTQIA2S+ people. Nearly half of LGBTQIA2S+ workers have experienced mistreatment in the workplace based on their identity. Black, Brown, and Indigenous LGBTQIA2S+ people and transgender people have experienced particularly high rates of workplace discrimination and harassment.
* **Housing insecurity disproportionately impacts the LGBTQIA2S+ community:** Rates of homelessness among LGBTQIA2S+ adults are 8 times higher than cisgender, heterosexual adults. This community is twice as likely as the general population to experience being unhoused in their lifetime.

**These are the issues you’ve heard Cori address before on the floor of Congress, during campaign events, and in her community.** She’ll never back down on protecting our rights. But we need your help to stand up to loud, resource-dense opponents who spread hate and sow division.
[**Stand up and fight back with a contribution of $5 today.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230203.RDoYHb&amount=5&refcode=em20230203-2119&t=22&akid=2119%2E1082990%2EDe0UWz)
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230203.RDoYHb&amount=5&refcode=em20230203-2119&t=23&akid=2119%2E1082990%2EDe0UWz)
In Solidarity,
Adrastos Da Silva
Campaign Manager, Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230203?refcode=em20230203-2119-footer&t=24&refcode2=2119_1082990_De0UWz&akid=2119%2E1082990%2EDe0UWz) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

attacks from Kevin McCarthy and other Republicans.

Committee, Hakeem Jeffries said: “Rep. Omar certainly has made mistakes.”

Let us be clear: We unequivocally stand with Ilhan and will continue to
support her as she endures hate-filled, hypocritical attacks from the GOP.

Friend,
The Washington Swamp has put YOU dead last.
_It’s the truth._ Violent criminals, illegal aliens, and foreign nations are treated better by the federal government than law-abiding citizens like YOU.
But when we win back the White House in 2024, American citizens will once again have a powerful voice in our country.
That’s why I want YOU to play a major role in crafting my Official 2024 Campaign Platform.

But soon, that’s all about to change.

clean_body: You can have a say in my OFFICIAL 2024 Platform. | | | Friend, The Washington Swamp has put YOU dead last. It’s the truth. Violent criminals, illegal aliens, and foreign nations are treated better by the federal government than law-abiding citizens like YOU. But when we win back the White House in 2024, American citizens will once again have a powerful voice in our country. That’s why I want YOU to play a major role in crafting my Official 2024 Campaign Platform. | Washington has sent BILLIONS of dollars to secure borders in far-away lands – only to leave our own border wide open for murderers, human traffickers, and the vicious drug cartels. While our economy gets ravaged by record-high inflation, our government keeps saddling our nation with debt and sending BILLIONS of dollars to foreign nations. Violent criminals are released from prison to terrorize innocent citizens – all while YOUR First and Second Amendment rights are under siege. And now, our federal government is even letting Communist China buy up America’s farmland, food supply, minerals, and energy – and surveil Americans undeterred. But soon, that’s all about to change. When I am your President, hardworking, honest American citizens will once again be at the forefront of our country. That’s why I need to hear from YOU right now to ensure that our America First movement fights for YOUR top priorities. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Friend,

It's official. I'm making a special announcement in 12 days.

The survival of America matters. That's why I've never stopped standing for America, and I never will. America is the greatest force for good in human history, and we should never be ashamed to say that.

Friend,

It's official. I'm making a special announcement in 12 days.

The survival of America matters. That's why I've never stopped standing for America, and I never will. America is the greatest force for good in human history, and we should never be ashamed to say that.

**[Before I make my special announcement on February 15, I am asking you to add your name to a special list of supporters.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2b64800e8084835a8ef873d38079f51&_e=fjsf3D3GBQoh3pVQIv7jcOq_-oUTkSp7pMTKPi1lrlBJ6o4GoTZtdl9c4RVgVkfemWBGrNLe2B535gm2kqUwlBa_0LjqKRUxhDZE9LDcvWb2ZCKzfw2uiY3lv14Fpm8RSR4Tvua1811U8-f3M0cCtKeOFDlaCkfpkSMBH84WjI-W2Law1o3TKgPvbvi13iESNTAhFA_3NBzADuGoErg95I2Pyyiq239z0kXL09apMosByncxoHf4T_WaKFjySyCgFMZyKSBIHybJY6i3msgWuuPKltKB6hbboIm5pyPftffI51eYw1QwJJY9IJV8eH6wIqT1INsnSwXRgiMkdjRrHU5HCF0dsWVkuF2OfBtP0AVHph9DpQs7u_fBUhBnPVVcP6MSgVbFfPYIhufufzAPcSlGediWIT9i8wCX_YM-D0sjN31HtWdjxIosct-oFSzlTtBXsF3AjYzzoAENeE8fF3lUQ1643LMbNxqZM8-7J71EqIsM-i5_-fjabWV5Z7zBKIDvvNmitlEb-YzJ-tU4J5fSy2JqsJ8NojABRdKARSokq2F2Z09GH9Tp87RU48aEMg0DNVne6EWLGbMQttckKITVq4DAm3kC9nYxM3qjJHigwD2R3N0TD2J4vSMsY3iAUox-UxTylv9zG46DYONNfA%3D%3D "Before I make my special announcement on February 15, I am asking you to add your name to a special list of supporters.")**

subject: Sign now: Don't Let George Santos Have Access to Classified Materials
body:
2 minutes

| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T12240dd2-5b50-4cae-9ace-482b95e5f9ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Representative George Santos has lied about his work, his education, and almost everything else. And there are BIG questions as to where he suddenly got hundreds of thousands of dollars to fund his campaign.

[**Which is why he should never, ever have access to classified information: click to sign if you agree.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d3d70ce-0c08-4cc5-88e5-5d5916ee4e35/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1ce81840-9e38-4b92-8704-d166ffc5836e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| America can't risk putting its national security in the hands of someone like Santos. And Speaker Kevin McCarthy must not give him assignments or any other positions that give him access to this sensitive information. [His fellow House members have called for this](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te3df4414-b988-4975-becb-d969034bd734/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), and we agree 100%.

[**Send McCarthy a message: Keep George Santos away from classified materials.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a041729-400e-4cbe-9fc1-edaf16fc2c59/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for joining us and our friends at Left Action to safeguard our national security, Cliff

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2acbf11-9d0a-4dab-bb0d-a5d6dd60080b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Giffords.org
subject: [SIGN ON] Reject permitless carry in the state of Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This year, Florida could be the 26th state to allow permitless carry.
#

Friends -
This week, extremist Republicans in the Florida legislature introduced permitless carry legislation—the same day a mass shooting took place in the town of Lakeland, Florida.
If permitless carry passes in Florida, this legislation would allow almost anyone to carry a gun in public without a background check, any training, or having ever fired a gun.
Rights like gun ownership come with responsibilities. Training, licensing, and a background check to carry in public is just common sense.
It’s normal practice for states to require a certain number of training hours to do a job or provide a service. For instance, Florida requires 1,200 hours of training to obtain a license to cut hair, 500 hours of training to obtain a massage therapist license, and 240 hours of training to become a licensed manicurist.
But if Florida passes permitless carry, the state will require **zero** hours of training for someone to carry a loaded firearm in public.
[**We need to show extremist Republicans in Florida that we disapprove of this dangerous legislation. Will you add your name to our petition today and join us in fighting back against permitless carry in Florida?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/feb23-permitlesscarry-pet/?source=em230203-1-15&refcode2=4214.3935704.aG0_TT&akid=4214%2E3935704%2EaG0_TT)

A variety of research has been conducted about the impact of concealed carry laws on public safety. A comprehensive study from 2019 found that in states with weak permitting laws, violent crime rates were 13% to 15% higher than predicted if these such laws had not been in place.
More states are bowing to the gun lobby and passing dangerous laws like permitless carry. At a time where nearly 43,000 Americans are killed each year from gun violence, this is unacceptable.
We need to fight for stronger gun laws, not weak ones that will allow guns to fall into the wrong hands. It’s going to take **_a lot**_ of resources to fight back against Florida Governor Ron DeSantis and this dangerous legislation.
[**Are you with us? Sign on today to reject permitless carry in the state of Florida.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/feb23-permitlesscarry-pet/?source=em230203-1-15&refcode2=4214.3935704.aG0_TT&akid=4214%2E3935704%2EaG0_TT)

clean_body: This year, Florida could be the 26th state to allow permitless carry. Friends - This week, extremist Republicans in the Florida legislature introduced permitless carry legislation—the same day a mass shooting took place in the town of Lakeland, Florida. If permitless carry passes in Florida, this legislation would allow almost anyone to carry a gun in public without a background check, any training, or having ever fired a gun. Rights like gun ownership come with responsibilities. Training, licensing, and a background check to carry in public is just common sense. It’s normal practice for states to require a certain number of training hours to do a job or provide a service. For instance, Florida requires 1,200 hours of training to obtain a license to cut hair, 500 hours of training to obtain a massage therapist license, and 240 hours of training to become a licensed manicurist. But if Florida passes permitless carry, the state will require zero hours of training for someone to carry a loaded firearm in public. A variety of research has been conducted about the impact of concealed carry laws on public safety. A comprehensive study from 2019 found that in states with weak permitting laws, violent crime rates were 13% to 15% higher than predicted if these such laws had not been in place. More states are bowing to the gun lobby and passing dangerous laws like permitless carry. At a time where nearly 43,000 Americans are killed each year from gun violence, this is unacceptable. We need to fight for stronger gun laws, not weak ones that will allow guns to fall into the wrong hands. It’s going to take a lot of resources to fight back against Florida Governor Ron DeSantis and this dangerous legislation. Thank you for using your voice. \- The team at Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley’s record on Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Hint: It’s not good.
#
Peter — Josh Hawley has been going around DC this week acting like he’s a champion for Social Security. **But his record speaks for itself:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27696?refcode=em20230203-2806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2806%2E614464%2EyfhIKz)
Republican politicians like Hawley had no problem spending trillions on subsidies, bailouts, and tax breaks for Wall Street, Big Tech, and Big Oil — all the industries responsible for stripping our communities for parts. But now, when it comes to fulfilling their promise to working Americans, they squabble over every penny.
**When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll fight like hell to protect Social Security and give our seniors what they’re owed.[If you’re with me, please add your first $10 donation to my grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s Senate seat today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27696?refcode=em20230203-2806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2806%2E614464%2EyfhIKz)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27697?refcode=em20230203-2806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=2806%2E614464%2EyfhIKz) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27697?refcode=em20230203-2806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=2806%2E614464%2EyfhIKz) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27697?refcode=em20230203-2806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=2806%2E614464%2EyfhIKz) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27697?refcode=em20230203-2806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=2806%2E614464%2EyfhIKz) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27697?refcode=em20230203-2806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=2806%2E614464%2EyfhIKz) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27697?refcode=em20230203-2806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=2806%2E614464%2EyfhIKz) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27696?refcode=em20230203-2806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=2806%2E614464%2EyfhIKz)
---
**Any politician who says we can’t afford to deliver the American people what they’re owed is a liar.**
When I’m in the U.S. Senate, you’ll never have to wonder if I’m fighting for everyday Americans over the massive corporations tearing our country up — and the corrupt politicians standing in my way won’t have to wonder either.
Let’s flip this seat and take back power for working people across the country.
Thanks for standing with me,
— Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230203-2806-footer&t=10&refcode2=2806_614464_yfhIKz&akid=2806%2E614464%2EyfhIKz)**

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=2806%2E614464%2EyfhIKz). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

clean_body: Hint: It’s not good. Peter — Josh Hawley has been going around DC this week acting like he’s a champion for Social Security. But his record speaks for itself: Republican politicians like Hawley had no problem spending trillions on subsidies, bailouts, and tax breaks for Wall Street, Big Tech, and Big Oil — all the industries responsible for stripping our communities for parts. But now, when it comes to fulfilling their promise to working Americans, they squabble over every penny. When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll fight like hell to protect Social Security and give our seniors what they’re owed. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Any politician who says we can’t afford to deliver the American people what they’re owed is a liar. When I’m in the U.S. Senate, you’ll never have to wonder if I’m fighting for everyday Americans over the massive corporations tearing our country up — and the corrupt politicians standing in my way won’t have to wonder either. Let’s flip this seat and take back power for working people across the country. Thanks for standing with me, — Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

| Team,

We know the 2022 cycle was a tough one, but the results are already showing up.

As a member of our grassroots team, we wanted to give you an update on how your support of one of our candidates – Attorney General Kris Mayes – is already making a difference here in Arizona:

– **Instead of focusing on lies and election conspiracies, we’re focusing on expanding voting rights.** The previous Attorney General wasted time and resources on chasing large-scale “voter fraud” which never came to pass. Now, instead of going on wild goose chases, Attorney General Mayes is making sure this unit focuses on stopping threats against election officials, and making voting easier for Arizonans.

– **Working on setting up a team to protect reproductive rights.** While the previous Attorney General tried to get a restrictive, 1800s-era total abortion ban implemented, Mayes has refused to defend that law and is setting up a workgroup to make sure Arizonans’ reproductive rights – granted by the Arizona Constitution’s privacy clause – are protected.

– **Stopped Arizona’s involvement in trying to stop federal student loan forgiveness.** Rather than focus on hyper-partisan lawsuits against the federal government, Attorney General Mayes is focusing on putting the office to work for Arizonans.

**[Team, these are just a few ways that in less than one month, your help to get Democrats elected in Arizona is making a huge difference. 2024 is going to be another huge election year, and we need your help to build resources to make sure we win again. Can you donate $5 or whatever you can afford today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xTerfBqG0VHddyZFF79qWDL3jfMMv7xurqr8stBPvg3lw9wkh2OP4D13n233IaND55jpBbjB_8-ldd8p5h1NqbCA8g8dl-XTM0VkoOW8h6hoMKE1EFRBy-lBposAP7ZNG7WZqYHJDo5i3p7P6O-CiIgrGO3zoDs02-R91DFUwpoOHRsNV8Q8js0eoaMSqBxQ6UFfx06frDg4VhGNOWbT0_hrpLyrOSRODUYdsbQ7B14HN9ElH2PMm6Cn4PtXtHWo_F9yZWG__rNNkSLcv8RFJz0Ma4qh9DMG5XKiHYPCjfFrA8p9epzZ0jLDYDZDRcvQP4j196nSukPw6HYjnDcM_IfEd_aouC32HAwa3LIzre5tEW8DDDfgtP2jKY7ba19h97eW23Pv14RzNzvzHOOZOc9p0mLsREIKub2LUL6WFRxwOJcso9Hd6ZcFZsBX34sP8/3te/9ec9DRsgSMyVXrIOIwwKFw/h1/DJMo3gMIZ5OZO1tXgmMH1tVpvPRCHGkCRLOCswDP1PM)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Benjamin=20for=20Congress?=
subject: March for Life
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Leon Benjamin, inc
body:
We have great news about the March for Life and all the media we have done this week. | | | |
---
| | | [Contribute](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=b874a60625&e=3cd8121505 "Contribute")
---
|
#### We are making big waves in the 4th district
# We Can't Wait to Tell You All About it!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
| The campaign trail just keeps heating up, and we can't let this momentum go.
---
|
---
|
### March for Life, John Fredericks Show, and War Room
We have had a busy week here on Team Leon.

I would be remiss if I didn't take the opportunity to thank my wonderful staff and volunteers that have made all of this possible. It is because of these hardworking people that we are going to take this district back!

This week I had the opportunity to go to the March for Life. When I tell you people were envigorated, I'm not lying.

There were hundreds, if not thousands, of people gathered to save the lives of the unborn. As a pastor, this cause is close to my heart. I was lucky to have been a part of the experience and see some impressive speakers, such as Attorney General Jason Miyares, come out and speak.

---
| We also did some great media this week. On Friday morning, I went on John Fredericks Show to discuss some of the issues plaguing the 4th District.

But that's not at all; I also had the opportunity to go on War Room again and discuss the conservative movement's future with Steve Bannon.

When I tell you things are heating up, I'm not kidding!

---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| This week we also rolled out an impressive list of endorsements.

Governor Glenn Youngkin
RPV Chair Rich Anderson
Captain Seth Keshel
AC Cordoza

All endorsed our campaign this week.

Follow us on social media for the next slate of endorsements we will be rolling out next week.
---
| But that's not all we did this week. We also released our latest ad on education, check it out below:

---
| [ ](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=4fc1336002&e=3cd8121505)
---
Education Commercial
| At this time, I would like you to consider contributing to my campaign to help us get across the finish line.

If you can't contribute your dollars, we ask you to contribute your time instead. Time is one of the most precious resources in a campaign, and we never seem to have enough of it. Come join us to doorknock and ensure voters turn to the polls. You can sign up to door knock by emailing us at info@benjamin4congress.com.

This is the best chance Republicans will have to flip this seat RED for a long time, and we can't afford to miss out on the opportunity.

With less than three weeks left to election day, we need your help more than ever! Will you join the cause?
---
| [Contribute](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=72409cc880&e=3cd8121505 "Contribute")

We also released our latest ad on education, check it out below: | Education Commercial | At this time, I would like you to consider contributing to my campaign to help us get across the finish line. If you can't contribute your dollars, we ask you to contribute your time instead. Time is one of the most precious resources in a campaign, and we never seem to have enough of it. Come join us to doorknock and ensure voters turn to the polls. You can sign up to door knock by emailing us at info@benjamin4congress.com. This is the best chance Republicans will have to flip this seat RED for a long time, and we can't afford to miss out on the opportunity. With less than three weeks left to election day, we need your help more than ever! Will you join the cause? | "Contribute" | | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Leon Benjamin, inc. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Friends of Leon Benjamin, Inc., All rights reserved.

body:
Join me >>

| [ ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=aa128209a2b44e5ea81cda3a201efa61&_e=7eawcxMMYWx3vlCuUFBkG2NqcYY3Y8VkYKZuneG7a8VHN5khbZ6MSuMMMuSXc_0cPs1z5corSxOTU5gOwknqAIO8H2kw-D3GMF3u7VlNI_iEEV0heL-mH1gyFkSKJH146I7JJw1XGrrZUwJzj0v781nIr_0fVZU79mxmuLsLWjvAhRbgyIXhxrKk1fggc6I0b5tVjSwYQEcT3Uc8JqaqnsoPiON3JT9OFtd2YlpsqSlHrw-bRRZku2s3rdyxP1HbkccCpw6eVKC2bSfwmiwEJKrb0dtRzZuJ-LTTCD7N7JeJAyDZ-58JKNj_Cv27xmiDchQt7QVu1Vif3gQUBJ2LC2nZbchEbC5nvYmBkcr1CNn3YuVCY4KOaOR-T0dzRHROQZ3tleugSYXV3_693FGaUATllkrF3VfCpoOraljDQl-ElZ-jBAvWiZ9jEHB86iQf3ep_au2cM9r16mNNawO0VmyV23wF6gJ2bNb4QZT3nJQ6d3l7XF8n8zV0c5yvR_OqIWhc37sLu7Ugod6JJ4F_HX9XHXU8rsPDqGvUJVeuCnI%3D)
---
Dear friend,

**_I am very excited to announce that I will be running for the U.S. Senate in 2024 to represent the great State of Indiana._** In the Senate, I intend to protect your freedom, defend our conservative values, and put America first. As we begin this journey together, I want to share my story:

I grew up in a working-class household in Columbia City, Indiana. My father was a factory worker and my mother worked in a nursing home. We often lived paycheck to paycheck, and I was raised in a trailer park for many years.

[](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=aa128209a2b44e5ea81cda3a201efa61&_e=7eawcxMMYWx3vlCuUFBkG2NqcYY3Y8VkYKZuneG7a8VHN5khbZ6MSuMMMuSXc_0cPs1z5corSxOTU5gOwknqAIO8H2kw-D3GMF3u7VlNI_iEEV0heL-mH1gyFkSKJH146I7JJw1XGrrZUwJzj0v781nIr_0fVZU79mxmuLsLWjvAhRbgyIXhxrKk1fggc6I0b5tVjSwYQEcT3Uc8JqaqnsoPiON3JT9OFtd2YlpsqSlHrw-bRRZku2s3rdyxP1HbkccCpw6eVKC2bSfwmiwEJKrb0dtRzZuJ-LTTCD7N7JeJAyDZ-58JKNj_Cv27xmiDchQt7QVu1Vif3gQUBJ2LC2nZbchEbC5nvYmBkcr1CNn3YuVCY4KOaOR-T0dzRHROQZ3tleugSYXV3_693FGaUA3zRIpGSIe3KFbQwYXBmoov12pAb6bT4Yx7DlEW9B_qMkSZgh_wZ7UUIJdNSBF0CPLgIsBqdfIhafeKG2uY8ydH8Q3SBSmik6iBlh835gOr0bZBzHYYOZYx4JI4lgytaeHZ9sM3wnLJZUh-TLKEVfY%3D)
Growing up, my parents taught me the values of hard-work, personal responsibility, and service to our community. My father voted for Democrats much of his life, but now, like many Americans, recognizes that the Republican Party is the true party of the working class.

I was the first in my family to attend college. At Indiana University, I met my wonderful wife, Amanda, who has been the biggest blessing in my life. She keeps me grounded and ensures our family stays true to our conservative values every day.

Coming from a humble background, I felt a calling to give back to my community. As such, after serving on a county council, I became a member of the Indiana State Senate in 2010. During my time in office, I took a leave of absence while I was deployed to Afghanistan as a Navy Reserve Supply Corps Officer.

[](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=aa128209a2b44e5ea81cda3a201efa61&_e=7eawcxMMYWx3vlCuUFBkG2NqcYY3Y8VkYKZuneG7a8VHN5khbZ6MSuMMMuSXc_0cPs1z5corSxOTU5gOwknqAIO8H2kw-D3GMF3u7VlNI_iEEV0heL-mH1gyFkSKJH146I7JJw1XGrrZUwJzj0v781nIr_0fVZU79mxmuLsLWjvAhRbgyIXhxrKk1fggc6I0b5tVjSwYQEcT3Uc8JqaqnsoPiON3JT9OFtd2YlpsqSlHrw-bRRZku2s3rdyxP1HbkccCpw6eVKC2bSfwmiwEJKrb0dtRzZuJ-LTTCD7N7JeJAyDZ-58JKNj_Cv27xmiDchQt7QVu1Vif3gQUBJ2LC2nZbchEbC5nvYmBkcr1CNn3YuVCY4KOaOR-T0dzRHROQZ3tleugSYXV3_693FGaUG5inNnO3250AEX4Yfngz1Of1bGiXPNOoVEFS3YqCGeB1J5vW7unoFE-SZuPHgtFcsYL6a0aJE2LzXGP98qeaAhaiZ8TKaFhQcvbA9guzBfcUGZjU4Rkz0s1y-9k8xJHZ0PBctY_YawMVAZhjT5amk8%3D)
Serving my country abroad reinforced my resolve to defend the freedoms and values that make America great. As an Afghanistan War veteran, I know what it means to fight for our country and our values.

[](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=aa128209a2b44e5ea81cda3a201efa61&_e=7eawcxMMYWx3vlCuUFBkG2NqcYY3Y8VkYKZuneG7a8VHN5khbZ6MSuMMMuSXc_0cPs1z5corSxOTU5gOwknqAIO8H2kw-D3GMF3u7VlNI_iEEV0heL-mH1gyFkSKJH146I7JJw1XGrrZUwJzj0v781nIr_0fVZU79mxmuLsLWjvAhRbgyIXhxrKk1fggc6I0b5tVjSwYQEcT3Uc8JqaqnsoPiON3JT9OFtd2YlpsqSlHrw-bRRZku2s3rdyxP1HbkccCpw6eVKC2bSfwmiwEJKrb0dtRzZuJ-LTTCD7N7JeJAyDZ-58JKNj_Cv27xmiDchQt7QVu1Vif3gQUBJ2LC2nZbchEbC5nvYmBkcr1CNn3YuVCY4KOaOR-T0dzRHROQZ3tleugSYXV3_693FGaUFXIgpxn0DWqX0uWD9bSkXS1S3UNZNFU9Ve5IdAZIkZqWHP69hV29udQTAsJUKOfub1Rgi2y1OQZyh9lEdaim-o4ujnWIR76a-OJ891eoSAFJkEVN6cQuSTsQ8ABPAq9wPDOvVvpnmcaqudpjJHaOEU%3D)
During my time in Afghanistan, my wife stepped up to fill in for me in the State Senate. I am blessed to have a family dedicated to serving the American people.

Amanda and I started a family back in 2009. We’ve been blessed with three beautiful daughters, Lillian, Elizabeth, and Joann, who inspire me each day. I am fighting for our country because I am fighting for their future. I want my daughters to grow up in a country where they are safe and can thrive.

[](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=aa128209a2b44e5ea81cda3a201efa61&_e=7eawcxMMYWx3vlCuUFBkG2NqcYY3Y8VkYKZuneG7a8VHN5khbZ6MSuMMMuSXc_0cPs1z5corSxOTU5gOwknqAIO8H2kw-D3GMF3u7VlNI_iEEV0heL-mH1gyFkSKJH146I7JJw1XGrrZUwJzj0v781nIr_0fVZU79mxmuLsLWjvAhRbgyIXhxrKk1fggc6I0b5tVjSwYQEcT3Uc8JqaqnsoPiON3JT9OFtd2YlpsqSlHrw-bRRZku2s3rdyxP1HbkccCpw6eVKC2bSfwmiwEJKrb0dtRzZuJ-LTTCD7N7JeJAyDZ-58JKNj_Cv27xmiDchQt7QVu1Vif3gQUBJ2LC2nZbchEbC5nvYmBkcr1CNn3YuVCY4KOaOR-T0dzRHROQZ3tleugSYXV3_693FGaUK6056QoCVGJIRrhi0OTFuKX-aa1agqW-keVlyO9hUBf7kcTtKlGLGG36I91VbMcCR5n0GJOoyCSNIqHS_pStPaxKRdi8nA5LNcUM01I3zKK9C9SjWfeH2KqBTQZRB90GxdXMcJrsMfexQ3PUxMNHBo%3D)
Since 2016, I have chosen to continue my service career by representing Indiana’s 3rd district in the U.S. Congress. During my time in the House, I have been a consistent conservative voice dedicated to upholding and protecting the conservative American values that make our nation great. I was elected chair of the Republican Study Committee, the largest caucus of conservatives in the House of Representatives, and have collaborated with strong leaders, like President Trump, to put America first.

[](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=aa128209a2b44e5ea81cda3a201efa61&_e=7eawcxMMYWx3vlCuUFBkG2NqcYY3Y8VkYKZuneG7a8VHN5khbZ6MSuMMMuSXc_0cPs1z5corSxOTU5gOwknqAIO8H2kw-D3GMF3u7VlNI_iEEV0heL-mH1gyFkSKJH146I7JJw1XGrrZUwJzj0v781nIr_0fVZU79mxmuLsLWjvAhRbgyIXhxrKk1fggc6I0b5tVjSwYQEcT3Uc8JqaqnsoPiON3JT9OFtd2YlpsqSlHrw-bRRZku2s3rdyxP1HbkccCpw6eVKC2bSfwmiwEJKrb0dtRzZuJ-LTTCD7N7JeJAyDZ-58JKNj_Cv27xmiDchQt7QVu1Vif3gQUBJ2LC2nZbchEbC5nvYmBkcr1CNn3YuVCY4KOaOR-T0dzRHROQZ3tleugSYXV3_693FGaULukcInxMiBXzY6rtWqVSr496l3VqY6TUMOe6VeHLCx_zpQv2L4M5vTE8lciH8xMc6R76DkJLj9HrHaTGJolJSZZ0SWBewTKoMppfqG7rWgj1qahppEyxkmm8lB0qftrOkxU9DbVnAqmHGijcTKdBC8%3D)
As the next Senator of Indiana, I intend to continue defending hard-working Americans and refuse to let the radical Left crush our values and destroy our country. My congressional record of fighting for strong families, limited government, and tighter spending speaks for itself. We have a great country worth defending, and I intend to do just that.

As your next Senator, I will fight to balance the federal budget, protect our Southern border, stand up to China, and defend our children against the Left’s woke ideology. **But, I need support from strong, grassroots conservatives like YOU to ensure our movement makes it all the way to Washington.** [**_Will you join us in preserving the American Dream?_**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=aa128209a2b44e5ea81cda3a201efa61&_e=7eawcxMMYWx3vlCuUFBkG2NqcYY3Y8VkYKZuneG7a8VHN5khbZ6MSuMMMuSXc_0cPs1z5corSxOTU5gOwknqAIO8H2kw-D3GMF3u7VlNI_iEEV0heL-mH1gyFkSKJH146I7JJw1XGrrZUwJzj0v781nIr_0fVZU79mxmuLsLWjvAhRbgyIXhxrKk1fggc6I0b5tVjSwYQEcT3Uc8JqaqnsoPiON3JT9OFtd2YlpsqSlHrw-bRRZku2s3rdyxP1HbkccCpw6eVKC2bSfwmiwEJKrb0dtRzZuJ-LTTCD7N7JeJAyDZ-58JKNj_Cv27xmiDchQt7QVu1Vif3gQUBJ2LC2nZbchEbC5nvYmBkcr1CNn3YuVCY4KOaOR-T0dzRHROQZ3tleugSYXV3_693FGaUF3cAXN03hdFp4bchJZK1-P-oBG0vY3TALS6uKbul59aEy9SA6aoaz_CckPL7pyyKGzVolhZeKI3eBHF2isv_kk8uuJd33SyaxVH48OPxinBLxPdCXSgsVrL488IWZhXeClGcDjvIj7dl0wC8DDgpfE%3D)

clean_body: Join me >> | Dear friend, I am very excited to announce that I will be running for the U.S. Senate in 2024 to represent the great State of Indiana. In the Senate, I intend to protect your freedom, defend our conservative values, and put America first. As we begin this journey together, I want to share my story: I grew up in a working-class household in Columbia City, Indiana. My father was a factory worker and my mother worked in a nursing home. We often lived paycheck to paycheck, and I was raised in a trailer park for many years. Growing up, my parents taught me the values of hard-work, personal responsibility, and service to our community. My father voted for Democrats much of his life, but now, like many Americans, recognizes that the Republican Party is the true party of the working class. I was the first in my family to attend college. At Indiana University, I met my wonderful wife, Amanda, who has been the biggest blessing in my life. She keeps me grounded and ensures our family stays true to our conservative values every day. Coming from a humble background, I felt a calling to give back to my community. As such, after serving on a county council, I became a member of the Indiana State Senate in 2010. During my time in office, I took a leave of absence while I was deployed to Afghanistan as a Navy Reserve Supply Corps Officer. Serving my country abroad reinforced my resolve to defend the freedoms and values that make America great. As an Afghanistan War veteran, I know what it means to fight for our country and our values. During my time in Afghanistan, my wife stepped up to fill in for me in the State Senate. I am blessed to have a family dedicated to serving the American people. Amanda and I started a family back in 2009. We’ve been blessed with three beautiful daughters, Lillian, Elizabeth, and Joann, who inspire me each day. I am fighting for our country because I am fighting for their future. I want my daughters to grow up in a country where they are safe and can thrive. Since 2016, I have chosen to continue my service career by representing Indiana’s 3rd district in the U.S. Congress. During my time in the House, I have been a consistent conservative voice dedicated to upholding and protecting the conservative American values that make our nation great. I was elected chair of the Republican Study Committee, the largest caucus of conservatives in the House of Representatives, and have collaborated with strong leaders, like President Trump, to put America first. As the next Senator of Indiana, I intend to continue defending hard-working Americans and refuse to let the radical Left crush our values and destroy our country. My congressional record of fighting for strong families, limited government, and tighter spending speaks for itself. We have a great country worth defending, and I intend to do just that. As your next Senator, I will fight to balance the federal budget, protect our Southern border, stand up to China, and defend our children against the Left’s woke ideology. But, I need support from strong, grassroots conservatives like YOU to ensure our movement makes it all the way to Washington. | Sincerely, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week.
**** As we kick off Black History Month, the Indiana Democratic Party wants to take a moment to pay tribute to the profound impact African Americans have had on shaping the history of our state and nation. From fighting for civil rights to leading the charge for social and economic justice, the Black community has been a driving force for progress and change. We honor the trailblazers who paved the way for future generations and recommit ourselves to working towards a more equitable and just society. During this month, let us celebrate and learn from the rich heritage and culture of African Americans and work towards a brighter future for all Hoosiers. ****_The 2023 Session: More Culture Wars, Attacks on LGBTQ Hoosiers - Not Fixing Indiana’s Most-Pressing Issues_ This week, INDems criticized the Republican supermajority at the statehouse for pushing legislation that [attacks LGBTQ Hoosiers](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58243658/390463287/1392311553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmI0MDRiMy0wN2E0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xqw9HiDtV3e3id3IyfPrirOFhGBj6abceQc3ZVXR0Js=&emci=c80257c0-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=22b404b3-07a4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535), expands an [unregulated school choice system](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58243659/390463288/1286098007?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmI0MDRiMy0wN2E0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xqw9HiDtV3e3id3IyfPrirOFhGBj6abceQc3ZVXR0Js=&emci=c80257c0-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=22b404b3-07a4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535), and presents a [nothing burger](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58243660/390463289/2093984080?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmI0MDRiMy0wN2E0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xqw9HiDtV3e3id3IyfPrirOFhGBj6abceQc3ZVXR0Js=&emci=c80257c0-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=22b404b3-07a4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) on school dress codes. The Indiana GOP is presenting an agenda that promotes culture wars and favors special interests instead of solving the top issues facing families and workers across our state. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58243662/390463290/-1874090214?s=20&t=EYRvcM7t0eYXtN-HcDBngg&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmI0MDRiMy0wN2E0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xqw9HiDtV3e3id3IyfPrirOFhGBj6abceQc3ZVXR0Js=&emci=c80257c0-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=22b404b3-07a4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)****[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58243664/390463291/-1874090214?s=20&t=EYRvcM7t0eYXtN-HcDBngg&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmI0MDRiMy0wN2E0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xqw9HiDtV3e3id3IyfPrirOFhGBj6abceQc3ZVXR0Js=&emci=c80257c0-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=22b404b3-07a4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)** **Fact is: Indiana’s future has dimmed under the GOP’s watch.** Hoosiers have a [F rated quality-of-life](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58243668/390463292/-82093755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmI0MDRiMy0wN2E0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xqw9HiDtV3e3id3IyfPrirOFhGBj6abceQc3ZVXR0Js=&emci=c80257c0-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=22b404b3-07a4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) and the state has a [D- rated workforce](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58243672/390463293/-82093755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmI0MDRiMy0wN2E0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xqw9HiDtV3e3id3IyfPrirOFhGBj6abceQc3ZVXR0Js=&emci=c80257c0-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=22b404b3-07a4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535), a [C- rated education system](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58243677/390463294/-82093755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmI0MDRiMy0wN2E0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xqw9HiDtV3e3id3IyfPrirOFhGBj6abceQc3ZVXR0Js=&emci=c80257c0-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=22b404b3-07a4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535), the [third worst maternal mortality rate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58243683/390463295/-1971088596?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmI0MDRiMy0wN2E0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xqw9HiDtV3e3id3IyfPrirOFhGBj6abceQc3ZVXR0Js=&emci=c80257c0-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=22b404b3-07a4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) in the nation, and the [country’s most polluted waterways](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58243687/390463296/-1129088982?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmI0MDRiMy0wN2E0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xqw9HiDtV3e3id3IyfPrirOFhGBj6abceQc3ZVXR0Js=&emci=c80257c0-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=22b404b3-07a4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535). It appears Republicans will once again ignore the warning signs from [Indiana’s top business leaders](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58243692/390463297/-1975940939?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmI0MDRiMy0wN2E0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xqw9HiDtV3e3id3IyfPrirOFhGBj6abceQc3ZVXR0Js=&emci=c80257c0-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=22b404b3-07a4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) and their [taxpayer-funded reports](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58243695/390463298/-1244620132?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmI0MDRiMy0wN2E0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xqw9HiDtV3e3id3IyfPrirOFhGBj6abceQc3ZVXR0Js=&emci=c80257c0-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=22b404b3-07a4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) and choose to put their extreme agenda. **Opportunities with INDems**
###

### **Operations Coordinator**
The Indiana Democratic Party (IDP) is seeking an Operations Coordinator to help and support our team. In working with the Chair and Executive Director, the Coordinator will oversee the office, run payroll and oversee benefits, oversee IT and office equipment, accounts, and files. They will also be involved in event planning and execution and ensure that the party and its staff and projects all run smoothly.
### **Regional Organizing Directors**
The Indiana Democratic Party is hiring Regional Organizing Directors to to build a stronger party in the field throughout the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategic planning, and voter targeting and contact. These are important roles to building back a fair and equitable two party system of government in Indiana. **For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at[https://www.indems.org/jobs/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58243743/390463327/1076440731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmI0MDRiMy0wN2E0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xqw9HiDtV3e3id3IyfPrirOFhGBj6abceQc3ZVXR0Js=&emci=c80257c0-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=22b404b3-07a4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**
### **Executive Director**
The Indiana Democratic Party (IDP) is seeking an Executive Director (ED) to lead our team. In partnership with the Chair and State Central Committee, the ED is responsible for deploying the strategy, overall management, and growth of IDP. The ED will be involved in all aspects of the Party’s operations, including but not limited to: election activities, voter protection, fundraising, budgeting, staff recruitment and retention, outreach, and building party infrastructure. General Duties:
* Responsible for overall operational efficiency of IDP, including staff and creation and execution of Party strategy.
* Recruits, interviews, hires, and manages IDP and coordinated campaign staff.
* Manages day-to-day work of Communications, Data & Organizing, Operations, and Finance teams.
* Oversees the day-to-day work of outside consultants and vendors.
* Serves as one of the spokespeople for IDP to the media.
* Other responsibilities as required.

Party Affairs
* Coordinates work and materials for the Democratic State Central Committee, District leaders, County leaders, and precinct committeemen and women.
* Keeps up strong relationships with various constituencies and stakeholders around the state, including organized labor, African-American leaders, Latino leaders, LGBTQ Hoosiers, women’s groups, Indiana Young Democrats, and College Democrats.
* Maintains close working relationships with various party partner organizations including, but not limited to: DNC, ASDC, DCCC, DSCC, DGA, and DLCC.
* Builds and nurtures relationships with Democratic candidates, elected officials, Democratic caucuses, and staff members across the state.
* Supports the building, growth, and success of county parties throughout the state.
* Oversees an annual party retreat, annual fundraising dinner, biennial state conventions, and the National Delegate Selection process for the 2024 Democratic convention.

**C** ampaign & Election Activities
* Shares regular organizing, training, coaching, and other resources online and in-person for Party staff, volunteers, and party leadership.
* Works with IDP and Indiana Election Division to ensure the Party is up-to-date on the current and latest rules relating to elections and voting in Indiana.
* Troubleshoots any issues with campaigns or county parties on behalf of IDP to ensure the Party is represented well and that issues are resolved in a timely fashion.
* Oversees voter protection in-state and in partnership with DNC guidance.
* Oversees GOTV and Election Day efforts and events for IDP.

Fundraising
* Works with the State Chair to raise money for the party through call time, meetings, events, memberships, online giving, and other income generating streams.
* Partners with the finance team to create a robust apparatus for fundraising and cultivating large and small donors.
* Represents IDP at party, media, or community functions across the state.

Operations & Compliance
* Manages office and ensures campaigns and committees have productive workspaces.
* Keeps an updated and working knowledge of campaign finance, election, and compliance laws and works in concert with the compliance team and legal counsel to ensure all Party activities are consistently compliant.
* Works with the State Chair and Party CPA and Treasurer to implement the budget.

**Q** ualifications: Minimum of at least four (4) years with direct campaign experience. Executive experience working on a coordinated campaign, statewide or Congressional political campaign, or with a state political party preferred.
* Experience managing a growing, diverse, and highly skilled team, with demonstrated ability to achieve high levels of performance and outcomes through guidance and management.
* A reputation for leading with integrity and making decisions with the input of the appropriate stakeholders.
* Experience building, managing, and tracking large budgets.
* Excellent verbal, written, and analytical skills.
* Ability to manage several tasks and projects at the same time.
* Ability to prioritize and multi-task in a fast-paced environment.
* Detail oriented and good follow through on tasks.
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to interact professionally with staff and external stakeholders and represent the organization with professionalism.
* Ability to maintain a high level of confidentiality.

Salary: Salary is generally competitive and commensurate with experience. Position includes full medical, dental, and vision insurance benefits, a 401(k) account, and monthly tech stipend. Application Instructions: Please email your resume and three professional references to [jobs@indems.org](mailto:jobs@indems.org) with “Executive Director” in the subject line. Thank you for your interest in working with IDP.

From fighting for civil rights to leading the charge for social and economic justice, the Black community has been a driving force for progress and change. We honor the trailblazers who paved the way for future generations and recommit ourselves to working towards a more equitable and just society. Friend,

As we look to the future of our country, we need strong and proven leaders who are ready to defend our values and protect our country.

That's why I'm making a special announcement on February 15. Before I make my announcement, I am asking for you to join me in this fight for our nation's future. **[Please chip in $25, $50, or even $100 if you can.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a43e802cf06943788f0a05a277863953&_e=grw_54C91TIlbncn7A8-qCRqsTeOBv2PdCj4rXJ0HOZbBq2-q2feWGyz6hdl11aKVxtJmWMpRR0yH_4UAwR9wbz2s4voS5JzED1Nm8WsYm5-yrkTvslg18uhiBwxyrAF1lsTSEHF54ZN3w0aThGSAsOgg957qIa6iYKrNpL13rcK44WsfrAb9WG58wnfyhRNwz0MlUgpIw51fjoBxIf46VI9emB9voAoBsLzRwZKc1uNUXCfXlDlsypHoejatUUbi5J4Q5kilR1JZH2MDh52coknfLvA3v7lKLezCEed7SD1pcUJG2_KIZho5rgP0NNVw-yuRE84D1bJ0MOzqZx9rMr7o2u7WvX3FRSbQ76kKNaUEllbaz1L6WPbEHU9DWnEwZS3YFHNH2yQXl2O3vtTvbBEH_gz9EmHPjO9zCTlye7WKFp3h_4gk04fsk0sw4UYaneCjvxI4Ghg-zaAsPVcvkRe256oS8WPnts2_abgezmel-CGmNHXZD6Syu-9W80_CxeI6_ZQy18Kut4EbqKNkMYgNq-GrFj4F4qnEMgVrZOM302YOIViJ-9-a6KEfNhjks6JhfsckZWPEAPgIUEXeYL9Z8UvVR8YvSmXbRx7f_mmj1Nwniq9GJ1CmVXy4won "Please chip in $25, $50, or even $100 if you can.")**

I am proud to stand for the ideals that make our nation the greatest force for good in human history. I will never waver in this commitment--not now, not ever. I will always stand for America.

**[Together, we can make sure that America remains the shining city on a hill, a beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a43e802cf06943788f0a05a277863953&_e=grw_54C91TIlbncn7A8-qCRqsTeOBv2PdCj4rXJ0HOZbBq2-q2feWGyz6hdl11aKVxtJmWMpRR0yH_4UAwR9wbz2s4voS5JzED1Nm8WsYm5-yrkTvslg18uhiBwxyrAF1lsTSEHF54ZN3w0aThGSAsOgg957qIa6iYKrNpL13rcK44WsfrAb9WG58wnfyhRNwz0MlUgpIw51fjoBxIf46VI9emB9voAoBsLzRwZKc1uNUXCfXlDlsypHoejatUUbi5J4Q5kilR1JZH2MDh52coknfLvA3v7lKLezCEed7SD1pcUJG2_KIZho5rgP0NNVw-yuRE84D1bJ0MOzqZx9rMr7o2u7WvX3FRSbQ76kKNaUEllbaz1L6WPbEHU9DWnEwZS3YFHNH2yQXl2O3vtTvbBEH_gz9EmHPjO9zCTlye7WKFp3h_4gk04fsk0sw4UYaneCjvxI4Ghg-zaAsPVcvkRe256oS8WPnts2_abgeznoELMpojNX8dsaG4-PHYYnfGQVAT6sqYG7PK5d1Bt-R5JuSAC5aJKiE6FiWrZa9M3VtDiz9ik9ywmCoxde9wkFswVRaubwcF5EcN28uDFJpEcCBLwo-bmgsykQkHbnO-R0skdn2FOTx4yDxEgnBV50 "Together, we can make sure that America remains the shining city on a hill, a beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.")**

Thank you for your continued support.

body:
[_**Peter, I know it’s almost the weekend, but this is an important email. I hope you’ll take the time to read the whole thing -- and then, consider donating $14 so I can continue my vital work and bring accountability back to Congress. Can I count on you? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58244354/390464701/-1810142053?refcode=20230203_em_fr_b1_raja_30_op&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWI0NGJlZS0wOWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bm5_OlNm6hpM-Bn8sWd5B6Ag44lASI6k23yuQ6osR5g=) Peter, this is long, so bear with me -- but I need to tell you what happened just this week: \-- I stood with Illinois Democrats and demanded bans on assault weapons throughout my state. \-- I condemned political violence once again and called out Republicans’ vicious games. \-- And days ago, I urged the FDA to take action and reduce high levels of toxic heavy metals in our children’s food. [**But I’ll be blunt, Peter: My work to expose special interests and the powerful corporations who fund their campaigns means that I have an even bigger target on my back.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58244355/390464702/-1810142053?refcode=20230203_em_fr_b1_raja_30_op&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWI0NGJlZS0wOWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bm5_OlNm6hpM-Bn8sWd5B6Ag44lASI6k23yuQ6osR5g=) [_**That’s why I need your help more than ever -- can you pitch in your first $14 to become a 2023 Founding Member before midnight to fund my fight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58244356/390464703/-1810142053?refcode=20230203_em_fr_b1_raja_30_op&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWI0NGJlZS0wOWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bm5_OlNm6hpM-Bn8sWd5B6Ag44lASI6k23yuQ6osR5g=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58244357/390464704/-1810142053?refcode=20230203_em_fr_b1_raja_30_op&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWI0NGJlZS0wOWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bm5_OlNm6hpM-Bn8sWd5B6Ag44lASI6k23yuQ6osR5g=)
**[FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com
FOUNDING MEMBER STATUS: PENDING
SUGGESTED SUPPORT: $14 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58244358/390464705/-1810142053?refcode=20230203_em_fr_b1_raja_30_op&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWI0NGJlZS0wOWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bm5_OlNm6hpM-Bn8sWd5B6Ag44lASI6k23yuQ6osR5g=)**

Peter, I’ve spent my career exposing powerful entities that violate the law.
I won’t lie: That means corporations, big banks, and those who violate the law consider me their biggest enemy.

name: Susan Wild
subject: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
As we uplift the Black community, we must also grapple with the inequity and systemic racism that persists in our country to this very day.

---
| Peter,

This month is Black History Month, an opportunity to celebrate the many contributions and achievements of Black Americans throughout our nation’s history, history that is being made every day. I am proud to represent a community that is home to so many Black leaders. To learn more, you can _**[click here to read several stories of Black leaders in the Lehigh Valley.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58244388/390464934/733005276?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDBjNjYwZS0wYWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PWTT318eviSWxAtjPaoqMTjdTX-mDKRQrIPvc4TEoAo=&emci=9e292317-f7a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=5d0c660e-0aa4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5543981)**_

As we uplift the Black community, we must also grapple with the inequity and systemic racism that persists in our country to this very day.

Today especially, my heart is breaking for Tyre Nichols, one of the most recent unarmed Black Americans to be killed by police officers. I am thinking of Tyre’s family and the Memphis community as I urge for swift and unequivocal justice.

I am committed to fighting inequality every day in Congress. I was proud to support the Justice in Policing Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. I recognize as well that issues such as climate justice, education inequity, and soaring health care costs disproportionately affect Black communities on a daily basis – and you have my word that I will keep working every day towards real equality.

**As an elected official, and as a concerned citizen, I am committed to supporting our Black communities and finding solutions. If you, like me, want to take action to be a part of the solution,[_I encourage you to consider making a donation to the NAACP to support their fight for civil rights._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58244389/390464937/-1890789315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDBjNjYwZS0wYWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PWTT318eviSWxAtjPaoqMTjdTX-mDKRQrIPvc4TEoAo=&emci=9e292317-f7a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=5d0c660e-0aa4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5543981)**

We cannot turn a blind eye to these issues. I will not rest until we see liberation for our Black communities. I hope you will join me in this effort.

In solidarity,
Susan
---

name: AN UPDATE FROM THE BORDER
subject: Have you met your neighbor?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM MORRISEY
body:
1,200,000 reasons to secure the border RIGHT NOW. | | |
---
Fellow Conservative,
---
How well do you know your neighbor?

Right now, MILLIONS of illegal immigrants are pouring into our Southern Border without apprehension, and without prosecution. **Over 1,200,000 illegal immigrants have already INVADED our country through the Southern Border and Joe Biden has not done one damn thing about it. **
---
[**DEMAND BIDEN SECURE THE BORDER**](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=aa50f2de52d84e83aea5de01e1a2c9ac&_e=VXB7Do_eYry0eXFwlZg5kyg6BIPU6OfG-c6jRIimikKBx6oREyyb-VRI4RuMCNLwdFaYJEmYDKNdJwMGOdRn-XtZcxfoEJ54WlTPXqHbYZYf1twnPCn4kgKn8ame29CDxzOE344OCBoBJ6r4IcaWRi49NHMngtprQ0DgGvgHanjS9KNkabEYhQLXs10h-dIRyhgrUaXfj2Prj2ByGzj8W40Wn7QdWMpbxkLqdRJLFIJ-N_4gMb7nhHAlEDqz8iVflW3AHFr1hWe6CBxvnAJmUGrXEZA9YaRR_bx6Z3dILcBxELUR3oP89APrdAOQA9DSFLE2l-JCE0NPKJ5Kr9A4PsCPPas-OK4cdXVi8tpFM2eUaWmyF0F1i8pey1hRvriY2JitflOTEK_k3wLbE2-DVfp8lblFzI49ta-Z5YE1_PI%3D)
---
This huge mass of illegal immigrants can mean many things. But if we don’t know who these people are, where they are coming from or how to stop them — how can we enforce the rule of law in our communities and towns?

Hell, for all we know the new neighbor next door could very well have Fentanyl in their moving boxes, or participate in human trafficking. This is absolutely _**TERRIFYING**_ to think about.

And we need to do something to put an end to it.

While Joe Biden and his enablers in congress push forward radical ideas like the Green New Deal, we are going to have to take matters into our own hands to secure the Southern Border.

**[If you step up right now you can be one of the first red-blooded patriots to save this country from a complete cartel takeover!](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=aa50f2de52d84e83aea5de01e1a2c9ac&_e=VXB7Do_eYry0eXFwlZg5kyg6BIPU6OfG-c6jRIimikKBx6oREyyb-VRI4RuMCNLwdFaYJEmYDKNdJwMGOdRn-XtZcxfoEJ54WlTPXqHbYZYf1twnPCn4kgKn8ame29CDxzOE344OCBoBJ6r4IcaWRi49NHMngtprQ0DgGvgHanjS9KNkabEYhQLXs10h-dIRyhgrUaXfj2Prj2ByGzj8W40Wn7QdWMpbxkLqdRJLFIJ-N_4gMb7nhHAlEDqz8iVfQUFF1L2rfdxqGsedT_o9FuYnJDw6oDtc9kC3EvG79gHXrgJAMKYULGQlX_4Tz1Hu9xz-JJFLwTreM2mWkI0jZHPQ3MhvY2CNrJwpB0NkWOsKEau912LCVnMwytP_Jk1AYp-XupQ8ED99XFBBRVGi2oq0xsmG6LAtyOxHZeFtOhE%3D)**
We have so much on the line. And America as we know it is hanging on by a thread.
**[Will you join America First conservatives from sea to shining sea in our fight to secure the Southern Border, stop the influx of drugs coming into our country and hold Joe Biden accountable once and for all?](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=aa50f2de52d84e83aea5de01e1a2c9ac&_e=VXB7Do_eYry0eXFwlZg5kyg6BIPU6OfG-c6jRIimikKBx6oREyyb-VRI4RuMCNLwdFaYJEmYDKNdJwMGOdRn-XtZcxfoEJ54WlTPXqHbYZYf1twnPCn4kgKn8ame29CDxzOE344OCBoBJ6r4IcaWRi49NHMngtprQ0DgGvgHanjS9KNkabEYhQLXs10h-dIRyhgrUaXfj2Prj2ByGzj8W40Wn7QdWMpbxkLqdRJLFIJ-N_4gMb7nhHAlEDqz8iVfT6gHjZYdrRgrrybZtzZl_RjyoMp1Ft_hHYU1dZ2CT3kLr2yHihB0QaS9y1Ou9YNcWmmBOzpSS-CrvO1KfF3WAr1c53imcEjtwRS_ywZrZq41NsyRB4ZFRz2Q7Y-6PiOLzKLV28nJAOUifav7UtHZCVbmAb3sdmmJagDUVDOsPyM%3D)**
---
[**JOIN THE MOVEMENT**](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=aa50f2de52d84e83aea5de01e1a2c9ac&_e=VXB7Do_eYry0eXFwlZg5kyg6BIPU6OfG-c6jRIimikKBx6oREyyb-VRI4RuMCNLwdFaYJEmYDKNdJwMGOdRn-XtZcxfoEJ54WlTPXqHbYZYf1twnPCn4kgKn8ame29CDxzOE344OCBoBJ6r4IcaWRi49NHMngtprQ0DgGvgHanjS9KNkabEYhQLXs10h-dIRyhgrUaXfj2Prj2ByGzj8W40Wn7QdWMpbxkLqdRJLFIJ-N_4gMb7nhHAlEDqz8iVf-YmxkCwrinzBpuruESh2orWD-VY3gDzXwAXPcTIiFyq2gN06vr7hIv0YtGjBaCV-z012gYWtNEpGPJiykBC7J686A3DZBBNwg9G0V5ZxLTrSFkjE-e_qM1kT9TJ7MyXIYdKTA7GYBpybDLBYRuwPAN7tWRgpdjl8XFabNGfwvJY%3D)

Friend,

As we look to the future of our country, we need strong and proven leaders who are ready to defend our values and protect our country.

That's why I'm making a special announcement on February 15. Before I make my announcement, I am asking for you to join me in this fight for our nation's future. **[Please chip in $25, $50, or even $100 if you can.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e385ca7d885c409b9d9a5d7c2dc596da&_e=iqKf2d90SK-uJaHXNIJ5R9TPGQmtW2ey8hI1E3n-uYA_Wmpbsf3QRXIVx-9FmgUsIiZan2wRY9XbNWXBvQCzoqJdosD5ofJggYgbhex8c0gySHDyRYSqIlExXe5cRYCGBzA5FK9tRhhqLErXiWF2V7VVJ-bV3KhxdM2-e32hOPCjSzKZhnJzgxa_kNykxjx3rIfPBPzL58U2rktFol9DpTYrSItsQvg8OvvDjpd7IPENVfeJjl6NUcnTwgFEJ5eZI5E2YpT-3AgsJUprZXYidPHPKXLSbgieZic5hsdHMzuRlh1U1qDsqO_9ZJnc6b5V_P-OL_3tiLnBYbLfKJpkJYnM7XD53nMh_gkcEUt9Y3B-TTJvjXhBgLvzVCvyP-s41OGdBaGIcxPTFdGBKfGJFHI3av2MVBxz3Tm5eZ9N4JSOjHCWiyyFHIYbTQGfGMHhTDzknDTdICFCpxj5c-zLdRM59mfip-L2VHLvfR_S7_CMsaXzSYHIxTeL85ejBVHlM7Pz6MkQpk36-5kjlx9eozB9C_qe14qxPrGiBxKSbLFQrioN1ypF1GXiZEV1822OLkg_OHSKVFAG6uQnmNcvxBBqrGHJ03S9kSihfp1wsptlnaRDb8OsEBYjWq0mj7aO "Please chip in $25, $50, or even $100 if you can.")**

I am proud to stand for the ideals that make our nation the greatest force for good in human history. I will never waver in this commitment--not now, not ever. I will always stand for America.

**[Together, we can make sure that America remains the shining city on a hill, a beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e385ca7d885c409b9d9a5d7c2dc596da&_e=iqKf2d90SK-uJaHXNIJ5R9TPGQmtW2ey8hI1E3n-uYA_Wmpbsf3QRXIVx-9FmgUsIiZan2wRY9XbNWXBvQCzoqJdosD5ofJggYgbhex8c0gySHDyRYSqIlExXe5cRYCGBzA5FK9tRhhqLErXiWF2V7VVJ-bV3KhxdM2-e32hOPCjSzKZhnJzgxa_kNykxjx3rIfPBPzL58U2rktFol9DpTYrSItsQvg8OvvDjpd7IPENVfeJjl6NUcnTwgFEJ5eZI5E2YpT-3AgsJUprZXYidPHPKXLSbgieZic5hsdHMzuRlh1U1qDsqO_9ZJnc6b5V_P-OL_3tiLnBYbLfKJpkJYnM7XD53nMh_gkcEUt9Y3B-TTJvjXhBgLvzVCvyP-s41OGdBaGIcxPTFdGBKfGJFHI3av2MVBxz3Tm5eZ9N4JSOjHCWiyyFHIYbTQGfGMHhTDzknDTdICFCpxj5c-zLdRM59mfip-L2VHLvfR_S7_C0EHvZZxoLL99h_Hm4raDU-JVghjnLapfHbTTVqhi3Q0BCw-1CGWbe3VKxoM6GfH9AvT9RPBKTb4MzN1xytrRI-1i6Lf0Sayg-mLitrjH0DxHNDY8-RcLOv8TaFJn7k4xE8QcAfoRA0eKf5IUY2aAk "Together, we can make sure that America remains the shining city on a hill, a beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.")**

I will never waver in this commitment--not now, not ever. I will always stand for America. [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6e5f4cef39df4dd2ba1e6ba8d9b95f0a&_e=raGlqBvXwK_XxmonZQv4GcP4Afhf3133nD_wWXe0CjtKhqQjC8NLE-aHkpa0IzhgnPlM7KOTTLj1woroKL4cR-9VwHjUCU10gZY7-Y4gZGRCWjDx5aIBHJghUpQb9HijIEaawJ7vXZfnLp0sLu5fCP0dlgMg_LRuqaTuetCAbc4hgIhSNRboZiRmrwbYtAw4-YD5N777_WwvN6lFM3it-JRTyPVG2ZUXIK11WlpjE-Iio3HwUbHGlI1ibVGAysLpmO_e7HM_9yk7kg1LEqkZk-ESFNejWgR98LErQPPnxnnxOv06_AD-sExyZapNvM15ktRXrTsnNM16AalvKrSPDjsOdiHHT40v2_8YH_VwfQu41YQgyFM2DZLgOwYp4rq-1I654-4MHUNeatQa_WsYv0AGgED7xDV7CFdLBx7ebfFHG92XGHwCjkrjkBJEaUrT)
|

Peter,

To say that the liberals who controlled the federal government for the past two years are desperately grasping on to power is an understatement. Until a few weeks ago, Republicans didn’t have the tools to hold them accountable. Without the power that comes with being in the majority, the best we could hope for was the truth would somehow break through all the noise created by the Left and their allies in the mainstream media.

Now with Republicans in the majority, we’re determined to make government not only function more effectively but to hold those in power accountable for the actions they take -**legal or illegal** - in service of the American people.

Of course, some will say that Republicans are just using our investigative powers to settle old scores. _**That’s wrong**_. We must ensure every American receives fair and equal treatment under the law. Whether you work deep in the federal bureaucracy, or you’re **President of the United States** , the law should be administered as written and apply equally to all.

As one of our top supporters, we know that you have your finger on America’s pulse more than most, so we’re hoping you can provide some insight on a very important question: **[Do you believe the government treats everyone the same under the rule of law, regardless of social position or economic advantages?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6e5f4cef39df4dd2ba1e6ba8d9b95f0a&_e=raGlqBvXwK_XxmonZQv4GcP4Afhf3133nD_wWXe0CjtKhqQjC8NLE-aHkpa0IzhgnPlM7KOTTLj1woroKL4cR-9VwHjUCU10gZY7-Y4gZGRCWjDx5aIBHJghUpQb9HijIEaawJ7vXZfnLp0sLu5fCP0dlgMg_LRuqaTuetCAbc4hgIhSNRboZiRmrwbYtAw4-YD5N777_WwvN6lFM3it-JRTyPVG2ZUXIK11WlpjE-Iio3HwUbHGlI1ibVGAysLpmO_e7HM_9yk7kg1LEqkZk5Tl4XInBb1xkxcgEtg3Yw1S-ECZ2nNf6JyH2mTYdqUf-IMuK2Yzuo5wmKTjVhU_sMlXw3NIFCRAnWp0sssPvSvqIBnmB7WOpHVnL-kxDbr2MVc7XMvjqlA-F6DsZh4_4TAJNl4HDqUNzTC9-7q-ln86g0yLidCxnDx1rbhzdn91)**

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

clean_body: with Republicans in the majority, we’re determined to make government not only function more effectively but to hold those in power accountable for th | | Peter, To say that the liberals who controlled the federal government for the past two years are desperately grasping on to power is an understatement. Until a few weeks ago, Republicans didn’t have the tools to hold them accountable. Without the power that comes with being in the majority, the best we could hope for was the truth would somehow break through all the noise created by the Left and their allies in the mainstream media. Now with Republicans in the majority, we’re determined to make government not only function more effectively but to hold those in power accountable for the actions they take -legal or illegal - in service of the American people. Of course, some will say that Republicans are just using our investigative powers to settle old scores. That’s wrong. We must ensure every American receives fair and equal treatment under the law. Whether you work deep in the federal bureaucracy, or you’re President of the United States , the law should be administered as written and apply equally to all. As one of our top supporters, we know that you have your finger on America’s pulse more than most, so we’re hoping you can provide some insight on a very important question: Democrats are going to hate the idea of a level playing field. Just think what they would do if President Biden was treated the same way President Trump was during last August’s raid over classified documents. You remember the coordinated leaks, the feigned media outrage, the incessant attacks on Trump and his supporters. Many of us asked: where was the FBI raid when classified documents were found in Biden’s possession before last November’s election? I’m glad to say, their game is finally over. Peter, please let me know what you think about Biden’s mishandling of classified documents. We are asking for your participation today. God Bless, Jim Jordan About Jim Jordan: | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.
