subject: Bringing a little more Houston to Washington, D.C.
body:
with your support |
---

| | | I am so grateful for the opportunity to represent TX-07 and I’m grateful to have you as part of #TeamLizzie. In January, we saw just how important it is for us to hold this seat and to win back the House. From the first days of failure to elect a Speaker to the first votes for bills that do not benefit the American people, the new Republican majority showed us who they are and what they care most about. The new majority’s agenda is dangerous. Threatening to default on our national debt. Proposing to cut Social Security and Medicare. Taking away our ability to make our own personal reproductive health care decisions. And putting pettiness and payback over people. It’s politics, not policy. And it will not go unchallenged. I will continue to fight for our priorities, and together, #TeamLizzie will continue working to make sure Democrats regain the majority next year. To bring about change, we need to do one thing: win elections. That’s what #TeamLizzie has been doing since day one, and we are not stopping now. Thanks for being part of the team. Together, we can do anything,

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: Reflections on Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
Together, we must remember and confront the impacts of racism, prejudice, and hate that are all too present in our nation still today.

| Team,

February is Black History Month, an opportunity to honor and celebrate the achievements of Black Americans throughout our country’s history. Black Americans are fundamental to the cultural fabric of West Michigan and contribute so much to communities across our district and nation.

As we celebrate this rich history, we also acknowledge how much work we still need to do to achieve racial justice and true equity in this nation. Together, we must remember and confront the impacts of racism, prejudice, and hate that are all too present in our nation still today.

I am proud to have spent my career working towards social justice, from advancing racial justice through voting rights to addressing housing and educational disparities and fighting discrimination in the criminal justice system. My commitment to these values continues now in my representation in Congress.

Happy Black History Month!

Sincerely,
Hillary
---

name: Rick Scott
subject: What does Biden think we’re wrecking?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | It’s almost laughable.

Joe Biden said he wasn’t going to let Republicans “wreck” his economy.

_But I don’t think we could make things any worse if we tried, Friend._

_**Here’s what the Biden economy looks like:**_ **High inflation****High household costs****High energy prices** **High national debt****Low labor participation**
There’s only one person wrecking the economy right now: **it’s Joe Biden.**
Republicans are doing everything we can to set things right, but we need your help.
[**Can you stand with us today and STOP Joe Biden’s economic train wreck?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=65c663054e594990898c8ca89c18b7fb&_e=wL7TIF4kOMUPQ2hovQ51tV0Sv0dDcXkxkltm2LRyg3u6j-0Fjwr9m63bpWB-StXoQohJ_07LDfw0vwCCFjpU_9e39gqvfulwZQlmLB_KRKp31AVkfmHdY1cKbEA3JSqV68WAsBB2ITX1s_JsisVRI18EwSUiDnvSgoQ2drteahNoB5AAO-4bXyjcTyIlXpXzW-QZ4SMZ8upZvBdBSNvn_BLiYPLUMLilsv8a4oafHPbJjcPdaqc-Qq9Wz0Jui607dcfEJck9m-s2nu5euUe9kJIUl2kiS-iqy5lwCtlrmNqKOGhG1IWGDOJgTpJgZmQdIIWABIcAmfoBDyTqsIOfXu_rFYr9dwMHAUpU-ccRBz4OTKyF57niqzZfUFH3JfBB)

Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. subject: ALERT: Chicago GOP Declares War
body:
Amidst IL GOP Chair Don Tracy slamming Harmeet Dhillon and Tom DeVore pulling huge wins against Pritzker's gun ban, Chicago GOP declares war.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/e13311a050cc/alert-chicago-gop-declares-war?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

ICYMI: our latest news and top stories from this week. Sign up today (https://www.illinoisreview.com/switching-plans-wizard?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) so that you never miss our breaking news!

Chicago GOP Declares War on Free Speech, Silences Conservative Voices and Bans Illinois Review Articles on Facebook Discussion Group (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/chicago-gop-declares-war-on-free-speech-silences-conservative-voices-and-bans-illinois-review-articles-on-facebook-discussion-group.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In the wake of DirectTV and AT&T censoring Newsmax and dropping the 4th highest rated conservative cable news channel in the country, a Chicago GOP Facebook discussion group run by Chicago Republican Party Director of Communications Jeff Fiedler, has decided to silence conservative voices, news, opinion and perspectives, and remove articles published by Illinois Review from their Facebook group. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/chicago-gop-declares-war-on-free-speech-silences-conservative-voices-and-bans-illinois-review-articles-on-facebook-discussion-group.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/chicago-gop-declares-war-on-free-speech-silences-conservative-voices-and-bans-illinois-review-articles-on-facebook-discussion-group.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

EXCLUSIVE: IL GOP Chair Don Tracy Goes on Radio, Talks Party Unity then Slams Harmeet Dhillon, Then Dhillon Responds (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/exclusive-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-goes-on-radio-talks-party-unity-then-slams-harmeet-dhillon-and-dhillon-responds.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Illinois Republican Party chairman Don Tracy, during a Tuesday segment with Bishop on Air, falsely accused Harmeet Dhillon of running a negative campaign against Ronna Romney-McDaniel for RNC chair. In an Illinois Review exclusive, Dhillon responds directly to Tracy. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/exclusive-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-goes-on-radio-talks-party-unity-then-slams-harmeet-dhillon-and-dhillon-responds.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/exclusive-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-goes-on-radio-talks-party-unity-then-slams-harmeet-dhillon-and-dhillon-responds.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

BREAKING: White County Judge Halts Pritzker's Assault Weapons Ban, Cites Equal Protection Clause, in Another Blow to Pritzker (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/breaking-white-county-judge-halts-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban-cites-equal-protection-clause-in-another-blow-to-pritzker.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In another blow to Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker’s assault weapons ban, and following the directive of the Appellate Court, White County Judge T. Scott Webb on Thursday granted attorney Thomas DeVore’s motion for a temporary restraining order (TRO), halting the ban while the lawsuit proceeds.

The lawsuit raises the same claims as the one filed in Effingham County, where Judge Joshua Morrison granted the first TRO and names Gov. JB Pritzker, State Senate President Don Harmon, D, Illinois House Speaker Christopher Welch, D, and Attorney General Kwame Raoul, D, as defendants.

The lawsuit filed in White County by DeVore includes over 1,600 plaintiffs, including former Illinois State Senator and Republican nominee for governor Darren Bailey, who is the first named plaintiff; 68 federal firearms dealers and covers 92 counties.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/breaking-white-county-judge-halts-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban-cites-equal-protection-clause-in-another-blow-to-pritzker.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/breaking-white-county-judge-halts-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban-cites-equal-protection-clause-in-another-blow-to-pritzker.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Committeewoman Lynn Franco Sends Open Letter to Chicago GOP Officials Requesting to Remove Boulton as GOP Chair, Boulton Ally Responds with an Attack (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/committeewoman-lynn-franco-sends-open-letter-to-chicago-gop-officials-requesting-to-remove-boulton-as-gop-chair-boulton-ally-responds-with-an-attack.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
On Monday afternoon, Chicago Republican Committeewoman Lynn Franco sent an email to Chicago Republican Party officials and Ward Committeeman detailing Chicago GOP chairman Stephen Boulton’s history of attacking women and conservatives online using both the official Chicago GOP social media accounts and his personal accounts, and calling for Boulton to be removed as chairman. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/committeewoman-lynn-franco-sends-open-letter-to-chicago-gop-officials-requesting-to-remove-boulton-as-gop-chair-boulton-ally-responds-with-an-attack.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/committeewoman-lynn-franco-sends-open-letter-to-chicago-gop-officials-requesting-to-remove-boulton-as-gop-chair-boulton-ally-responds-with-an-attack.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

BREAKING: Appellate Court Affirms DeVore's Equal Protection Argument, Assault Weapons Ban Temporary Restraining Order, Binds Courts Statewide (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-appellate-court-affirms-devores-equal-protection-argument-assault-weapons-ban-temporary-restraining-order-effective-statewide.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
In a serious blow to Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker’s assault weapons ban, the 5th District Appellate Court affirmed on Tuesday Effingham County’s Temporary Restraining Order (TRO), and goes beyond the original 866 plaintiffs in the original lawsuit, and is now binding against all courts statewide.

The lawsuit is based on alleged violations of the Illinois Constitution. One alleged violation is the Equal Protection Clause, because the Assault Weapons Ban provides exemptions for certain groups – for instance, active and retired law enforcement are exempted from the ban, as well as active military and private security guards.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-appellate-court-affirms-devores-equal-protection-argument-assault-weapons-ban-temporary-restraining-order-effective-statewide.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-appellate-court-affirms-devores-equal-protection-argument-assault-weapons-ban-temporary-restraining-order-effective-statewide.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Sources: Illinois Democrats Dominate House Chamber, Supermajority Forced to Occupy Seats on the Republican Side (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/sources-illinois-democrats-dominate-house-chamber-supermajority-forced-to-occupy-seats-on-the-republican-side.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Illinois House Democrats maintain a comfortable supermajority in the Illinois House of Representatives by a margin of 78-39, leaving Republicans voiceless and irrelevant on local and state matters. And to add insult to injury, multiple sources confirmed with Illinois Review that the Democrats have run out of desks in the House chamber, forcing many Democratic members to sit on the Republican side of the aisle. ** Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/sources-illinois-democrats-dominate-house-chamber-supermajority-forced-to-occupy-seats-on-the-republican-side.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/sources-illinois-democrats-dominate-house-chamber-supermajority-forced-to-occupy-seats-on-the-republican-side.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** GOP's Epic Fail: Misunderstanding School Board Races (https://www.newsmax.com/markvargas/school-boards-republicans-woke/2023/02/02/id/1107041/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Beyond the catastrophic consequences related to hybrid and remote learning, the sexual education curriculum that teaches young children about gender identity, hormone blockers — subjects completely inappropriate for children, is also making its way into the classroom.

It’s not OK to read what’s in the curriculum live on air as a Chicago radio show host because it violates federal communications policies, but it’s perfectly OK to teach it to young children?

This logic is not only flawed — it’s wrong. If you can’t read this on radio airwaves, then why are you teaching this to children?

Teaching children about critical race theory has also found its way into the classroom — a divisive concept that teaches about race superiority and that the United States is fundamentally a racist country, among other things.

It is stoking the flames of racism, and dividing young children at such a young, impressionable age.

But while these battles wage at the local level, where is the Republican National Committee (RNC) or state Republican organizations on this issue? They are completely silent. ** Click to read more. (https://www.newsmax.com/markvargas/school-boards-republicans-woke/2023/02/02/id/1107041/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** (https://www.newsmax.com/markvargas/school-boards-republicans-woke/2023/02/02/id/1107041/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b3c6c22210-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_10_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b3c6c22210-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Friend,
We kicked off the 2023 legislative session one month ago. The House has already been busy passing legislation to build a Minnesota that works better for everyone: ensuring a fundamental right to reproductive care, taking bold action on the climate crisis, Driver’s Licenses for All, Restore the Vote, and more.
We’ve got even more exciting work ahead of us, friend, but 2024 will be here before we know it. We know extreme Republicans won’t rest and will be fighting harder than ever to flip the Minnesota House. We can’t let that happen. Will you help us protect our House DFL Majority by making a contribution today?

Fellow American,

**President Biden and the Democrats have crippled our country** over the past two years. Historic inflation, record illegal border crossings, and a WEAK foreign policy strategy has put **_America LAST._**

Despite ALL the failures of the Left, a **Gallup** study concluded that **“more U.S. adults [identify] as Democrats or leaning Democratic than identified as Republicans or leaned Republican.”**

To sum it up - our country is at a crossroads and **Republican input and support is fleeting.**

Fellow American, __you’re one of the last true American Patriots__ and the Republican National Committee is one of the ONLY organizations who can save our Party and bring back American prosperity.

[**Which is why we’re excited to announce we’ve officially opened our 2023 American Patriot Survey and you’ve been personally selected to participate.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=db33ea5c377842c2b847a7611230b82e&_e=HFbiln8H_RVObv8zLjm1Txw4KBUokYgpRX0dJ0_sIWg-JX-alb2_sfGvRK6gXSha6Xqy_sFg-g8yNu8E5sLh_Xm3yhgVc5ZRNa120oH4rgOrzsuJd3u_mnfiVCNW1Pc5VACIDutQv7RdTT-jPMcMFGvD8ErbTuO_-kJ4PdPFz_0y_bht642xU3p32dSgr9YS_P6lPGaKxRPUj9PV28QQGHeGkTyZv_qvDkh_b9p9eA0YfciEJLz6g6TF1vJmphs22DinFWt0LHTGiGC5j72APMU8rg2yAm4FOFMJdtgaHDAPq4PheUPv1tDivvladKPFhqzygDIFt3BktHOaN1ib0YlV59yoINBxQFagIJqW7a9sUuk6NvcB0NM_in9qkPmWW4aU2YAXa_yxQNdRFLVPD2gro23Ac2QAO6qcLBCQtH-_aBme0b0O5x9Tgkbgij7N0DGsmlr2cs1mnKh8q9-dtA%3D%3D) The **survey closes at 11:59 PM TONIGHT** so please, do not hesitate to complete it.

[**Fellow American, there is a path to turning our country around, but we need to know you’re input**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=db33ea5c377842c2b847a7611230b82e&_e=HFbiln8H_RVObv8zLjm1Txw4KBUokYgpRX0dJ0_sIWg-JX-alb2_sfGvRK6gXSha6Xqy_sFg-g8yNu8E5sLh_Xm3yhgVc5ZRNa120oH4rgOrzsuJd3u_mnfiVCNW1Pc5VACIDutQv7RdTT-jPMcMFGvD8ErbTuO_-kJ4PdPFz_0y_bht642xU3p32dSgr9YS_P6lPGaKxRPUj9PV28QQGHeGkTyZv_qvDkh_b9p9eA0YfciEJLz6g6TF1vJmphs22DinFWt0LHTGiGC5j72APMU8rg2yAm4FOFMJdtgaHDAPq4PheUPv1tDivvladKPFQdxPZH_z4Py7vQgdOYNsfjDBshiaAOya9sOc0_W21gVF0vfPsVWli0kWMnvjTJg8Coy5NeAcVEcqDtLJmMFw8Yb3sEfCiUxjM4SN79alu0HGmGxETzIBgS_HCYbxKfU2LmFvVWjKaMpCwrlUW2kndg%3D%3D) - you’re one of the last remaining true American Patriots we can count on.

You see, Biden has given the American people the perception that he is harmless, but **his policies have us bordering on the edge of a massive recession and an invasion of illegal immigrants.**

Now more than ever Republicans MUST unite to defeat the Left’s disastrous agenda.

Our 2023 American Patriot Survey - which will cover a range of critical topics - [**will be the blueprint to how we WIN and put America FIRST again.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=db33ea5c377842c2b847a7611230b82e&_e=HFbiln8H_RVObv8zLjm1Txw4KBUokYgpRX0dJ0_sIWg-JX-alb2_sfGvRK6gXSha6Xqy_sFg-g8yNu8E5sLh_Xm3yhgVc5ZRNa120oH4rgOrzsuJd3u_mnfiVCNW1Pc5VACIDutQv7RdTT-jPMcMFGvD8ErbTuO_-kJ4PdPFz_0y_bht642xU3p32dSgr9YS_P6lPGaKxRPUj9PV28QQGHeGkTyZv_qvDkh_b9p9eA0YfciEJLz6g6TF1vJmphs22DinFWt0LHTGiGC5j72APMU8rg2yAm4FOFMJdtgaHDAPq4PheUPv1tDivvladKPFKnlYu-MFyJsIDpE7Q-7U94h6VsjN0f8fXHyyUM6eWf7u0wsxjUTwgSHBWeXqKOONXWdZtuXw51JGcxlLGREr9WdqXnk1PQRErooF00R4zdvNYk_9OkE7zlK0hVFaWi8KrDGavVQ-c_enzNX-DYNDeQ%3D%3D)

name: Senate Ratings
subject: What happened to the “Red Wave”?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
“Democrats Have a lot of Defending to Do”
Fellow American,

Larry Sabato and the University of Virginia’s Center for Politics have just released their initial ratings for 2024’s pivotal U.S. Senate races -- **and there’s a lot to be encouraged for 2024.**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=02c220048ba649e8aff2628758022d0d&_e=N2-zmWKnN0_azM0eATjwqoYbMkS5oU6t8nJD5MKYzA3l862oLGQE2KWri8z1QSSm6rumz0QMPj7-POp_hkFYQYxdbVyRxROFW6SxNHGMnbt51S6ZN84_EvKAgyPcfR00H52oBQ5R4DTSqaaDpMJ3W0pvZF8zkOSrly_YsSIDyvHU1wJM8F6JULsf3KWnH7D8BV3K7FUkZgzg4D6Vf9xQbi3CriZZzluZxY0PE9t5HCG5ZhVs2q7IaVA2iG_x4263N8FlCiWwU4HCfmRQGiLcZXtPyFljJJOl0UXsUK43LdSD2PTbOjiROeyzd79U2LxvSLvEJ7ANdNfiJ_FaIyBwvv46lN1O8Ji2ZZhPSehneHK90RcGVGzooLlHHbV3KDYj6qOw9ZOIc1brTB_OdfjUs5FkFBSgIzLdpTHBkgzGGCuC_F_7S6116tG9uPXY5pNmYp21WQraZNFkSUaq_BI-hA%3D%3D)

It starts right in the title, Fellow American -- _“Democrats Have a lot of Defending to Do”_ \-- but let’s have a bit of a closer look:

* There are 34 contests on the ballot in 2024 -- and Democrats are defending 23 of those races while the GOP is only defending eleven

* Three of the Democrats’ incumbents are facing challengers in states that the former President carried in 2020 -- West Virginia, Ohio, and Montana

* Three more are “independents” that caucus with the Democrats, and one of those, Sen. Krysten Sinema in Arizona, is already facing a Democrat challenger from her left!

* Democrats are “defending the Top 8 Senate seats likeliest to flip”

* Four of the races where Democrats are on defense are rated “Toss-Up or Worse...”

**_Sounds pretty good, doesn’t it?_**

But Fellow American, the 2022 races also favored Republicans, and as we all saw, our effort to capture a new GOP Senate Majority came up short, with the “Red Wave” we hoped for failing to occur.

And when they factor in the Democrats’ advantage in national fundraising, the Center for Politics sees control of the Senate as a “Toss-Up” as well...

clean_body: “Democrats Have a lot of Defending to Do” Fellow American, Larry Sabato and the University of Virginia’s Center for Politics have just released their initial ratings for 2024’s pivotal U.S. Senate races -- and there’s a lot to be encouraged for 2024. It starts right in the title, Fellow American -- “Democrats Have a lot of Defending to Do” \-- but let’s have a bit of a closer look: There are 34 contests on the ballot in 2024 -- and Democrats are defending 23 of those races while the GOP is only defending eleven Three of the Democrats’ incumbents are facing challengers in states that the former President carried in 2020 -- West Virginia, Ohio, and Montana Three more are “independents” that caucus with the Democrats, and one of those, Sen. Krysten Sinema in Arizona, is already facing a Democrat challenger from her left! Democrats are “defending the Top 8 Senate seats likeliest to flip” Four of the races where Democrats are on defense are rated “Toss-Up or Worse...” Sounds pretty good, doesn’t it?** But Fellow American, the 2022 races also favored Republicans, and as we all saw, our effort to capture a new GOP Senate Majority came up short, with the “Red Wave” we hoped for failing to occur. And when they factor in the Democrats’ advantage in national fundraising, the Center for Politics sees control of the Senate as a “Toss-Up” as well... Regardless of what political oddsmakers and pundits expect, recent history is the best lesson -- we MUST outwork and outraise the Democrats if we want to win -- and that starts with YOU. Everything we do to prepare for these critical races begins with the support we receive from grassroots conservatives like you, Fellow American, for border security, Supreme Court and federal judge confirmations, tax and spending cuts, and so much more, we must win a new Senate Majority in 2024. ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=182fca74067d4d89895a0b3166990b18&_e=rfP7CzdbPqkA1ttGGfoibM1OQdfbcPlODykaWnrq5JhBgiYViYkRN5U62hSq5hcrp7Zy_f72qHNyyVfd_sg6nTRQ-blPm2e_dHQ44QXCb_5PRtg8jJLfeOid90uz-Cz5Afh7bHc2KYWHix2uiXxNrGaJcY77lpfEhM5uNPlgspusStatvJKed7AkswH0pd57QuxhhahMBs7Ygbxc-n7aXTztubnEVY7YWyj_jpALwhgSThGMfhn7LwOFwwubQiBdn8bwtLKjomwuFkaoqrdvoftNg02QpsJh6ZGygpeRMhofSI-UdYXgt2-u0eOI-Au570LUcj2p82yaeoWgeZJC8w%3D%3D) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=182fca74067d4d89895a0b3166990b18&_e=rfP7CzdbPqkA1ttGGfoibM1OQdfbcPlODykaWnrq5JhBgiYViYkRN5U62hSq5hcrp7Zy_f72qHNyyVfd_sg6nTRQ-blPm2e_dHQ44QXCb_5PRtg8jJLfeOid90uz-Cz5Afh7bHc2KYWHix2uiXxNrGaJcY77lpfEhM5uNPlgspusStatvJKed7AkswH0pd57DqryZF_wQuInL8dJU30AERkN2i7Sp-va15jbXQKw92zt6RPT0NjdSuuFSgi42Mb3gmC8vmXLWROrX4q_5lSYp9-fsWhYmEyM4CtsoAY1xf5cVE3qcbJOhmpL52erhMIXZh97x4gD9c-ZnlTacjVM5g%3D%3D)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=182fca74067d4d89895a0b3166990b18&_e=rfP7CzdbPqkA1ttGGfoibM1OQdfbcPlODykaWnrq5JhBgiYViYkRN5U62hSq5hcrp7Zy_f72qHNyyVfd_sg6nTRQ-blPm2e_dHQ44QXCb_5PRtg8jJLfeOid90uz-Cz5Afh7bHc2KYWHix2uiXxNrGaJcY77lpfEhM5uNPlgspusStatvJKed7AkswH0pd57OYhEE1LKAzdX20GcapFAK_VOMNrYNIF4sdz5lpVtUILxXldv8Qi5fmdfsu-yoUSZerEuarMCimfDZAzHxksqpTqQmohjB895219TdnOYq3D07ozPPdh0mqn7IazXjM74DLRt3nkzVN1gVGxrvvQevA%3D%3D)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can 't fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=182fca74067d4d89895a0b3166990b18&_e=rfP7CzdbPqkA1ttGGfoibM1OQdfbcPlODykaWnrq5JhBgiYViYkRN5U62hSq5hcrp7Zy_f72qHNyyVfd_sg6nTRQ-blPm2e_dHQ44QXCb_5PRtg8jJLfeOid90uz-Cz5Afh7bHc2KYWHix2uiXxNrGaJcY77lpfEhM5uNPlgspusStatvJKed7AkswH0pd57YI3tTqAQY3fOu4lNsK5rZyeH3-jcWQdjnOa58ijX8IXJ2cu8c94hA6X8FVCUDR9t8gQsKQ2aJtaV1CIIXsGYdCYeIS20tsaHRZz9bttX6oU2BG-WssDCRVRxV0xsc_nY9Dggvhd8eKiApSPqhKqANQ%3D%3D)

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58248261/390477918/-876189841?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjZjZDUyZi0xZWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VzK8EOHZfoHOLvL6-nrGmC1-h3gju48P95TRjQdaYjg=&emci=3b5a283e-efa3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=0b6cd52f-1ea4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)
---
Friend,

Ella Baker, a Virginia native and one of the pioneers of the Civil Rights movement, once said, “Give light and people will find the way.”

As our country continues to undergo a reckoning with both its past and present, [**Black History Month**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58248262/390477919/-2099660262?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjZjZDUyZi0xZWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VzK8EOHZfoHOLvL6-nrGmC1-h3gju48P95TRjQdaYjg=&emci=3b5a283e-efa3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=0b6cd52f-1ea4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) is a time to look back at the impact of Black Americans on our democracy and our culture. By shining a brighter light on the past, we can forge a better path forward.

Our Commonwealth has a long and painful history around slavery and racial violence. Therefore, this month is both a time of solemn reflection and celebration of Black achievement. I encourage all Virginians to consider taking one or more of the following actions this month:
* Call your elected officials and demand progress on criminal justice reform and voting rights
* Support **[Black-owned businesses](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58248263/390477920/-2078284117?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjZjZDUyZi0xZWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VzK8EOHZfoHOLvL6-nrGmC1-h3gju48P95TRjQdaYjg=&emci=3b5a283e-efa3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=0b6cd52f-1ea4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)** in your community
* Look into **[Black History Month events, exhibits, and programs](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58248264/390477921/1834811218?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjZjZDUyZi0xZWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VzK8EOHZfoHOLvL6-nrGmC1-h3gju48P95TRjQdaYjg=&emci=3b5a283e-efa3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=0b6cd52f-1ea4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)** that will educate and begin valuable discussions
* **[Sign up for the NAACP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58248265/390477922/2011287224?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjZjZDUyZi0xZWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VzK8EOHZfoHOLvL6-nrGmC1-h3gju48P95TRjQdaYjg=&emci=3b5a283e-efa3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=0b6cd52f-1ea4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)** to learn about further events and ways to get involved
* Start a conversation with a friend or family member about how you can take active steps to promote anti-racism in your community
* Explore the [**history, arts, and contributions of Black Americans**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58248266/390477923/-386088154?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjZjZDUyZi0xZWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VzK8EOHZfoHOLvL6-nrGmC1-h3gju48P95TRjQdaYjg=&emci=3b5a283e-efa3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=0b6cd52f-1ea4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) in your local community.

Let us keep the wise words of Ella Baker in mind as we navigate this month – and all the months ahead.

Thank you,

Jennifer
Paid for by Wexton for Congress
Wexton for Congress
PO Box 650550
Sterling, VA 20165
United States
